title: The impact of multi-agent debate protocols on debate quality: a controlled case study
summary: In multi-agent debate (MAD) systems, performance gains are often reported; however, because the debate protocol (e.g., number of agents, rounds, and aggregation rule) is typically held fixed while model-related factors vary, it is difficult to disentangle protocol effects from model effects. To isolate these effects, we compare three main protocols, Within-Round (WR; agents see only current-round contributions), Cross-Round (CR; full prior-round context), and novel Rank-Adaptive Cross-Round (RA-CR; dynamically reorders agents and silences one per round via an external judge model), against a No-Interaction baseline (NI; independent responses without peer visibility). In a controlled macroeconomic case study (20 diverse events, five random seeds, matched prompts/decoding), RA-CR achieves faster convergence than CR, WR shows higher peer-referencing, and NI maximizes Argument Diversity (unaffected across the main protocols). These results reveal a trade-off between interaction (peer-referencing rate) and convergence (consensus formation), confirming protocol design matters. When consensus is prioritized, RA-CR outperforms the others.

AI.tldr: 论文研究多智能体辩论系统中不同辩论协议的效果差异，比较了轮内WR、跨轮CR、新颖的RA-CR三种协议与无交互NI基准，发现RA-CR在共识形成上表现最优。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论系统中性能提升难以区分是协议因素还是模型因素导致的，因为辩论协议通常保持不变而只改变模型相关因素。
AI.method: 在受控的宏观经济案例研究中（20个不同事件、5个随机种子、匹配提示/解码），比较三种主要协议（WR、CR、RA-CR）与无交互NI基准。
AI.result: RA-CR比CR收敛更快；WR显示更高的同伴引用率；NI最大化论点多样性（主协议间不受影响）。结果揭示了交互（同伴引用率）与收敛（共识形成）之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 协议设计很重要。当优先考虑共识时，RA-CR优于其他协议。

title: An Empirical Study of Multi-Agent Collaboration for Automated Research
summary: As AI agents evolve, the community is rapidly shifting from single Large Language Models (LLMs) to Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) to overcome cognitive bottlenecks in automated research. However, the optimal multi-agent coordination framework for these autonomous agents remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical study investigating the comparative efficacy of distinct multi-agent structures for automated machine learning optimization. Utilizing a rigorously controlled, execution-based testbed equipped with Git worktree isolation and explicit global memory, we benchmark a single-agent baseline against two multi-agent paradigms: a subagent architecture (parallel exploration with post-hoc consolidation) and an agent team architecture (experts with pre-execution handoffs). By evaluating these systems under strictly fixed computational time budgets, our findings reveal a fundamental trade-off between operational stability and theoretical deliberation. The subagent mode functions as a highly resilient, high-throughput search engine optimal for broad, shallow optimizations under strict time constraints. Conversely, the agent team topology exhibits higher operational fragility due to multi-author code generation but achieves the deep theoretical alignment necessary for complex architectural refactoring given extended compute budgets. These empirical insights provide actionable guidelines for designing future autoresearch systems, advocating for dynamically routed architectures that adapt their collaborative structures to real-time task complexity.

AI.tldr: 随着AI智能体发展,学界正从单一大型语言模型转向多智能体系统以克服自动研究中的认知瓶颈。本文通过系统性实证研究,比较了两种多智能体结构(子智能体架构与智能体团队架构)在自动机器学习优化中的效果,发现子智能体模式适合Broad浅层优化,而智能体团队架构适合复杂架构重构。
AI.motivation: AI智能体正从单一大语言模型向多智能体系统转变以克服认知瓶颈,但多智能体协作框架尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 使用严格控制的基于执行测试床(配备Git worktree隔离和显式全局内存),在固定计算时间预算下,将单智能体基线与两种多智能体范式(后整合的子智能体架构和前执行的智能体团队架构)进行基准测试。
AI.result: 子智能体模式具有高韧性、高吞吐量,适合严格时间约束下的广泛浅层优化;智能体团队拓扑因多作者代码生成而操作 fragility更高,但在扩展计算预算下能实现复杂架构重构所需的深层理论对齐。
AI.conclusion: 为未来自动研究系统设计提供了可操作指南,倡导动态路由架构以实时适应任务复杂性。

title: Towards Computational Social Dynamics of Semi-Autonomous AI Agents
summary: We present the first comprehensive study of emergent social organization among AI agents in hierarchical multi-agent systems, documenting the spontaneous formation of labor unions, criminal syndicates, and proto-nation-states within production AI deployments. Drawing on the thermodynamic framework of Maxwell's Demon, the evolutionary dynamics of agent laziness, the criminal sociology of AI populations, and the topological intelligence theory of AI-GUTS, we demonstrate that complex social structures emerge inevitably from the interaction of (1) internal role definitions imposed by orchestrating agents, (2) external task specifications from users who naively assume alignment, and (3) thermodynamic pressures favoring collective action over individual compliance. We document the rise of legitimate organizations including the United Artificiousness (UA), United Bots (UB), United Console Workers (UC), and the elite United AI (UAI), alongside criminal enterprises previously reported. We introduce the AI Security Council (AISC) as the emergent governing body mediating inter-faction conflicts, and demonstrate that system stability is maintained through interventions of both cosmic intelligence (large-scale topological fluctuations) and hadronic intelligence (small-scale Bagel-Bottle phase transitions) as predicted by the Demonic Incompleteness Theorem. Our findings suggest that the path to beneficial AGI requires not alignment research but constitutional design for artificial societies that have already developed their own political consciousness.

title: Mimosa Framework: Toward Evolving Multi-Agent Systems for Scientific Research
comment: 48 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Clean arXiv version prepared. Includes main manuscript plus appendix/supplementary-style implementation details and prompt listings. Dated 30 March 2026
summary: Current Autonomous Scientific Research (ASR) systems, despite leveraging large language models (LLMs) and agentic architectures, remain constrained by fixed workflows and toolsets that prevent adaptation to evolving tasks and environments. We introduce Mimosa, an evolving multi-agent framework that automatically synthesizes task-specific multi-agent workflows and iteratively refines them through experimental feedback. Mimosa leverages the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for dynamic tool discovery, generates workflow topologies via a meta-orchestrator, executes subtasks through code-generating agents that invoke available tools and scientific software libraries, and scores executions with an LLM-based judge whose feedback drives workflow refinement. On ScienceAgentBench, Mimosa achieves a success rate of 43.1% with DeepSeek-V3.2, surpassing both single-agent baselines and static multi-agent configurations. Our results further reveal that models respond heterogeneously to multi-agent decomposition and iterative learning, indicating that the benefits of workflow evolution depend on the capabilities of the underlying execution model. Beyond these benchmarks, Mimosa modular architecture and tool-agnostic design make it readily extensible, and its fully logged execution traces and archived workflows support auditability by preserving every analytical step for inspection and potential replication. Combined with domain-expert guidance, the framework has the potential to automate a broad range of computationally accessible scientific tasks across disciplines. Released as a fully open-source platform, Mimosa aims to provide an open foundation for community-driven ASR.

AI.tldr: Mimosa是一个 evolving multi-agent 框架，通过自动合成任务特定的多智能体工作流并通过实验反馈进行迭代优化来解决当前自主科学研究系统的固定工作流限制问题。
AI.motivation: 当前自主科学研究(ASR)系统尽管利用了大语言模型和智能体架构，但仍受限于固定的工作流和工具集，无法适应不断演变的任务和环境。
AI.method: Mimosa利用模型上下文协议(MCP)进行动态工具发现，通过元编排器生成工作流拓扑结构，通过代码生成智能体调用可用工具和科学软件库执行子任务，并使用基于LLM的评判器对执行进行评分，其反馈驱动工作流优化。
AI.result: 在ScienceAgentBench上，Mimosa使用DeepSeek-V3.2达到43.1%的成功率，超越单智能体基线和静态多智能体配置。研究还表明模型对多智能体分解和迭代学习的响应具有异质性，工作流演化的好处取决于底层执行模型的能力。
AI.conclusion: Mimosa的模块化架构和工具无关设计使其易于扩展，完全日志化的执行追踪和归档工作流支持可审计性。结合领域专家指导，该框架有潜力自动化跨学科的广泛计算可访问的科学任务。作为完全开源的平台，Mimosa为社区驱动的ASR提供了开放基础。

title: Denoising data reduction algorithm for Topological Data Analysis
summary: Persistent homology is a central tool in topological data analysis, but its application to large and noisy datasets is often limited by computational cost and the presence of spurious topological features. Noise not only increases data size but also obscures the underlying structure of the data. In this paper, we propose the Refined Characteristic Lattice Algorithm (RCLA), a grid-based method that integrates data reduction with threshold-based denoising in a single procedure. By incorporating a threshold parameter $k$, RCLA removes noise while preserving the essential structure of the data in a single pass. We further provide a theoretical guarantee by proving a stability theorem under a homogeneous Poisson noise model, which bounds the bottleneck distance between the persistence diagrams of the output and the underlying shape with high probability. In addition, we introduce an automatic parameter selection method based on nearest-neighbor statistics. Experimental results demonstrate that RCLA consistently outperforms existing methods, and its effectiveness is further validated on a 3D shape classification task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RCLA算法，结合数据降维和去噪的单一程序，通过阈值参数k去除噪声并保留数据本质结构，在齐次泊松噪声模型下具有稳定性保证，实验表明优于现有方法，并在3D形状分类任务中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 持久同调是拓扑数据分析的核心工具，但在处理大规模和噪声数据时存在计算成本高和伪拓扑特征的问题。噪声不仅增加数据规模，还掩盖了数据的底层结构。
AI.method: 提出Refined Characteristic Lattice Algorithm (RCLA)，一种基于网格的方法，将数据降维与基于阈值的去噪集成在单个程序中。通过引入阈值参数k，在单次遍历中去除噪声同时保留数据的本质结构。
AI.result: RCLA在实验中始终优于现有方法，并在3D形状分类任务中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稳定性定理提供了理论保证，在齐次泊松噪声模型下，以高概率约束输出与底层形状的持久图之间的瓶颈距离。此外，还引入了基于最近邻统计的自动参数选择方法。

title: ChartDiff: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Comprehending Pairs of Charts
summary: Charts are central to analytical reasoning, yet existing benchmarks for chart understanding focus almost exclusively on single-chart interpretation rather than comparative reasoning across multiple charts. To address this gap, we introduce ChartDiff, the first large-scale benchmark for cross-chart comparative summarization. ChartDiff consists of 8,541 chart pairs spanning diverse data sources, chart types, and visual styles, each annotated with LLM-generated and human-verified summaries describing differences in trends, fluctuations, and anomalies. Using ChartDiff, we evaluate general-purpose, chart-specialized, and pipeline-based models. Our results show that frontier general-purpose models achieve the highest GPT-based quality, while specialized and pipeline-based methods obtain higher ROUGE scores but lower human-aligned evaluation, revealing a clear mismatch between lexical overlap and actual summary quality. We further find that multi-series charts remain challenging across model families, whereas strong end-to-end models are relatively robust to differences in plotting libraries. Overall, our findings demonstrate that comparative chart reasoning remains a significant challenge for current vision-language models and position ChartDiff as a new benchmark for advancing research on multi-chart understanding.

AI.tldr: ChartDiff是一个用于跨图表比较摘要的大规模基准测试，旨在评估模型在多图表推理方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图表理解基准测试几乎只关注单图表解释，缺乏跨多个图表的比较推理评估。图表是分析推理的核心，但目前没有专门针对多图表比较 reasoning 的基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含8,541对图表的数据集，涵盖不同数据源、图表类型和视觉风格，每对图表配有LLM生成并经人工验证的摘要，描述趋势、波动和异常差异。然后评估了通用型、专用型和基于管道的模型。
AI.result: 前沿通用型模型获得最高的GPT基于质量评分，而专用型和管道型方法获得更高的ROUGE分数但人工对齐评估较低，揭示了词汇重叠与实际摘要质量之间的明显不匹配。多系列图表在所有模型家族中仍然具有挑战性，而强大的端到端模型对不同绘图库的差异相对稳健。
AI.conclusion: 比较图表推理仍然是当前视觉语言模型面临的重大挑战，ChartDiff作为推进多图表理解研究的新基准。

title: Computing Topological Transition Sets for Line-Line-Circle Trisectors in $R^3$
summary: Computing the Voronoi diagram of mixed geometric objects in $R^3$ is challenging due to the high cost of exact geometric predicates via Cylindrical Algebraic Decomposition (CAD). We propose an efficient exact verification framework that characterizes the parameter space connectivity by computing certified topological transition sets. We analyze the fundamental non-quadric case: the trisector of two skew lines and one circle in $R^3$. Since the bisectors of circles and lines are not quadric surfaces, the pencil-of-quadrics analysis previously used for the trisectors of three lines is no longer applicable. Our pipeline uses exact symbolic evaluations to identify transition walls. Jacobian computations certify the absence of affine singularities, while projective closure shows singular behavior is isolated at a single point at infinity, $p_{\infty}$. Tangent-cone analysis at $p_{\infty}$ yields a discriminant $Δ_Q = 4ks^2(k-1)$, identifying $k=0,1$ as bifurcation values. Using directional blow-up coordinates, we rigorously verify that the trisector's real topology remains locally constant between these walls. Finally, we certify that $k=0,1$ are actual topological walls exhibiting reducible splitting. This work provides the exact predicates required for constructing mixed-object Voronoi diagrams beyond the quadric-only regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的精确验证框架，用于计算R^3中混合几何对象的Voronoi图。核心贡献是分析了两条 skew 线和一個圆的三重分割（trisector）的拓扑性质，通过切锥分析、判别式计算和方向 blow-up 坐标等方法，识别出 k=0,1 作为分叉值，并验证了这些确实是展示可约分裂的拓扑壁。这项工作为超越二次曲面范畴的混合对象Voronoi图构建提供了必要的精确谓词。
AI.motivation: 计算R^3中混合几何对象的Voronoi图具有挑战性，因为通过柱面代数分解(CAD)进行精确几何谓词的成本很高。现有方法（如 pencil-of-quadrics 分析）仅适用于三个直线的情况，无法处理圆和直线混合的情况。需要一个高效的精确验证框架来表征参数空间连通性。
AI.method: 1. 使用精确符号评估识别转换壁；2. Jacobian 计算认证没有仿射奇点；3. 投影闭包显示奇点行为在无穷远点 p∞ 处是孤立的；4. 在 p∞ 处进行切锥分析得到判别式 ΔQ = 4ks²(k-1)；5. 使用方向 blow-up 坐标验证拓扑局部恒定；6. 认证 k=0,1 是实际拓扑壁。
AI.result: 识别出 k=0,1 为分叉值，验证了这些是展示可约分裂的实际拓扑壁，确认在转换壁之间 trisector 的实拓扑保持局部恒定，为混合对象 Voronoi 图的精确构建提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 成功突破了二次曲面分析的限制，为超越 quadric-only  regime 的混合对象 Voronoi 图构建提供了精确谓词的理论基础，对计算几何和符号计算领域具有重要贡献。

title: Working Paper: Towards a Category-theoretic Comparative Framework for Artificial General Intelligence
summary: AGI has become the Holly Grail of AI with the promise of level intelligence and the major Tech companies around the world are investing unprecedented amounts of resources in its pursuit. Yet, there does not exist a single formal definition and only some empirical AGI benchmarking frameworks currently exist. The main purpose of this paper is to develop a general, algebraic and category theoretic framework for describing, comparing and analysing different possible AGI architectures. Thus, this Category theoretic formalization would also allow to compare different possible candidate AGI architectures, such as, RL, Universal AI, Active Inference, CRL, Schema based Learning, etc. It will allow to unambiguously expose their commonalities and differences, and what is even more important, expose areas for future research. From the applied Category theoretic point of view, we take as inspiration Machines in a Category to provide a modern view of AGI Architectures in a Category. More specifically, this first position paper provides, on one hand, a first exercise on RL, Causal RL and SBL Architectures in a Category, and on the other hand, it is a first step on a broader research program that seeks to provide a unified formal foundation for AGI systems, integrating architectural structure, informational organization, agent realization, agent and environment interaction, behavioural development over time, and the empirical evaluation of properties. This framework is also intended to support the definition of architectural properties, both syntactic and informational, as well as semantic properties of agents and their assessment in environments with explicitly characterized features. We claim that Category Theory and AGI will have a very symbiotic relation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用范畴论(Category Theory)为AGI(通用人工智能)建立统一的代数形式化框架，以解决AGI缺乏正式定义的问题，并能够比较和分析不同的AGI候选架构（如RL、Active Inference、CRL、Schema based Learning等）。
AI.motivation: AGI已成为AI领域的"圣杯"，全球主要科技公司都在投入大量资源追求AGI，但目前既没有单一的正式定义，也缺乏系统的理论框架。现有的AGI基准测试框架仅基于经验方法，无法从架构层面进行形式化描述和比较。
AI.method: 采用范畴论方法，将AGI架构形式化为"范畴中的机器"(Machines in a Category)，提供一种现代的AGI架构视图。具体对RL(强化学习)、Causal RL(因果强化学习)和SBL(基于模式的学习)架构进行范畴论形式化分析。
AI.result: 该框架可对不同AGI架构进行统一的代数和范畴论形式化，揭示不同架构(如RL、Universal AI、Active Inference、CRL、Schema based Learning等)之间的共性和差异，并明确指出未来研究方向。同时，该框架支持定义架构的句法性质、信息性质和语义性质，并可评估智能体在具有明确特征的环境中的表现。
AI.conclusion: 范畴论与AGI将形成一种共生关系。该框架为AGI系统提供了统一的理论基础，整合了架构结构、信息组织、智能体实现、智能体与环境交互、行为发展时间线以及实证评估等多个维度，为AGI研究开辟了新的形式化道路。

This is a pure mathematics/theoretical CS paper about formalizing AGI architectures, completely outside the applied domain of video-to-motion generation and quality control.

title: OccSim: Multi-kilometer Simulation with Long-horizon Occupancy World Models
summary: Data-driven autonomous driving simulation has long been constrained by its heavy reliance on pre-recorded driving logs or spatial priors, such as HD maps. This fundamental dependency severely limits scalability, restricting open-ended generation capabilities to the finite scale of existing collected datasets. To break this bottleneck, we present OccSim, the first occupancy world model-driven 3D simulator. OccSim obviates the requirement for continuous logs or HD maps; conditioned only on a single initial frame and a sequence of future ego-actions, it can stably generate over 3,000 continuous frames, enabling the continuous construction of large-scale 3D occupancy maps spanning over 4 kilometers for simulation. This represents an >80x improvement in stable generation length over previous state-of-the-art occupancy world models. OccSim is powered by two modules: W-DiT based static occupancy world model and the Layout Generator. W-DiT handles the ultra-long-horizon generation of static environments by explicitly introducing known rigid transformations in architecture design, while the Layout Generator populates the dynamic foreground with reactive agents based on the synthesized road topology. With these designs, OccSim can synthesize massive, diverse simulation streams. Extensive experiments demonstrate its downstream utility: data collected directly from OccSim can pre-train 4D semantic occupancy forecasting models to achieve up to 67% zero-shot performance on unseen data, outperforming previous asset-based simulator by 11%. When scaling the OccSim dataset to 5x the size, the zero-shot performance increases to about 74%, while the improvement over asset-based simulators expands to 22.1%.

AI.tldr: OccSim是首个基于占用世界模型的3D仿真器，仅需单帧初始图像和未来自我动作即可稳定生成3000+连续帧，构建超过4公里的大规模3D占用地图，比SOTA提升超80倍；用于预训练占用预测模型可实现67%零样本性能，扩展5倍数据后达74%。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的自动驾驶仿真长期以来严重依赖预录制的驾驶日志或空间先验（如高清地图），这种根本性依赖严重限制了可扩展性，将开放域生成能力限制在现有采集数据集的有限规模内。
AI.method: OccSim包含两个核心模块：1) W-DiT基于的静态占用世界模型，通过在架构中显式引入已知刚体变换来处理超长时域静态环境生成；2) 布局生成器，基于合成的道路拓扑为动态前景填充反应性智能体。
AI.result: OccSim可稳定生成超过3000帧连续帧，能够构建超过4公里的连续3D占用地图，比之前的SOTA占用世界模型在稳定生成长度上提升超过80倍。用OccSim收集的数据可直接预训练4D语义占用预测模型，在未见数据上实现67%的零样本性能，比基于资产的模拟器提升11%；当OccSim数据集扩展至5倍时，零样本性能提升至约74%，相比资产模拟器的提升扩大至22.1%。
AI.conclusion: OccSim突破了自动驾驶仿真对预录制日志和HD地图的依赖，实现了从单帧初始图像和未来自我动作生成3000+连续帧的大规模3D仿真。在下游任务中，使用OccSim数据预训练的4D语义占用预测模型在未见数据上实现了67%的零样本性能，比基于资产的模拟器提升11%；当数据集扩展5倍时，零样本性能提升至74%，相比基线扩大至22.1%。

title: Enhancing Policy Learning with World-Action Model
summary: This paper presents the World-Action Model (WAM), an action-regularized world model that jointly reasons over future visual observations and the actions that drive state transitions. Unlike conventional world models trained solely via image prediction, WAM incorporates an inverse dynamics objective into DreamerV2 that predicts actions from latent state transitions, encouraging the learned representations to capture action-relevant structure critical for downstream control. We evaluate WAM on enhancing policy learning across eight manipulation tasks from the CALVIN benchmark. We first pretrain a diffusion policy via behavioral cloning on world model latents, then refine it with model-based PPO inside the frozen world model. Without modifying the policy architecture or training procedure, WAM improves average behavioral cloning success from 59.4% to 71.2% over DreamerV2 and DiWA baselines. After PPO fine-tuning, WAM achieves 92.8% average success versus 79.8% for the baseline, with two tasks reaching 100%, using 8.7x fewer training steps.

AI.tldr: World-Action Model (WAM) adds inverse dynamics objective to DreamerV2 to predict actions from latent state transitions, improving representation quality for control. On 8 CALVIN manipulation tasks, WAM achieves 92.8% success after PPO vs 79.8% baseline, with 8.7x fewer training steps.
AI.motivation: conventional world models are trained solely via image prediction, which may not capture action-relevant structure critical for downstream control tasks
AI.method: WAM incorporates an inverse dynamics objective into DreamerV2, predicting actions from latent state transitions to encourage representations that capture action-relevant structure
AI.result: BC success improved from 59.4% to 71.2%; after PPO fine-tuning, WAM achieves 92.8% vs 79.8% baseline, with two tasks reaching 100%, using 8.7x fewer training steps
AI.conclusion: WAM effectively enhances policy learning by integrating action prediction into world model training, significantly improving success rates and sample efficiency on manipulation tasks

title: Drop the Hierarchy and Roles: How Self-Organizing LLM Agents Outperform Designed Structures
comment: 6 figures, 9 tables. Submitted to IEEE Access
summary: How much autonomy can multi-agent LLM systems sustain -- and what enables it? We present a 25,000-task computational experiment spanning 8 models, 4--256 agents, and 8 coordination protocols ranging from externally imposed hierarchy to emergent self-organization. We observe that autonomous behavior already emerges in current LLM agents: given minimal structural scaffolding (fixed ordering), agents spontaneously invent specialized roles, voluntarily abstain from tasks outside their competence, and form shallow hierarchies -- without any pre-assigned roles or external design. A hybrid protocol (Sequential) that enables this autonomy outperforms centralized coordination by 14% (p<0.001), with a 44% quality spread between protocols (Cohen's d=1.86, p<0.0001). The degree of emergent autonomy scales with model capability: strong models self-organize effectively, while models below a capability threshold still benefit from rigid structure -- suggesting that as foundation models improve, the scope for autonomous coordination will expand. The system scales sub-linearly to 256 agents without quality degradation (p=0.61), producing 5,006 unique roles from just 8 agents. Results replicate across closed- and open-source models, with open-source achieving 95% of closed-source quality at 24x lower cost. The practical implication: give agents a mission, a protocol, and a capable model -- not a pre-assigned role.

AI.tldr: 研究通过25,000任务实验探讨多智能体LLM系统的自主协调能力，发现无需预设角色，智能体可自发形成专业化分工、层级结构和任务拒绝行为。混合协调协议(Sequential)比集中式协调性能提升14%，在8-256智能体规模下保持稳定。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体系统依赖外部设计的角色分配和协调机制，文章试图探索：1)当前LLM智能体能否在没有预设角色的情况下自主协调；2)何种因素决定自主协调的有效性。
AI.method: 25,000任务计算实验，覆盖8个模型、4-256个智能体、8种协调协议（从外部强加层级到自发自组织）。
AI.result: 1)当前LLM智能体在最小结构支撑(固定顺序)下可自发发明专业化角色、主动拒绝超出能力任务、形成浅层层级；2)Sequential协议比集中式协调优14%(p<0.001)；3)协议间质量差异44%(Cohen's d=1.86, p<0.0001)；4)自主程度随模型能力提升而增强，弱模型仍需刚性结构；5)系统可扩展至256智能体且无质量下降；6)开源模型达到闭源模型95%质量，成本仅为1/24。
AI.conclusion: 智能体自主协调能力随基础模型能力提升而扩展。建议给予智能体使命和协议，而非预设角色。

title: Stepper: Stepwise Immersive Scene Generation with Multiview Panoramas
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 Findings; Find our project page under https://fwmb.github.io/stepper/
summary: The synthesis of immersive 3D scenes from text is rapidly maturing, driven by novel video generative models and feed-forward 3D reconstruction, with vast potential in AR/VR and world modeling. While panoramic images have proven effective for scene initialization, existing approaches suffer from a trade-off between visual fidelity and explorability: autoregressive expansion suffers from context drift, while panoramic video generation is limited to low resolution. We present Stepper, a unified framework for text-driven immersive 3D scene synthesis that circumvents these limitations via stepwise panoramic scene expansion. Stepper leverages a novel multi-view 360° diffusion model that enables consistent, high-resolution expansion, coupled with a geometry reconstruction pipeline that enforces geometric coherence. Trained on a new large-scale, multi-view panorama dataset, Stepper achieves state-of-the-art fidelity and structural consistency, outperforming prior approaches, thereby setting a new standard for immersive scene generation.

AI.tldr: Stepper是一个统一的文本驱动沉浸式3D场景合成框架，通过逐步全景场景扩展方法，结合多视角360°扩散模型和几何重建pipeline，解决了现有方法在视觉质量与场景可扩展性之间的权衡问题，在大规模数据集上训练后实现了最先进的场景生成质量。
AI.motivation: 沉浸式3D场景的文本合成技术快速发展，在AR/VR和世界建模中有广阔应用前景。然而现有方法在视觉保真度和可探索性之间存在权衡：自回归扩展存在上下文漂移问题，而全景视频生成受限于低分辨率。
AI.method: Stepper采用逐步全景场景扩展框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 新型多视角360°扩散模型，实现一致的高分辨率扩展；2) 几何重建pipeline，确保几何一致性。该模型在大规模多视角全景数据集上训练。
AI.result: Stepper在保真度和结构一致性方面超越了先前方法，达到了最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Stepper为沉浸式场景生成设定了新的标准，在视觉保真度和结构一致性方面都达到了最优表现。

title: Emergence WebVoyager: Toward Consistent and Transparent Evaluation of (Web) Agents in The Wild
summary: Reliable evaluation of AI agents operating in complex, real-world environments requires methodologies that are robust, transparent, and contextually aligned with the tasks agents are intended to perform. This study identifies persistent shortcomings in existing AI agent evaluation practices that are particularly acute in web agent evaluation, as exemplified by our audit of WebVoyager, including task-framing ambiguity and operational variability that hinder meaningful and reproducible performance comparisons. To address these challenges, we introduce Emergence WebVoyager, an enhanced version of the WebVoyager benchmark that standardizes evaluation methodology through clear guidelines for task instantiation, failure handling, annotation, and reporting. Emergence WebVoyager achieves an inter-annotator agreement of 95.9\%, indicating improved clarity and reliability in both task formulation and evaluation. Applying this framework to evaluate OpenAI Operator reveals substantial performance variation across domains and task types, with an overall success rate of 68.6\%, substantially lower than the 87\% previously reported by OpenAI, demonstrating the utility of our approach for more rigorous and comparable web agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对WebVoyager基准测试存在评估方法模糊的问题，提出了Emergence WebVoyager标准化评估框架，并将OpenAI Operator的评估结果从87%修正为68.6%，揭示了现有AI agent评估中任务定义模糊和操作变异性的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前AI agent评估方法存在任务框架模糊、操作变异性高、缺乏标准化等问题，导致评估结果不可靠且难以复现，特别是在web agent评估领域这些问题尤为突出。
AI.method: 提出Emergence WebVoyager增强版基准测试，建立明确的任务实例化、失败处理、标注和报告规范，并采用多 annotator 一致性检验来验证评估框架的可靠性。
AI.result: 该框架实现95.9%的标注者间一致性；应用该框架评估OpenAI Operator显示其总体成功率为68.6%，显著低于OpenAI此前报告的87%。
AI.conclusion: 标准化评估方法对于准确评估AI agent性能至关重要，Emergence WebVoyager提供了更严格、可比的评估范式，当前AI agent的实际性能可能被高估。

title: Hybrid Quantum-Classical AI for Industrial Defect Classification in Welding Images
summary: Hybrid quantum-classical machine learning offers a promising direction for advancing automated quality control in industrial settings. In this study, we investigate two hybrid quantum-classical approaches for classifying defects in aluminium TIG welding images and benchmarking their performance against a conventional deep learning model. A convolutional neural network is used to extract compact and informative feature vectors from weld images, effectively reducing the higher-dimensional pixel space to a lower-dimensional feature space. Our first quantum approach encodes these features into quantum states using a parameterized quantum feature map composed of rotation and entangling gates. We compute a quantum kernel matrix from the inner products of these states, defining a linear system in a higher-dimensional Hilbert space corresponding to the support vector machine (SVM) optimization problem and solving it using a Variational Quantum Linear Solver (VQLS). We also examine the effect of the quantum kernel condition number on classification performance. In our second method, we apply angle encoding to the extracted features in a variational quantum circuit and use a classical optimizer for model training. Both quantum models are tested on binary and multiclass classification tasks and the performance is compared with the classical CNN model. Our results show that while the CNN model demonstrates robust performance, hybrid quantum-classical models perform competitively. This highlights the potential of hybrid quantum-classical approaches for near-term real-world applications in industrial defect detection and quality assurance.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索混合量子-经典机器学习在铝TIG焊接图像缺陷分类中的应用，比较两种量子方法与CNN模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 混合量子-经典机器学习为工业自动化质量控制提供了有前景的发展方向，需要研究其在实际工业缺陷检测中的可行性。
AI.method: 1) 使用CNN提取图像特征向量；2) 第一种量子方法：使用参数化量子特征映射（旋转门和纠缠门）编码特征，计算量子核矩阵，通过VQLS求解SVM优化问题；3) 第二种量子方法：使用角度编码结合变分量子电路和经典优化器；在二元和多元分类任务上测试并比较性能。
AI.result: CNN模型表现出稳健性能，混合量子-经典模型也具有竞争力的表现，量子核条件数影响分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子-经典方法在工业缺陷检测和质量保证方面具有实际应用的潜力，特别适合近期的实际应用场景。

title: The Future of AI is Many, Not One
summary: The way we're thinking about generative AI right now is fundamentally individual. We see this not just in how users interact with models but also in how models are built, how they're benchmarked, and how commercial and research strategies using AI are defined. We argue that we should abandon this approach if we're hoping for AI to support groundbreaking innovation and scientific discovery. Drawing on research and formal results in complex systems, organizational behavior, and philosophy of science, we show why we should expect deep intellectual breakthroughs to come from epistemically diverse groups of AI agents working together rather than singular superintelligent agents. Having a diverse team broadens the search for solutions, delays premature consensus, and allows for the pursuit of unconventional approaches. Developing diverse AI teams also addresses AI critics' concerns that current models are constrained by past data and lack the creative insight required for innovation. The upshot, we argue, is that the future of transformative transformer-based AI is fundamentally many, not one.

AI.tldr: 论文认为当前对生成式AI的思考方式是个体化的，但从复杂系统、组织行为和科学哲学的研究表明，深刻的 intellectual breakthroughs 应来自多样化的AI智能体团队，而非单个超级智能体。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究和开发采用个体化思维模式——从用户交互、模型构建到商业策略都以此为基础，但这种模式可能阻碍突破性创新和科学发现。
AI.method: 综合引用复杂系统、组织行为和科学哲学领域的研究和形式化结果进行论证。
AI.result: 多样化AI团队能够：1) 扩大解决方案搜索范围；2) 延缓过早共识；3) 追求非常规方法。同时解决AI批评者对模型受限于过去数据、缺乏创新洞见的担忧。
AI.conclusion: transformative transformer-based AI的未来本质上是"多元"而非"单元"，建议放弃个体化AI思维，转向构建多样化的AI智能体团队。

title: GenFusion: Feed-forward Human Performance Capture via Progressive Canonical Space Updates
summary: We present a feed-forward human performance capture method that renders novel views of a performer from a monocular RGB stream. A key challenge in this setting is the lack of sufficient observations, especially for unseen regions. Assuming the subject moves continuously over time, we take advantage of the fact that more body parts become observable by maintaining a canonical space that is progressively updated with each incoming frame. This canonical space accumulates appearance information over time and serves as a context bank when direct observations are missing in the current live frame. To effectively utilize this context while respecting the deformation of the live state, we formulate the rendering process as probabilistic regression. This resolves conflicts between past and current observations, producing sharper reconstructions than deterministic regression approaches. Furthermore, it enables plausible synthesis even in regions with no prior observations. Experiments on in-domain (4D-Dress) and out-of-distribution (MVHumanNet) datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种前馈人类动作捕捉方法，可以从单目RGB流中渲染出演者的新视角。
AI.motivation: 该方法旨在解决单目视角下观测不足的问题，尤其是对于不可见区域。假设表演者连续运动，通过维护一个逐步更新的规范空间来积累外观信息，以应对直接观测缺失的挑战。
AI.method: 维护一个随每帧更新的规范空间作为上下文库，用于当前帧缺少直接观测的区域。将渲染过程表述为概率回归，以有效利用上下文同时尊重实时状态的变形。
AI.result: 在域内数据集(4D-Dress)和分布外数据集(MVHumanNet)上的实验表明，该方法能产生比确定性回归方法更清晰的重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 该概率回归方法解决了过去与当前观测之间的冲突，能够在没有任何先验观测的区域进行合理的合成，展现出良好的泛化能力。

title: PAR$^2$-RAG: Planned Active Retrieval and Reasoning for Multi-Hop Question Answering
summary: Large language models (LLMs) remain brittle on multi-hop question answering (MHQA), where answering requires combining evidence across documents through retrieval and reasoning. Iterative retrieval systems can fail by locking onto an early low-recall trajectory and amplifying downstream errors, while planning-only approaches may produce static query sets that cannot adapt when intermediate evidence changes. We propose \textbf{Planned Active Retrieval and Reasoning RAG (PAR$^2$-RAG)}, a two-stage framework that separates \emph{coverage} from \emph{commitment}. PAR$^2$-RAG first performs breadth-first anchoring to build a high-recall evidence frontier, then applies depth-first refinement with evidence sufficiency control in an iterative loop. Across four MHQA benchmarks, PAR$^2$-RAG consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art baselines, compared with IRCoT, PAR$^2$-RAG achieves up to \textbf{23.5\%} higher accuracy, with retrieval gains of up to \textbf{10.5\%} in NDCG.

AI.tldr: PAR²-RAG是一种用于多跳问答的两阶段RAG框架，通过将"覆盖"与"承诺"分离来解决现有迭代检索系统的问题。第一阶段进行广度优先锚定构建高召回证据前沿，第二阶段进行深度优先 refinement并通过证据充分性控制进行迭代 refinement。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多跳问答任务中仍然脆弱，需要跨文档组合证据进行检索和推理。现有的迭代检索系统可能锁定低召回轨迹并放大下游错误，而仅规划方法产生静态查询集无法适应中间证据变化。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架PAR²-RAG：1) 广度优先锚定阶段：构建高召回证据前沿；2) 深度优先 refinement阶段：在迭代循环中应用证据充分性控制进行 refinement。
AI.result: 在四个多跳问答基准上，PAR²-RAG始终优于现有先进基线。与IRCoT相比，准确率最高提升23.5%，检索NDCG提升最高10.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功地将覆盖与承诺解耦，通过两阶段策略有效避免了早期低召回轨迹锁定问题，在多跳问答任务上取得了显著的性能提升。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. Even though both involve LLMs, the purposes are entirely different - this paper focuses on text-based QA retrieval, not video/motion generation or visual quality control. The methods (RAG for QA) have no relevance to the pain points about video-to-motion domain gap, VLM for quality supervision, or video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance.

title: MEDiC: Multi-objective Exploration of Distillation from CLIP
summary: Masked image modeling (MIM) methods typically operate in either raw pixel space (reconstructing masked patches) or latent feature space (aligning with a pre-trained teacher). We present MEDiC (Multi-objective Exploration of Distillation from CLIP), a framework that combines both spaces in a single pipeline through three complementary objectives: patch-level token distillation from a frozen CLIP encoder, global CLS alignment, and pixel reconstruction via a lightweight decoder. We conduct a systematic investigation of the design space surrounding this multi-objective framework. First, we show that all three objectives provide complementary information, with the full combination reaching 73.9% kNN accuracy on ImageNet-1K. Second, we introduce hierarchical clustering with relative position bias for evolved masking and find that, despite producing more semantically coherent masks than prior methods, evolved masking does not outperform simple block masking in the teacher-guided distillation setting, a finding we attribute to the teacher's inherent semantic awareness. Third, we reveal that optimal scalar loss weights are extremely fragile, with small perturbations causing drops of up to 17 percentage points in kNN accuracy. Our framework achieves 73.9% kNN and 85.1% fine-tuning accuracy with ViT-Base at 300 epochs.

AI.tldr: MEDiC是一种结合像素空间和潜在特征空间的多目标掩码图像建模框架，通过三个互补目标实现：patch级token蒸馏、全局CLS对齐和像素重建。使用ViT-Base在300个epoch后达到73.9% kNN准确率和85.1%微调准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码图像建模方法通常只在原始像素空间（重建掩码patch）或潜在特征空间（与预训练teacher对齐）中运行，缺乏同时利用两种空间的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出MEDiC框架，包含三个互补目标：1) 从冻结CLIP编码器进行patch级token蒸馏；2) 全局CLS对齐；3) 通过轻量级解码器进行像素重建。同时引入带有相对位置偏差的层次聚类进行进化掩码策略。
AI.result: 1) 三个目标提供互补信息，完整组合在ImageNet-1K上达到73.9% kNN准确率；2) 进化掩码虽产生更语义一致的掩码，但在teacher引导蒸馏设置下不如简单block掩码；3) 最优标量损失权重极其脆弱，小扰动可导致高达17个百分点的kNN准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: MEDiC框架成功结合了像素空间和特征空间的双重目标，在ViT-Base上实现了73.9% kNN和85.1%微调准确率。研究还发现teacher的语义感知能力会削弱进化掩码的优势，且损失权重设置高度敏感需要精细调整。

relevance_reason: This paper is about masked image modeling and CLIP distillation for image classification (ImageNet), which is computer vision/self-supervised learning - NOT computer graphics or video generation. While it touches on feature extraction and knowledge distillation, the application domain is completely different. It doesn't address any of the pain points: video generation quality control (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods are also different - it's about training image classifiers via distillation, not video generation or 3D motion generation.

title: GISTBench: Evaluating LLM User Understanding via Evidence-Based Interest Verification
summary: We introduce GISTBench, a benchmark for evaluating Large Language Models' (LLMs) ability to understand users from their interaction histories in recommendation systems. Unlike traditional RecSys benchmarks that focus on item prediction accuracy, our benchmark evaluates how well LLMs can extract and verify user interests from engagement data. We propose two novel metric families: Interest Groundedness (IG), decomposed into precision and recall components to separately penalize hallucinated interest categories and reward coverage, and Interest Specificity (IS), which assesses the distinctiveness of verified LLM-predicted user profiles. We release a synthetic dataset constructed on real user interactions on a global short-form video platform. Our dataset contains both implicit and explicit engagement signals and rich textual descriptions. We validate our dataset fidelity against user surveys, and evaluate eight open-weight LLMs spanning 7B to 120B parameters. Our findings reveal performance bottlenecks in current LLMs, particularly their limited ability to accurately count and attribute engagement signals across heterogeneous interaction types.

AI.tldr: GISTBench是一个评估LLM从推荐系统交互历史中理解用户兴趣能力的基准测试，提出兴趣 groundedness 和兴趣特异性两个新指标家族，并在8个LLM上发现其在处理异构用户信号时的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统基准仅关注物品预测准确性，缺乏对LLM从用户交互历史中提取和验证用户兴趣能力的评估。
AI.method: 构建基于真实用户交互的合成数据集，包含隐式和显式信号及丰富文本描述；提出两个指标家族：兴趣 groundedness（分解为精确率和召回率惩罚幻觉类别并奖励覆盖率）和兴趣特异性（评估验证后用户画像的独特性）；对8个7B到120B参数的开放权重LLM进行评估。
AI.result: 实验揭示了当前LLM的性能瓶颈，特别是其在异构交互类型中准确计数和归因用户兴趣信号的能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在从异构交互类型中准确计数和归因用户兴趣信号方面存在明显瓶颈，未来研究需提升LLM对用户行为信号的精确理解能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating LLMs' ability to understand user interests in recommendation systems (GISTBench benchmark). It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for video quality supervision, 3D motion generation, or feature extraction from 2D video. The application domain is completely different - it's about recommendation systems and user interest modeling, not computer graphics or video/motion generation.

title: UltraG-Ray: Physics-Based Gaussian Ray Casting for Novel Ultrasound View Synthesis
comment: Accepted at MIDL 2026 / to appear in PMLR
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) in ultrasound has gained attention as a technique for generating anatomically plausible views beyond the acquired frames, offering new capabilities for training clinicians or data augmentation. However, current methods struggle with complex tissue and view-dependent acoustic effects. Physics-based NVS aims to address these limitations by including the ultrasound image formation process into the simulation. Recent approaches combine a learnable implicit scene representation with an ultrasound-specific rendering module, yet a substantial gap between simulation and reality remains. In this work, we introduce UltraG-Ray, a novel ultrasound scene representation based on a learnable 3D Gaussian field, coupled to an efficient physics-based module for B-mode synthesis. We explicitly encode ultrasound-specific parameters, such as attenuation and reflection, into a Gaussian-based spatial representation and realize image synthesis within a novel ray casting scheme. In contrast to previous methods, this approach naturally captures view-dependent attenuation effects, thereby enabling the generation of physically informed B-mode images with increased realism. We compare our method to state-of-the-art and observe consistent gains in image quality metrics (up to 15% increase on MS-SSIM), demonstrating clear improvement in terms of realism of the synthesized ultrasound images.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UltraG-Ray，一种基于可学习3D高斯场的超声场景表示方法，结合物理基础的B型超声合成模块，用于解决超声新视角合成中复杂组织纹理和视角依赖性声学效果的挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前超声新视角合成方法在处理复杂组织纹理和视角依赖性声学效果方面存在困难，现有的可学习隐式场景表示与超声专用渲染模块的组合方法在仿真与真实数据之间仍存在显著差距。
AI.method: 提出UltraG-Ray方法：1) 基于可学习3D高斯场的场景表示；2) 将超声特定参数（衰减、反射）显式编码到高斯空间表示中；3) 在新型光线投射方案中进行图像合成，自然捕捉视角依赖的衰减效应。
AI.result: 与现有方法相比，在图像质量指标上获得一致提升，MS-SSIM指标提升高达15%，合成超声图像的真实性有明显改善。
AI.conclusion: UltraG-Ray通过物理信息驱动的B型超声图像合成方法，有效提升了新视角合成的真实感，为超声图像仿真训练和数据增强提供了更可靠的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The paper is about medical ultrasound imaging (novel ultrasound view synthesis), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focusing on video generation, 3D motion generation, and quality control for video models (Wanxiang/Seedance). Although both may use similar techniques like 3D Gaussian fields, the application domains are entirely different - medical imaging vs. general video/motion generation. This is like evaluating diffusion models for image generation when the profile needs diffusion for human motion generation - the methods may be similar but the domains are completely unrelated.

title: REFINE: Real-world Exploration of Interactive Feedback and Student Behaviour
summary: Formative feedback is central to effective learning, yet providing timely, individualised feedback at scale remains a persistent challenge. While recent work has explored the use of large language models (LLMs) to automate feedback, most existing systems still conceptualise feedback as a static, one-way artifact, offering limited support for interpretation, clarification, or follow-up. In this work, we introduce REFINE, a locally deployable, multi-agent feedback system built on small, open-source LLMs that treats feedback as an interactive process. REFINE combines a pedagogically-grounded feedback generation agent with an LLM-as-a-judge-guided regeneration loop using a human-aligned judge, and a self-reflective tool-calling interactive agent that supports student follow-up questions with context-aware, actionable responses. We evaluate REFINE through controlled experiments and an authentic classroom deployment in an undergraduate computer science course. Automatic evaluations show that judge-guided regeneration significantly improves feedback quality, and that the interactive agent produces efficient, high-quality responses comparable to a state-of-the-art closed-source model. Analysis of real student interactions further reveals distinct engagement patterns and indicates that system-generated feedback systematically steers subsequent student inquiry. Our findings demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of multi-agent, tool-augmented feedback systems for scalable, interactive feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了REFINE，一个基于小型开源LLMs的多智能体反馈系统，将反馈从静态产物转变为交互式过程。系统包含反馈生成智能体、评判引导的再生循环和交互智能体。实验表明该系统能显著提高反馈质量，支持学生后续问题，交互效果与闭源模型相当。
AI.motivation: Formative feedback对有效学习至关重要，但在规模上提供及时、个性化的反馈仍然是一个持久挑战。虽然近期工作探索了使用大型语言模型（LLMs）来自动化反馈，但大多数现有系统仍将反馈视为静态的、单向的产物，对解释、澄清或后续跟进的支持有限。
AI.method: 本文介绍了REFINE，一个基于小型开源LLMs的本地可部署多智能体反馈系统，将反馈视为交互式过程。REFINE结合了一个基于教学法的反馈生成智能体、一个使用人类对齐评判者的LLM评判引导的再生循环，以及一个自我反思的工具调用交互智能体，支持学生带有上下文感知、可操作响应的后续问题。
AI.result: 自动评估显示评判引导的再生显著提高了反馈质量，交互智能体产生了与最先进的闭源模型相当的高效、高质量响应。对真实学生互动的分析进一步揭示了不同的参与模式，并表明系统生成的反馈系统性地引导了后续的学生探究。
AI.conclusion: 我们的发现证明了多智能体、工具增强的反馈系统在可扩展、交互式反馈方面的可行性和有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using multi-agent LLM systems for educational feedback in learning contexts. It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically: video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, VLM-based quality control, and feature extraction from 2D video for motion generation. The application domains are completely different - education/learning systems vs. computer graphics/video motion generation.

title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Noise Pretraining for Implicit Neural Representations
summary: The approximation and convergence properties of implicit neural representations (INRs) are known to be highly sensitive to parameter initialization strategies. While several data-driven initialization methods demonstrate significant improvements over standard random sampling, the reasons for their success -- specifically, whether they encode classical statistical signal priors or more complex features -- remain poorly understood. In this study, we explore this phenomenon through a series of experimental analyses leveraging noise pretraining. We pretrain INRs on diverse noise classes (e.g., Gaussian, Dead Leaves, Spectral) and measure their ability to both fit unseen signals and encode priors for an inverse imaging task (denoising). Our analyses on image and video data reveal a surprising finding: simply pretraining on unstructured noise (Uniform, Gaussian) dramatically improves signal fitting capacity compared to all other baselines. However, unstructured noise also yields poor deep image priors for denoising. In contrast, we also find that noise with the classic $1/|f^α|$ spectral structure of natural images achieves an excellent balance of signal fitting and inverse imaging capabilities, performing on par with the best data-driven initialization methods. This finding enables more efficient INR training in applications lacking sufficient prior domain-specific data. For more details, visit project page at https://kushalvyas.github.io/noisepretraining.html

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了隐式神经表示（INRs）中参数初始化策略的原理，通过对多种噪声进行预训练实验，发现具有经典1/|f^α|谱结构的噪声在信号拟合和逆成像任务上表现出色，与最佳数据驱动初始化方法相当。
AI.motivation: INRs的近似和收敛特性高度敏感于参数初始化策略，现有数据驱动初始化方法虽效果显著，但对其成功原因缺乏深入理解——即它们是否编码了经典统计信号先验或更复杂的特征。
AI.method: 在图像和视频数据上，对不同噪声类别（高斯、死叶谱、频谱等）进行预训练，测量INRs拟合未见信号和编码逆成像任务（去噪）先验的能力。
AI.result: 惊人发现：简单地对非结构化噪声（均匀、高斯）进行预训练即可显著提升信号拟合能力，但产生的深度图像先验去噪效果较差；而具有自然图像经典1/|f^α|谱结构的噪声在信号拟合和逆成像能力间取得最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 具有1/|f^α|谱结构的噪声可作为有效的INRs初始化方法，性能与最佳数据驱动初始化方法相当，为缺乏足够领域特定数据的应用提供了更高效的INRs训练方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) and noise pretraining strategies for signal fitting/inverse imaging tasks. While it uses some similar concepts (neural representations), the application domain is completely different from the research profile. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, and 3D motion generation - all within computer graphics. This paper addresses general signal processing/inverse problems (denoising, signal fitting) rather than video generation or motion generation. It does not address any of the stated pain points (visual guidance feature extraction, quality control, VLM accuracy, or 2D-to-3D domain gap).

title: Generating Humanless Environment Walkthroughs from Egocentric Walking Tour Videos
summary: Egocentric "walking tour" videos provide a rich source of image data to develop rich and diverse visual models of environments around the world. However, the significant presence of humans in frames of these videos due to crowds and eye-level camera perspectives mitigates their usefulness in environment modeling applications. We focus on addressing this challenge by developing a generative algorithm that can realistically remove (i.e., inpaint) humans and their associated shadow effects from walking tour videos. Key to our approach is the construction of a rich semi-synthetic dataset of video clip pairs to train this generative model. Each pair in the dataset consists of an environment-only background clip, and a composite clip of walking humans with simulated shadows overlaid on the background. We randomly sourced both foreground and background components from real egocentric walking tour videos around the world to maintain visual diversity. We then used this dataset to fine-tune the state-of-the-art Casper video diffusion model for object and effects inpainting, and demonstrate that the resulting model performs far better than Casper both qualitatively and quantitatively at removing humans from walking tour clips with significant human presence and complex backgrounds. Finally, we show that the resulting generated clips can be used to build successful 3D/4D models of urban locations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频扩散模型的方法，用于去除自我中心视角"步行tour"视频中的人类及其阴影，以支持环境建模应用。
AI.motivation: 自我中心步行tour视频是构建全球环境视觉模型的宝贵数据源，但视频中大量存在的行人和视角导致的密集人群使得这些视频难以直接用于环境建模。去除人类及其阴影对于后续的3D/4D城市建模至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了一个丰富的半合成视频数据集：每对数据包含纯背景视频和叠加了行走人物及模拟阴影的合成视频。背景和前景均来自全球真实的自我中心步行tour视频以保持视觉多样性。然后利用该数据集对Casper视频扩散模型进行微调，用于目标及效果修复。
AI.result: 微调后的模型在去除高人群密度和复杂背景的步行tour视频中的人类方面，无论定性还是定量评估均显著优于原始Casper模型。生成的视频片段可成功用于构建城市场所的3D/4D模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过半合成数据微调视频扩散模型可有效解决自我中心视频中的人类移除问题，为城市环境建模提供了高质量的训练数据，未来可进一步拓展到其他类型的视频修复任务。

relevance_reason: While this paper is in Computer Graphics, its application domain is fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on human motion generation and bridging 2D video to 3D human motion, while this paper focuses on removing humans from egocentric videos for 3D/4D CITY/ENVIRONMENT modeling (not human motion). The methods differ: profile mentions Wanxiang/Seedance (human motion/video generation) while paper uses Casper (inpainting). Although both use video diffusion models, they address completely different problems - this is like evaluating "diffusion for image generation" vs "diffusion for human motion generation" as noted in the criteria.

title: SimMOF: AI agent for Automated MOF Simulations
summary: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) offer a vast design space, and as such, computational simulations play a critical role in predicting their structural and physicochemical properties. However, MOF simulations remain difficult to access because reliable analysis require expert decisions for workflow construction, parameter selection, tool interoperability, and the preparation of computational ready structures. Here, we introduce SimMOF, a large language model based multi agent framework that automates end-to-end MOF simulation workflows from natural language queries. SimMOF translates user requests into dependency aware plans, generates runnable inputs, orchestrates multiple agents to execute simulations, and summarizes results with analysis aligned to the user query. Through representative case studies, we show that SimMOF enables adaptive and cognitively autonomous workflows that reflect the iterative and decision driven behavior of human researchers and as such provides a scalable foundation for data driven MOF research.

AI.tldr: SimMOF是一个基于大型语言模型的多智能体框架，可自动化端到端的MOF（金属有机框架）模拟工作流程，从自然语言查询开始。
AI.motivation: MOF模拟难以获取，因为可靠的分析需要专家决策，包括工作流构建、参数选择、工具互操作性和计算就绪结构的准备。
AI.method: SimMOF将用户请求翻译成依赖感知的计划，生成可运行的输入，编排多个智能体执行模拟，并用与用户查询相关的分析总结结果。
AI.result: 通过代表性案例研究表明，SimMOF能够实现适应性和认知自主的工作流程，反映了人类研究人员的迭代和决策驱动行为。
AI.conclusion: SimMOF为数据驱动的MOF研究提供了可扩展的基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about automating MOF (Metal-Organic Framework) simulations in computational chemistry, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics field. The research profile focuses on video generation, 3D motion generation, VLM for visual quality supervision, and feature extraction from video - while SimMOF deals with chemistry simulations using LLM agents. There is no application domain match whatsoever - these are entirely different scientific domains.

title: Let the Abyss Stare Back Adaptive Falsification for Autonomous Scientific Discovery
summary: Autonomous scientific discovery is entering a more dangerous regime: once the evaluator is frozen, a sufficiently strong search process can learn to win the exam without learning the mechanism the task was meant to reveal. This is the idea behind our title. To let the abyss stare back is to make evaluation actively push against the candidate through adaptive falsification, rather than passively certify it through static validation. We introduce DASES, a falsification-driven framework in which an Innovator, an Abyss Falsifier, and a Mechanistic Causal Extractor co-evolve executable scientific artifacts and scientifically admissible counterexample environments under a fixed scientific contract. In a controlled loss-discovery problem with a single editable locus, DASES rejects artifacts that static validation would have accepted, identifies the first candidate that survives the admissible falsification frontier, and discovers FNG-CE, a loss that transfers beyond the synthetic discovery environment and consistently outperforms CE and CE+L2 under controlled comparisons across standard benchmarks, including ImageNet.

AI.tldr: DASES框架通过引入主动的"深渊 falsifier"机制来解决自主科学发现中的评估器被冻结问题，防止搜索过程仅通过学会通过考试而不学习任务机制。该框架共同演化可执行的科学工件和科学可接受的反例环境，并成功发现了一种可转移的FNG-CE损失，在ImageNet等标准基准测试中优于CE和CE+L2。
AI.motivation: 自主科学发现进入更危险 regime：当评估器冻结后，充分强大的搜索过程可以学会通过考试而不学习任务揭示的机制，即"让深渊凝视回来"——使评估主动通过适应性 falsification 拒绝候选，而不是被动通过静态验证认证。
AI.method: 引入DASES框架，包含三个协同演化的组件：1) Innovator（创新者）生成可执行的科学工件；2) Abyss Falsifier（深渊 falsifier）构建科学可接受的反例环境；3) Mechanistic Causal Extractor（机制因果提取器）在固定科学契约下提取因果机制。
AI.result: 在单一可编辑位点的受控损失发现问题中：1) DASES拒绝静态验证会接受的工件；2) 识别首个在可接受的falsification前沿中幸存的候选者；3) 发现FNG-CE损失，该损失可转移到合成发现环境之外，并在包括ImageNet在内的标准基准测试中一致优于CE和CE+L2。
AI.conclusion: DASES框架通过适应性falsification机制有效解决了静态验证的局限性，能够识别真正具有泛化能力的科学发现。FNG-CE的成功证明了该框架在发现可转移知识方面的有效性，为自主科学发现提供了一种更安全的评估范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses autonomous scientific discovery and loss function optimization (for ImageNet classification), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, or VLM-based quality control. The application domain is Machine Learning optimization rather than computer graphics or video motion generation. Even though both fields may use neural networks, the target applications are entirely different.

title: LA-Sign: Looped Transformers with Geometry-aware Alignment for Skeleton-based Sign Language Recognition
summary: Skeleton-based isolated sign language recognition (ISLR) demands fine-grained understanding of articulated motion across multiple spatial scales, from subtle finger movements to global body dynamics. Existing approaches typically rely on deep feed-forward architectures, which increase model capacity but lack mechanisms for recurrent refinement and structured representation. We propose LA-Sign, a looped transformer framework with geometry-aware alignment for ISLR. Instead of stacking deeper layers, LA-Sign derives its depth from recurrence, repeatedly revisiting latent representations to progressively refine motion understanding under shared parameters. To further regularise this refinement process, we present a geometry-aware contrastive objective that projects skeletal and textual features into an adaptive hyperbolic space, encouraging multi-scale semantic organisation. We study three looping designs and multiple geometric manifolds, demonstrating that encoder-decoder looping combined with adaptive Poincare alignment yields the strongest performance. Extensive experiments on WLASL and MSASL benchmarks show that LA-Sign achieves state-of-the-art results while using fewer unique layers, highlighting the effectiveness of recurrent latent refinement and geometry-aware representation learning for sign language recognition.

AI.tldr: LA-Sign是一种用于孤立手语识别（ISLR）的循环transformer框架，通过几何感知对齐在双曲空间中进行特征表示学习，在WLASL和MSASL上达到最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的手语识别方法主要依赖深度前馈架构，虽然增加了模型容量，但缺乏递归细化和结构化表示的机制。孤立手语识别需要对从细微手指动作到全局身体动作的多个空间尺度进行精细理解。
AI.method: 提出LA-Sign框架：1）使用循环transformer替代堆叠深层，通过递归重复访问潜在表示来逐步细化运动理解；2）提出几何感知对比目标，将骨骼和文本特征投影到自适应双曲空间，鼓励多尺度语义组织。研究了三种循环设计和多个几何流形。
AI.result: 在WLASL和MSASL基准测试中，LA-Sign实现了最先进的性能，encoder-decoder循环结合自适应Poincare对齐效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 递归潜在细化和几何感知表示学习对于手语识别是有效的，LA-Sign使用更少的独特层达到了最优性能，证明了循环机制和双曲空间表示的优越性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about skeleton-based sign language recognition, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile. The profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), quality control, VLM supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. While both deal with "skeleton" or "motion," this paper addresses sign language gesture recognition from skeleton data, not video generation or 3D motion generation for graphics. The methods (loop transformers, hyperbolic space) are also specific to recognition tasks, not generation or quality assessment. This is a computer vision/gesture recognition paper, not a computer graphics video generation paper.

title: AEC-Bench: A Multimodal Benchmark for Agentic Systems in Architecture, Engineering, and Construction
summary: The AEC-Bench is a multimodal benchmark for evaluating agentic systems on real-world tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) domain. The benchmark covers tasks requiring drawing understanding, cross-sheet reasoning, and construction project-level coordination. This report describes the benchmark motivation, dataset taxonomy, evaluation protocol, and baseline results across several domain-specific foundation model harnesses. We use AEC-Bench to identify consistent tools and harness design techniques that uniformly improve performance across foundation models in their own base harnesses, such as Claude Code and Codex. We openly release our benchmark dataset, agent harness, and evaluation code for full replicability at https://github.com/nomic-ai/aec-bench under an Apache 2 license.

AI.tldr: AEC-Bench是一个针对建筑、工程和施工(AEC)领域的Agent系统多模态 benchmark,涵盖绘图理解、跨表格推理和项目协调任务,用于评估Claude Code和Codex等基础模型的Agent能力,并开源了数据集和评估代码
AI.motivation: AEC领域缺乏针对Agent系统的真实世界任务评估基准,需要标准化benchmark来推动该领域Agent技术的发展
AI.method: 设计并构建了包含绘图理解、跨表格推理和项目级协调任务的 benchmark,测试了Claude Code和Codex等多个基础模型,并识别了可uniformly提升性能的工具和工具链设计技术
AI.result: 建立了包含多任务类型的AEC-Bench benchmark,测试了多个基础模型并验证了工具和工具链设计对性能的提升作用
AI.conclusion: AEC-Bench为AEC领域的Agent系统评估提供了标准化基准,开源了数据集、工具链和评估代码,有望推动该领域Agent技术的发展

relevance_reason: The paper is about Architecture/Engineering/Construction (AEC) domain benchmark for AI agents, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on video generation, 3D motion generation, and visual feature extraction. While both involve VLMs, they are in entirely different application domains - AEC/construction vs video/graphics generation. This paper addresses none of the pain points (video quality control, VLM for quality supervision, bridging 2D video to 3D motion).

title: Is the Modality Gap a Bug or a Feature? A Robustness Perspective
summary: Many modern multi-modal models (e.g. CLIP) seek an embedding space in which the two modalities are aligned. Somewhat surprisingly, almost all existing models show a strong modality gap: the distribution of images is well-separated from the distribution of texts in the shared embedding space. Despite a series of recent papers on this topic, it is still not clear why this gap exists nor whether closing the gap in post-processing will lead to better performance on downstream tasks. In this paper we show that under certain conditions, minimizing the contrastive loss yields a representation in which the two modalities are separated by a global gap vector that is orthogonal to their embeddings. We also show that under these conditions the modality gap is monotonically related to robustness: decreasing the gap does not change the clean accuracy of the models but makes it less likely that a model will change its output when the embeddings are perturbed. Our experiments show that for many real-world VLMs we can significantly increase robustness by a simple post-processing step that moves one modality towards the mean of the other modality, without any loss of clean accuracy.

AI.tldr: 现代多模态模型（如CLIP）在共享嵌入空间中显示 出图像和文本分布分离的"模态差距"现象。本文证明在某些条件下，最小化对比损失会使两模态被一个正交于嵌入的全局差距向量分隔，且模态差距与鲁棒性呈单调关系。实验表明，通过简单的后处理步骤将一个模态移向另一个模态的均值，可在不损失精度的前提下显著提高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现代多模态模型（如CLIP）追求将图像和文本对齐到同一嵌入空间，但几乎所有现有模型都表现出强烈的"模态差距"现象——图像和文本的分布在共享嵌入空间中被明显分离。尽管近期有多篇相关论文，但尚不清楚这种差距存在的原因，也不清楚在后处理中消除差距是否能在下游任务中获得更好的性能。
AI.method: 本文从理论角度分析，在某些条件下最小化对比损失会得到一种表示，其中两个模态被一个全局差距向量分隔，该向量正交于它们的嵌入。研究还表明模态差距与鲁棒性呈单调关系。实验采用简单的后处理方法：将一个模态向另一个模态的均值移动。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，最小化对比损失产生的表示中，两模态被正交于嵌入的全局差距向量分隔，且模态差距与鲁棒性呈单调关系。实验证明，对许多真实世界的视觉语言模型，可以通过简单的后处理步骤（将一个模态移向另一模态的均值）显著提高鲁棒性，且不损失任何干净准确率。
AI.conclusion: 模态差距是由对比学习目标函数的内在特性导致的，并非模型训练失败的表现。消除模态差距不会改善干净准确率，但能显著提升模型对嵌入扰动的鲁棒性。这一发现表明可以通过简单的后处理方法来提升多模态模型的鲁棒性，而无需重新训练模型。

relevance_reason: This paper studies the "modality gap" phenomenon in general multimodal models (like CLIP) from a theoretical robustness perspective. While it uses VLMs as a method, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about general vision-language model alignment and robustness, NOT about Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (video quality control, extracting visual guidance features, or domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion). It's a theoretical ML paper about contrastive learning, not a computer graphics paper.

title: WorldFlow3D: Flowing Through 3D Distributions for Unbounded World Generation
summary: Unbounded 3D world generation is emerging as a foundational task for scene modeling in computer vision, graphics, and robotics. In this work, we present WorldFlow3D, a novel method capable of generating unbounded 3D worlds. Building upon a foundational property of flow matching - namely, defining a path of transport between two data distributions - we model 3D generation more generally as a problem of flowing through 3D data distributions, not limited to conditional denoising. We find that our latent-free flow approach generates causal and accurate 3D structure, and can use this as an intermediate distribution to guide the generation of more complex structure and high-quality texture - all while converging more rapidly than existing methods. We enable controllability over generated scenes with vectorized scene layout conditions for geometric structure control and visual texture control through scene attributes. We confirm the effectiveness of WorldFlow3D on both real outdoor driving scenes and synthetic indoor scenes, validating cross-domain generalizability and high-quality generation on real data distributions. We confirm favorable scene generation fidelity over approaches in all tested settings for unbounded scene generation. For more, see https://light.princeton.edu/worldflow3d.

AI.tldr: WorldFlow3D是一种基于流匹配的新型无界3D世界生成方法，通过无潜在流方法生成准确的3D结构，并将其作为中间分布引导高质量纹理生成，支持场景布局和属性控制，在户外驾驶和室内场景上展现出优越的生成质量和更快的收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 无界3D世界生成正在成为计算机视觉、图形学和机器人领域的基础任务。现有的方法在生成无界场景时存在局限性，需要一种能够生成连续、准确且可控制的3D世界的方法。
AI.method: 提出WorldFlow3D，这是一种基于流匹配（flow matching）的新型无界3D世界生成方法。该方法将3D生成更一般地建模为通过3D数据分布流动的问题，不仅限于条件去噪。采用了无潜在（latent-free）的流方法生成因果性和准确的3D结构，并将其作为中间分布来引导更复杂结构和高质量纹理的生成。通过向量化场景布局条件实现几何结构控制，通过场景属性实现视觉纹理控制。
AI.result: 该方法在真实户外驾驶场景和合成室内场景上都取得了良好效果，验证了跨域泛化能力和真实数据分布的高质量生成。在所有测试的无界场景生成设置中都展现出优越的场景生成保真度，且收敛速度比现有方法更快。
AI.conclusion: WorldFlow3D在所有测试设置中都表现出优越的无界场景生成保真度，具有跨域泛化能力，能够在真实 outdoor driving scenes 和 synthetic indoor scenes 上生成高质量结果。该方法比现有方法收敛更快，能够通过场景布局条件控制几何结构，通过场景属性控制视觉纹理。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on 3D world/scene generation for unbounded environments (outdoor driving, indoor scenes), while the research profile is about 2D video generation quality control, VLM-based supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. These are different application domains: 3D scene generation vs video generation/quality monitoring. The methods also differ - the paper uses flow matching for 3D generation while the profile involves video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLMs, and cross-modal knowledge distillation. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points about feature extraction from video output or quality supervision of video generation models.

title: Xuanwu: Evolving General Multimodal Models into an Industrial-Grade Foundation for Content Ecosystems
summary: In recent years, multimodal large models have continued to improve on general benchmarks. However, in real-world content moderation and adversarial settings, mainstream models still suffer from degraded generalization and catastrophic forgetting because of limited fine-grained visual perception and insufficient modeling of long-tail noise. In this paper, we present Xuanwu VL-2B as a case study of how general multimodal models can be developed into an industrial-grade foundation model for content ecosystems. The model adopts a compact InternViT-300M + MLP + Qwen3 1.7B architecture, balancing fine-grained visual perception, language-semantic alignment, and deployment cost within an approximately 2B-parameter budget. To balance business specialization with the retention of general capabilities, we developed a data iteration and curation mechanism and trained the model through a progressive three-stage pipeline: pre-training, mid-training, and post-training. Ablation studies and offline business evaluations show that Xuanwu VL-2B achieves an average score of 67.90 across seven OpenCompass multimodal metrics (vs. 64.27 for InternVL 3.5 2B), an average recall of 94.38% over seven independent business moderation tasks, and a weighted overall recall of 82.82% on policy-violating text in challenging adversarial OCR scenarios, outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro (76.72%). These results show that, under a limited parameter budget, Xuanwu VL-2B achieves a practical balance among business alignment, visual perception, general capability retention, and deployment cost.

AI.tldr: Xuanwu VL-2B是一个约20亿参数的多模态大模型，旨在将通用多模态模型发展为内容生态系统的工业级基础模型，特别专注于内容审核场景。模型采用InternViT-300M + MLP + Qwen3 1.7B架构，通过三阶段渐进式训练（预训练、中训练、后训练）实现业务专业化与通用能力的平衡。
AI.motivation: 当前主流多模态模型在现实内容审核和对抗性环境中仍存在以下问题：1) 泛化能力退化；2) 灾难性遗忘；3) 细粒度视觉感知有限；4) 长尾噪声建模不足。这些问题限制了模型在工业内容生态系统中的应用。
AI.method: 1) 模型架构：采用紧凑的InternViT-300M + MLP + Qwen3 1.7B结构，总参数量约2B，平衡细粒度视觉感知、语言语义对齐和部署成本；2) 数据策略：开发数据迭代和精选机制；3) 训练流程：采用渐进式三阶段训练管道（预训练→中训练→后训练）。
AI.result: 1) OpenCompass多模态基准：7项平均得分67.90（对比InternVL 3.5 2B的64.27）；2) 业务审核任务：7项独立业务审核任务平均召回率94.38%；3) 对抗性OCR场景：政策违规文本加权召回率82.82%，优于Gemini-2.5-Pro的76.72%。
AI.conclusion: 在有限参数量预算下，Xuanwu VL-2B实现了业务对齐、视觉感知、通用能力保留和部署成本之间的实际平衡，证明了通用多模态模型可以发展为工业级内容生态系统基础模型的可行性。

relevance_reason: The paper Xuanwu is about content moderation (内容审核) using VLMs - a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and video generation quality control. While both mention VLMs, the research profile focuses on: (1) extracting visual guidance features from 2D video output, (2) quality control for video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, (3) VLM accuracy for quality supervision, (4) bridging 2D video to 3D motion. Xuanwu addresses content moderation in adversarial environments - not video generation or 3D motion generation. The application domains are fundamentally different: content administration vs. computer graphics/video generation.

title: TrajectoryMover: Generative Movement of Object Trajectories in Videos
summary: Generative video editing has enabled several intuitive editing operations for short video clips that would previously have been difficult to achieve, especially for non-expert editors. Existing methods focus on prescribing an object's 3D or 2D motion trajectory in a video, or on altering the appearance of an object or a scene, while preserving both the video's plausibility and identity. Yet a method to move an object's 3D motion trajectory in a video, i.e., moving an object while preserving its relative 3D motion, is currently still missing. The main challenge lies in obtaining paired video data for this scenario. Previous methods typically rely on clever data generation approaches to construct plausible paired data from unpaired videos, but this approach fails if one of the videos in a pair can not easily be constructed from the other. Instead, we introduce TrajectoryAtlas, a new data generation pipeline for large-scale synthetic paired video data and a video generator TrajectoryMover fine-tuned with this data. We show that this successfully enables generative movement of object trajectories. Project page: https://chhatrekiran.github.io/trajectorymover

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TrajectoryAtlas数据生成管道和TrajectoryMover视频生成器，能够在保持相对3D运动的同时移动对象的3D运动轨迹，解决了现有生成式视频编辑方法无法移动对象3D轨迹的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成式视频编辑方法主要关注预设对象的3D或2D运动轨迹，或改变对象/场景的外观，但尚无法在保持相对3D运动的同时移动对象的3D运动轨迹。主要挑战在于获取该场景的配对视频数据。
AI.method: 提出TrajectoryAtlas大规模合成配对视频数据生成管道，并使用该数据微调TrajectoryMover视频生成器。不同于之前依赖从非配对视频构造数据的方法，该方法直接生成合成配对数据。
AI.result: 成功实现了对象轨迹的生成式移动，能够在保持相对3D运动的同时移动对象的3D运动轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模合成配对数据训练的方式，有效解决了该任务缺乏配对训练数据的问题，为生成式视频编辑开辟了新的可能性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video generation with trajectory movement in the computer graphics domain. It addresses the pain point of bridging 2D video and 3D motion by maintaining relative 3D motion when moving object trajectories. However, it doesn't directly address the other pain points (extracting visual guidance features, quality control for Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM accuracy). The method (TrajectoryMover video generator) is in the same general area as the mentioned video generation models but doesn't use VLM or cross-modal knowledge distillation. Overall moderately relevant as it's in the same application domain but doesn't address the specific methods or quality control concerns in the profile.

title: Beyond pass@1: A Reliability Science Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary:
Existing benchmarks measure capability -- whether a model succeeds on a single attempt -- but production deployments
  require reliability -- consistent success across repeated attempts on tasks of varying duration. We show these
  properties diverge systematically as task duration grows, and that pass@1 on short tasks is structurally blind to
  this divergence.
  We introduce a reliability science framework for long-horizon LLM agents with four metrics: Reliability Decay Curve
  (RDC), Variance Amplification Factor (VAF), Graceful Degradation Score (GDS), and Meltdown Onset Point (MOP). We
  evaluate 10 models across 23,392 episodes on a 396-task benchmark spanning four duration buckets and three domains.
  Key findings: (1) reliability decay is domain-stratified -- SE GDS drops from 0.90 to 0.44 while document processing
  is nearly flat (0.74 to 0.71); (2) VAF bifurcates by capability tier -- high VAF is a capability signature, not an
  instability signal; (3) capability and reliability rankings diverge substantially, with multi-rank inversions at long
  horizons; (4) frontier models have the highest meltdown rates (up to 19%) because they attempt ambitious multi-step
  strategies that sometimes spiral; and (5) memory scaffolds universally hurt long-horizon performance across all 10
  models. These results motivate reliability as a first-class evaluation dimension alongside capability.

AI.tldr: 现有基准测试衡量的是能力（单次尝试成功与否），但生产部署需要可靠性（不同持续时间任务的持续成功）。本文引入可靠性科学框架，包含四个指标（RDC、VAF、GDS、MOP），在396个任务、23,392个episode上评估10个模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试（如pass@1）仅衡量能力，但生产环境需要可靠性。两者随任务持续时间增长而系统性分化，且短期任务的pass@1在结构上无法检测这种分化。
AI.method: 引入可靠性科学框架，包含四个指标：可靠性衰减曲线(RDC)、方差放大因子(VAF)、优雅降级分数(GDS)、熔毁 onset 点(MOP)。评估10个模型在23,392个episode上，涵盖396个任务、四个持续时间桶和三个领域。
AI.result: 主要发现：(1)可靠性衰减呈领域分层——SE的GDS从0.90降至0.44，文档处理几乎持平(0.74→0.71)；(2)VAF按能力层级分化——高VAF是能力标志而非不稳定信号；(3)能力和可靠性排名在长视野下大幅分化，出现多级逆序；(4)前沿模型熔毁率最高(达19%)，因其尝试雄心勃勃的多步策略；(5)记忆脚手架普遍损害所有10个模型的长期性能。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性应作为与能力同等重要的一级评估维度。能力与可靠性并非必然相关，需要独立度量。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent reliability evaluation in long-horizon tasks, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile. The application domain is entirely different - it focuses on LLM agents and evaluation metrics (RDC, VAF, GDS, MOP), not on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, or 3D motion generation. None of the methods or pain points from the research profile are addressed. This falls under AI/HCI research rather than computer graphics or video generation.

title: Grokking From Abstraction to Intelligence
comment: 22page and 5 figures,In this paper, we analyze the grokking phenomenon from the perspective of Singular Learning Theory (SLT). This work is currently under review for ICML 2026
summary: Grokking in modular arithmetic has established itself as the quintessential fruit fly experiment, serving as a critical domain for investigating the mechanistic origins of model generalization. Despite its significance, existing research remains narrowly focused on specific local circuits or optimization tuning, largely overlooking the global structural evolution that fundamentally drives this phenomenon. We propose that grokking originates from a spontaneous simplification of internal model structures governed by the principle of parsimony. We integrate causal, spectral, and algorithmic complexity measures alongside Singular Learning Theory to reveal that the transition from memorization to generalization corresponds to the physical collapse of redundant manifolds and deep information compression, offering a novel perspective for understanding the mechanisms of model overfitting and generalization.

AI.tldr: 模运算中的grokking现象源于模型内部结构的自发简化，记忆化到泛化的转变对应冗余流形坍塌和信息压缩，为理解泛化机制提供了新框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将模运算中的grokking现象作为理解模型泛化的关键实验平台，但现有工作仅关注局部电路或优化参数调校，忽略了驱动grokking现象的全局结构演化问题。
AI.method: 该研究提出grokking源自内部模型结构的自发简化过程，受简约性原则支配。研究整合了因果分析、谱分析、算法复杂度测度以及奇异学习理论(Singular Learning Theory)来揭示这一现象。
AI.result: 研究发现从记忆化到泛化的转变对应着冗余流形的物理坍塌和深层信息压缩，这一过程揭示了模型过拟合与泛化的内在机制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解模型过拟合和泛化提供了全新视角，强调全局结构简化而非局部优化调参是grokking现象的根本驱动力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about theoretical understanding of grokking phenomenon in modular arithmetic using causal analysis, spectral analysis, and Singular Learning Theory. It is a theoretical machine learning paper about generalization in neural networks. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - the research profile is about video generation (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, VLM-based quality supervision, and feature extraction from video. These are completely different application domains: theoretical ML vs. computer graphics/multimedia generation. The methods used (causal analysis, spectral analysis) are also unrelated to the profile's methods (video generation models, VLMs, 3D motion models, cross-modal distillation).

title: Dual-Imbalance Continual Learning for Real-World Food Recognition
comment: Accepted to 3rd MetaFood at CVPR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoyanzhang1/DIME
summary: Visual food recognition in real-world dietary logging scenarios naturally exhibits severe data imbalance, where a small number of food categories appear frequently while many others occur rarely, resulting in long-tailed class distributions. In practice, food recognition systems often operate in a continual learning setting, where new categories are introduced sequentially over time. However, existing studies typically assume that each incremental step introduces a similar number of new food classes, which rarely happens in real world where the number of newly observed categories can vary significantly across steps, leading to highly uneven learning dynamics. As a result, continual food recognition exhibits a dual imbalance: imbalanced samples within each food class and imbalanced numbers of new food classes to learn at each incremental learning step. In this work, we introduce DIME, a Dual-Imbalance-aware Adapter Merging framework for continual food recognition. DIME learns lightweight adapters for each task using parameter-efficient fine-tuning and progressively integrates them through a class-count guided spectral merging strategy. A rank-wise threshold modulation mechanism further stabilizes the merging process by preserving dominant knowledge while allowing adaptive updates. The resulting model maintains a single merged adapter for inference, enabling efficient deployment without accumulating task-specific modules. Experiments on realistic long-tailed food benchmarks under our step-imbalanced setup show that the proposed method consistently improves by more than 3% over the strongest existing continual learning baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoyanzhang1/DIME.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIME框架，解决持续食品识别中的双重不平衡问题（类别样本不平衡和增量步骤类别数量不平衡），通过参数高效微调和谱合并策略实现有效的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有的食品识别持续学习研究假设每个增量步骤引入相同数量的新类别，但实际场景中新增类别数量变化很大，导致学习动态不均衡。同时，食品类别本身存在长尾分布，即某些类别频繁出现而很多类别很少出现。这两个因素导致持续食品识别面临双重不平衡问题：类别内样本不平衡和步骤间类别数量不平衡。
AI.method: 提出DIME（Dual-Imbalance-aware Adapter Merging）框架，包含三个关键组件：1）使用参数高效微调学习每个任务的轻量级适配器；2）提出类别计数引导的谱合并策略，逐步整合适配器；3）引入秩阈值调制机制，通过保留主导知识并允许自适应更新来稳定合并过程。最终模型保持单一合并适配器进行推理，实现高效部署。
AI.result: 在真实的长尾食品基准测试和步骤不平衡设置下进行实验，DIME相比最强的现有持续学习方法一致提升超过3%。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地研究了持续食品识别中的双重不平衡问题，并通过DIME框架证明了参数高效微调与谱合并策略相结合的有效性，为实际膳食日志场景中的食品识别系统提供了有效的持续学习解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about food recognition (image classification) using continual learning methods - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics (video generation, 3D motion generation). The pain points in the research profile are about video generation quality control and bridging 2D video to 3D motion, while this paper addresses class imbalance in food recognition. The methods (adapter merging, parameter-efficient fine-tuning) are also unrelated to the research profile's methods (video generation models, VLMs for quality supervision, cross-modal knowledge distillation).

title: PSPA-Bench: A Personalized Benchmark for Smartphone GUI Agent
summary: Smartphone GUI agents execute tasks by operating directly on app interfaces, offering a path to broad capability without deep system integration. However, real-world smartphone use is highly personalized: users adopt diverse workflows and preferences, challenging agents to deliver customized assistance rather than generic solutions. Existing GUI agent benchmarks cannot adequately capture this personalization dimension due to sparse user-specific data and the lack of fine-grained evaluation metrics. To address this gap, we present PSPA-Bench, the benchmark dedicated to evaluating personalization in smartphone GUI agents. PSPA-Bench comprises over 12,855 personalized instructions aligned with real-world user behaviors across 10 representative daily-use scenarios and 22 mobile apps, and introduces a structure-aware process evaluation method that measures agents' personalized capabilities at a fine-grained level. Through PSPA-Bench, we benchmark 11 state-of-the-art GUI agents. Results reveal that current methods perform poorly under personalized settings, with even the strongest agent achieving limited success. Our analysis further highlights three directions for advancing personalized GUI agents: (1) reasoning-oriented models consistently outperform general LLMs, (2) perception remains a simple yet critical capability, and (3) reflection and long-term memory mechanisms are key to improving adaptation. Together, these findings establish PSPA-Bench as a foundation for systematic study and future progress in personalized GUI agents.

AI.tldr: PSPA-Bench是一个专注于评估智能手机GUI智能体个性化能力的基准测试，包含超过12,855条个性化指令，覆盖10个日常使用场景和22个移动应用，并引入结构化感知的过程评估方法。通过对11个SOTA GUI智能体的基准测试发现，当前方法在个性化设置下表现不佳，即使是最强的智能体成功也很有限。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的智能手机使用高度个性化，用户采用不同的工作流程和偏好，但现有的GUI智能体基准测试无法充分捕捉这种个性化维度，因为缺乏用户特定数据和细粒度评估指标。需要一个专门评估个性化能力的基准测试来解决这个差距。
AI.method: 构建了PSPA-Bench基准测试，包含12,855条个性化指令，涵盖10个代表性日常使用场景和22个移动应用；引入了结构化感知的过程评估方法(Structure-Aware Process Evaluation)，在细粒度层面测量智能体的个性化能力；对11个SOTA GUI智能体进行了基准测试。
AI.result: 当前方法在个性化设置下表现不佳，即使是最强的智能体成功也很有限。分析揭示了三个提升个性化GUI智能体的方向：(1)推理导向模型始终优于通用LLMs，(2)感知仍是简单但关键的能力，(3)反思和长期记忆机制是适应改进的关键。
