AI.conclusion: PSPA-Bench为个性化GUI智能体的系统性研究和未来进展奠定了基础。研究表明需要关注推理能力、感知提升以及反思/记忆机制的改进。

relevance_reason: This paper is about smartphone GUI agents and personalized mobile computing, which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While the research profile focuses on video generation, 3D motion generation, and quality control for graphics/video synthesis, this paper addresses UI/UX evaluation for mobile agents. The application domain (smartphone GUI agents vs video/3D motion generation) is entirely different - this falls under HCI/mobile computing rather than Computer Graphics. Using VLMs in both cases doesn't make this relevant since the core application domain and problem space are completely different.

title: LatentPilot: Scene-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation by Dreaming Ahead with Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Existing vision-and-language navigation (VLN) models primarily reason over past and current visual observations, while largely ignoring the future visual dynamics induced by actions. As a result, they often lack an effective understanding of the causal relationship between actions and how the visual world changes, limiting robust decision-making. Humans, in contrast, can imagine the near future by leveraging action-dynamics causality, which improves both environmental understanding and navigation choices. Inspired by this capability, we propose LatentPilot, a new paradigm that exploits future observations during training as a valuable data source to learn action-conditioned visual dynamics, while requiring no access to future frames at inference. Concretely, we propose a flywheel-style training mechanism that iteratively collects on-policy trajectories and retrains the model to better match the agent's behavior distribution, with an expert takeover triggered when the agent deviates excessively. LatentPilot further learns visual latent tokens without explicit supervision; these latent tokens attend globally in a continuous latent space and are carried across steps, serving as both the current output and the next input, thereby enabling the agent to dream ahead and reason about how actions will affect subsequent observations. Experiments on R2R-CE, RxR-CE, and R2R-PE benchmarks achieve new SOTA results, and real-robot tests across diverse environments demonstrate LatentPilot's superior understanding of environment-action dynamics in scene. Project page:https://abdd.top/latentpilot/

AI.tldr: 本文提出LatentPilot，一种新的VLN范式，通过利用训练时的未来观察来学习动作-conditioned视觉动力学，而推理时无需未来帧。通过飞轮式训练机制和可学习的视觉潜在token，使智能体能够"预见"动作对后续观察的影响。实验在R2R-CE、RxR-CE、R2R-PE数据集上达到新SOTA，并在真实机器人上验证了其对环境-动作动力学的优越理解。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN模型主要基于过去和当前的视觉观测进行推理，忽略了动作引起的未来视觉动态变化。这导致模型缺乏对动作与视觉世界变化之间因果关系的有效理解，限制了决策的稳健性。人类则能够通过动作-动态因果关系想象近期未来，从而改善环境理解和导航决策。
AI.method: 1) 飞轮式训练机制：迭代收集on-policy轨迹并重训模型以更好匹配智能体行为分布，当智能体偏离过度时触发专家接管。2) 学习视觉潜在token：无显式监督的潜在token，在连续潜在空间中全局attention，跨步骤传递，既作为当前输出也作为下一输入，使智能体能够"预见"并推理动作如何影响后续观测。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE、RxR-CE和R2R-PE基准测试上取得新SOTA结果。真实机器人测试表明LatentPilot在多样化环境中对场景环境-动作动力学具有 superior understanding。
AI.conclusion: LatentPilot通过引入未来观察作为训练数据源，学习动作-conditioned视觉动力学，无需推理时future frames即可实现因果推理，在多个基准测试达到SOTA并展现出真实场景应用潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) for robotics, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics (video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, 3D motion generation, and quality control). While both involve Visual Language Models, the application domain is entirely different - this paper focuses on robot navigation and spatial reasoning, not on video generation, motion generation, or quality supervision. The pain points and methods are not aligned with the research profile's needs.

title: BenchScope: How Many Independent Signals Does Your Benchmark Provide?
summary: AI evaluation suites often report many scores without checking whether those scores carry independent information. We introduce Effective Dimensionality (ED), the participation ratio of a centered benchmark-score spectrum, as a fast, population-conditional upper-bound diagnostic of measurement breadth. Applied at per-instance granularity to 22 benchmarks across 8 domains and more than 8,400 model evaluations, ED reveals substantial redundancy: the six-score Open LLM Leaderboard behaves like roughly two effective measurement axes (ED = 1.7), BBH and MMLU-Pro are near-interchangeable (rho = 0.96, stable across seven subpopulations), and measurement breadth varies more than 20x across current benchmarks. We show that relative ED rankings are stable under matched-dimension controls and that ED can flag redundant suite components, monitor performance-conditional compression, and guide benchmark maintenance. Because binary spectra overestimate absolute latent dimensionality, we interpret ED as a screening statistic rather than a literal factor count and complement it with null, reliability, and saturation analyses. We provide a 22-benchmark reference atlas and a four-step diagnostic workflow that benchmark maintainers can run with a score matrix and a few lines of code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"有效维度"(ED)作为评估基准测量广度的快速诊断指标，通过22个基准、8个领域、8400多次模型评估的实证分析，发现当前AI评估存在严重冗余：六分数的Open LLM Leaderboard实际仅约两个有效测量轴，BBH与MMLU-Pro几乎可互换(r=0.96)，不同基准的测量广度差异超过20倍。
AI.motivation: AI评估套件通常报告大量分数，但未检验这些分数是否携带独立信息。当前基准缺乏对测量冗余的系统性诊断工具，导致评估效率低下且可能高估模型能力多样性。
AI.method: 提出有效维度(ED)——中心化基准分数谱的参与比——作为群体条件下的测量广度上界诊断指标。对22个基准、8个领域、超8400次模型评估进行实例级ED计算，并进行匹配维度控制、零假设、可靠性和饱和度分析。
AI.result: ED揭示显著冗余：Open LLM Leaderboard六分数仅对应约1.7个有效维度；BBH与MMLU-Pro几乎可互换(r=0.96且在七个子群体中稳定)；不同基准的测量广度差异超20倍。ED相对排名在匹配维度控制下稳定。
AI.conclusion: ED可作为筛选统计量而非literal因子计数，用于标记冗余套件成分、监控条件压缩并指导基准维护。提供了22基准参考图谱和四步诊断工作流，基准维护者可用少量代码运行。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI/LLM benchmark evaluation and measuring redundancy in evaluation benchmarks. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion generation, or any of the pain points mentioned (video generation quality control, VLM for quality supervision, bridging 2D video to 3D motion). The application domain is completely different - this is a pure AI evaluation methodology paper focused on LLM benchmarks, not computer graphics or video generation.

title: CT-to-X-ray Distillation Under Tiny Paired Cohorts: An Evidence-Bounded Reproducible Pilot Study
summary: Chest X-ray and computed tomography (CT) provide complementary views of thoracic disease, yet most computer-aided diagnosis models are trained and deployed within a single imaging modality. The concrete question studied here is narrower and deployment-oriented: on a patient-level paired chest cohort, can CT act as training-only supervision for a binary disease versus non-disease X-ray classifier without requiring CT at inference time? We study this setting as a cross-modality teacher--student distillation problem and use JDCNet as an executable pilot scaffold rather than as a validated superior architecture. On the original patient-level paired split from a public paired chest imaging cohort, a stripped-down plain cross-modal logit-KD control attains the highest mean result on the four-image validation subset (0.875 accuracy and 0.714 macro-F1), whereas the full module-augmented JDCNet variant remains at 0.750 accuracy and 0.429 macro-F1. To test whether that ranking is a split artifact, we additionally run eight patient-level Monte Carlo resamples with same-case comparisons, stronger mechanism controls based on attention transfer and feature hints, and imbalance-sensitive analyses. Under this resampled protocol, late fusion attains the highest mean accuracy (0.885), same-modality distillation attains the highest mean macro-F1 (0.554) and balanced accuracy (0.660), the plain cross-modal control drops to 0.500 mean balanced accuracy, and neither attention transfer nor feature hints recover a robust cross-modality advantage. The contribution of this study is therefore not a validated CT-to-X-ray architecture, but a reproducible and evidence-bounded pilot protocol that makes the exact task definition, failure modes, ranking instability, and the minimum requirements for future credible CT-to-X-ray transfer claims explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨模态知识蒸馏问题：利用CT影像作为训练监督，部署时仅需X射线影像进行疾病分类。通过JDCNet框架在配对胸部影像数据集上实验，发现简单的跨模态logit-KD控制在验证集上表现最佳（0.875准确率、0.714 macro-F1），而完整的模块增强JDCNet反而表现较差。在8个患者级Monte Carlo重采样实验中发现排名不稳定 late fusion达到最高平均准确率（0.885），同模态蒸馏达到最高macro-F1（0.554）和平衡准确率（0.660）。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数计算机辅助诊断模型仅在单一成像模态内训练和部署。实际部署中，CT和X射线提供互补的胸部疾病视图，但希望利用CT丰富的监督信息训练X射线分类器，同时在推理时无需CT数据。现有跨模态迁移研究缺乏明确的任务定义和可重复的实验协议。
AI.method: 采用跨模态师生蒸馏框架，以JDCNet作为可执行的基础架构。在公开的配对胸部影像数据集上进行患者级划分实验。实验包括：原始患者级配对分割的验证、四图像验证子集测试、八个患者级Monte Carlo重采样以检验排名稳定性、同模态蒸馏对照、注意力迁移和特征提示的更强机制控制、不平衡敏感分析。评估指标包括准确率、macro-F1和平衡准确率。
AI.result: 原始分割上：plain cross-modal logit-KD控制达到最高mean result（0.875准确率、0.714 macro-F1），完整模块增强JDCNet为0.750准确率、0.429 macro-F1。重采样协议下：late fusion平均准确率最高（0.885），同模态蒸馏macro-F1最高（0.554）、平衡准确率最高（0.660），plain cross-modal控制平衡准确率降至0.500。注意力迁移和特征提示均未恢复稳健的跨模态优势。重采样结果显示排名不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献不在于提出经过验证的CT-to-X-ray架构，而在于建立了一个可重复的、有证据支持的试点协议，明确了任务定义、失败模式、排名不稳定性以及未来可信CT-to-X-ray迁移研究所需的最低要求。跨模态知识蒸馏在此设置下未能展现稳健优势，需谨慎对待此类迁移 claims。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (CT-to-X-ray cross-modal distillation for disease classification), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While it mentions "cross-modal knowledge distillation," this is applied to medical imaging classification, not to video generation, 3D motion generation, or VLM-based quality control. The application domain (medical diagnosis) has no relevance to the research profile's pain points about video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 2D video to 3D motion bridging, or VLM quality supervision.

title: Rigorous Explanations for Tree Ensembles
summary: Tree ensembles (TEs) find a multitude of practical applications. They represent one of the most general and accurate classes of machine learning methods. While they are typically quite concise in representation, their operation remains inscrutable to human decision makers. One solution to build trust in the operation of TEs is to automatically identify explanations for the predictions made. Evidently, we can only achieve trust using explanations, if those explanations are rigorous, that is truly reflect properties of the underlying predictor they explain This paper investigates the computation of rigorously-defined, logically-sound explanations for the concrete case of two well-known examples of tree ensembles, namely random forests and boosted trees.

AI.tldr: 研究如何为随机森林和提升树这两种树集成方法计算严格定义且逻辑合理的预测解释，以增强模型的可解释性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 树集成方法虽然表示简洁，但预测过程对人类决策者不透明，需要通过识别解释来建立信任。
AI.method: 针对随机森林和提升树两种树集成方法，计算严格定义且逻辑合理的解释。
AI.result: 能够为随机森林和提升树的预测提供严格且逻辑合理的解释。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为树集成方法的解释提供了严格定义和逻辑合理的方法，增强了预测的可解释性和可信度。

relevance_reason: This paper is about tree ensemble interpretability (Random Forest, Boosted Trees) for ML model explanations - completely different application domain from the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics with video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), Visual Language Models (VLM), 3D Motion Generation, and cross-modal learning. The paper uses tree-based methods (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting) which are entirely different from the required methods (diffusion models, VLMs, video generation). There is zero overlap in application domain or methodology.

title: Segmentation of Gray Matters and White Matters from Brain MRI data
summary: Accurate segmentation of brain tissues such as gray matter and white matter from magnetic resonance imaging is essential for studying brain anatomy, diagnosing neurological disorders, and monitoring disease progression. Traditional methods, such as FSL FAST, produce tissue probability maps but often require task-specific adjustments and face challenges with diverse imaging conditions. Recent foundation models, such as MedSAM, offer a prompt-based approach that leverages large-scale pretraining. In this paper, we propose a modified MedSAM model designed for multi-class brain tissue segmentation. Our preprocessing pipeline includes skull stripping with FSL BET, tissue probability mapping with FSL FAST, and converting these into 2D axial, sagittal, coronal slices with multi-class labels (background, gray matter, and white matter). We extend MedSAM's mask decoder to three classes, freezing the pre-trained image encoder and fine-tuning the prompt encoder and decoder. Experiments on the IXI dataset achieve Dice scores up to 0.8751. This work demonstrates that foundation models like MedSAM can be adapted for multi-class medical image segmentation with minimal architectural modifications. Our findings suggest that such models can be extended to more diverse medical imaging scenarios in future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MedSAM模型改进的多类脑组织分割方法，通过FSL工具进行预处理，将MRI转换为2D切片并扩展mask解码器至三类（背景、灰质、白质），在IXI数据集上Dice分数达到0.8751。
AI.motivation: 传统的脑组织分割方法如FSL FAST虽然能产生组织概率图，但需要针对特定任务进行调整，且在多样化的成像条件下面临挑战。MedSAM等基础模型通过大规模预训练提供了基于提示的分割方法，但原始设计不支持多类分割，因此需要改进以适应脑组织分割任务。
AI.method: 预处理流程包括：使用FSL BET进行颅骨剥离、FSL FAST生成组织概率图、将数据转换为2D轴向、矢状和冠状切片并标记多类标签（背景、灰质、白质）。模型改进方面：冻结预训练的图像编码器，微调提示编码器和解码器，将MedSAM的mask解码器扩展至三类。
AI.result: 在IXI数据集上的实验达到了最高0.8751的Dice分数，证明了基础模型如MedSAM可以通过最小的架构修改适应多类医学图像分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型如MedSAM可以通过最小的架构修改成功适应多类医学图像分割任务，这一方法可扩展至更多样化的医学成像场景，为未来的研究和应用提供了有价值的参考。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image segmentation (brain MRI) using MedSAM, which is in the medical imaging domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control for generated videos. These are completely different application domains: medical imaging vs computer graphics/video generation. Even though both may involve feature extraction or segmentation concepts, the underlying application areas have no overlap.

title: AI-Generated Prior Authorization Letters: Strong Clinical Content, Weak Administrative Scaffolding
summary: Prior authorization remains one of the most burdensome administrative processes in U.S. healthcare, consuming billions of dollars and thousands of physician hours each year. While large language models have shown promise across clinical text tasks, their ability to produce submission-ready prior authorization letters has received only limited attention, with existing work confined to single-case demonstrations rather than structured multi-scenario evaluation. We assessed three commercially available LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, and Gemini 2.5 Pro) across 45 physician-validated synthetic scenarios spanning rheumatology, psychiatry, oncology, cardiology, and orthopedics. All three models generated letters with strong clinical content: accurate diagnoses, well-structured medical necessity arguments, and thorough step therapy documentation. However, a secondary analysis of real-world administrative requirements revealed consistent gaps that clinical scoring alone did not capture, including absent billing codes, missing authorization duration requests, and inadequate follow-up plans. These findings reframe the question: the challenge for clinical deployment is not whether LLMs can write clinically adequate letters, but whether the systems built around them can supply the administrative precision that payer workflows require.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了三种商业大型语言模型(GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、 Gemini 2.5 Pro)在45个跨5个医学专科的医生验证合成场景中生成预先授权信件的能力。结果显示所有模型都能生成临床内容充分的信件，但存在行政要求方面的系统性问题。
AI.motivation: 预先授权是美国医疗保健中最繁重的行政流程之一，消耗大量资金和医生时间。尽管大型语言模型在临床文本任务中显示出前景，但它们生成准备提交的预先授权信件的能力此前仅受到有限关注，且仅限于单案例演示。
AI.method: 研究评估了三种商业可用的大型语言模型，使用45个医生验证的合成场景，涵盖风湿病学、精神病学、肿瘤学、心脏病学和骨科五个专科，并对生成的信件进行临床评分和行政要求二次分析。
AI.result: 所有三个模型都生成了具有强临床内容的信件：准确的诊断、结构良好的医学必要性论证和全面的步骤治疗文档。然而，二次分析显示存在一致的系统性差距，包括缺失账单代码、缺失授权期限请求和不充分的随访计划。
AI.conclusion: 研究重新定义了问题：临床部署的挑战不在于LLM是否能写出临床充分的信件，而在于围绕它们构建的系统是否能提供支付方工作流程所需的行政精确性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about healthcare administration - evaluating LLMs for generating prior authorization letters in medical contexts. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, visual language models for graphics tasks, or any of the specified pain points. The application domain is completely different (healthcare vs. computer graphics/video generation).

title: Hierarchical Visual Relocalization with Nearest View Synthesis from Feature Gaussian Splatting
summary: Visual relocalization is a fundamental task in the field of 3D computer vision, estimating a camera's pose when it revisits a previously known scene. While point-based hierarchical relocalization methods have shown strong scalability and efficiency, they are often limited by sparse image observations and weak feature matching. In this work, we propose SplatHLoc, a novel hierarchical visual relocalization framework that uses Feature Gaussian Splatting as the scene representation. To address the sparsity of database images, we propose an adaptive viewpoint retrieval method that synthesizes virtual candidates with viewpoints more closely aligned with the query, thereby improving the accuracy of initial pose estimation. For feature matching, we observe that Gaussian-rendered features and those extracted directly from images exhibit different strengths across the two-stage matching process: the former performs better in the coarse stage, while the latter proves more effective in the fine stage. Therefore, we introduce a hybrid feature matching strategy, enabling more accurate and efficient pose estimation. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets show that SplatHLoc enhances the robustness of visual relocalization, setting a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: SplatHLoc是一种新型的层级式视觉重定位框架，利用特征高斯溅射作为场景表示，解决传统点云方法中图像观测稀疏和特征匹配弱的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的点云层级式重定位方法受限于稀疏的数据库图像观测和较弱的特征匹配能力，这限制了重定位的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1. 采用特征高斯溅射作为场景表示；2. 提出自适应视角检索方法，通过合成更接近查询视角的虚拟候选图像来改进初始姿态估计；3. 设计混合特征匹配策略，在粗阶段使用高斯渲染特征，在细阶段使用图像提取特征。
AI.result: SplatHLoc在室内和室外数据集上均表现出更强的鲁棒性，设立了新的最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合特征高斯溅射表示和混合特征匹配策略，有效提升了视觉重定位的准确性和效率，为该领域提供了新的技术方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about visual relocalization (camera pose estimation) using Gaussian splatting, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile focusing on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. While both are in computer graphics, the paper addresses localization/pose estimation rather than video generation or quality control. No direct alignment with the pain points or methods specified.

title: SLVMEval: Synthetic Meta Evaluation Benchmark for Text-to-Long Video Generation
summary: This paper proposes the synthetic long-video meta-evaluation (SLVMEval), a benchmark for meta-evaluating text-to-video (T2V) evaluation systems. The proposed SLVMEval benchmark focuses on assessing these systems on videos of up to 10,486 s (approximately 3 h). The benchmark targets a fundamental requirement, namely, whether the systems can accurately assess video quality in settings that are easy for humans to assess. We adopt a pairwise comparison-based meta-evaluation framework. Building on dense video-captioning datasets, we synthetically degrade source videos to create controlled "high-quality versus low-quality" pairs across 10 distinct aspects. Then, we employ crowdsourcing to filter and retain only those pairs in which the degradation is clearly perceptible, thereby establishing an effective final testbed. Using this testbed, we assess the reliability of existing evaluation systems in ranking these pairs. Experimental results demonstrate that human evaluators can identify the better long video with 84.7%-96.8% accuracy, and in nine of the 10 aspects, the accuracy of these systems falls short of human assessment, revealing weaknesses in text-to-long-video evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLVMEval基准，用于元评估文本到视频(T2V)评估系统在长视频（最长约3小时）上的表现，该基准通过成对比较框架和人群ourcing筛选，创建了10个不同方面的可控测试集。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏针对长视频（超过几分钟）的评估基准，而现有的T2V评估系统需要能够在与人类评估难度相当的设置下准确评估视频质量，这是一个 fundamental requirement。
AI.method: 基于密集视频字幕数据集，通过合成降质方法创建"高质量vs低质量"成对视频，涵盖10个不同方面；然后使用人群ourcing筛选，仅保留降质明显可感知的成对，建立了有效的最终测试床。
AI.result: 人类评估者在识别更好的长视频时准确率达84.7%-96.8%，而在10个方面中的9个方面，现有T2V评估系统的准确率低于人类评估，揭示了文本到长视频评估的弱点。
AI.conclusion: SLVMEval是一个有效的基准，可以揭示现有T2V评估系统在长视频评估方面的系统性弱点，为该领域的未来研究提供了重要的测试平台。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating text-to-long video generation systems, not about video generation or feature extraction. While both are in the computer graphics/video domain, the paper focuses on creating an evaluation benchmark (quality assessment), whereas the research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), extracting visual guidance features from 2D video, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The paper doesn't address the core pain points of extracting visual guidance features or bridging 2D-to-3D domain gap. It partially addresses quality control for video generation but from an evaluation perspective, not from a generation or feature extraction perspective.

title: Structural Compactness as a Complementary Criterion for Explanation Quality
summary: In the evaluation of attribution quality, the quantitative assessment of explanation legibility is particularly difficult, as it is influenced by varying shapes and internal organization of attributions not captured by simple statistics. To address this issue, we introduce Minimum Spanning Tree Compactness (MST-C), a graph-based structural metric that captures higher-order geometric properties of attributions, such as spread and cohesion. These components are combined into a single score that evaluates compactness, favoring attributions with salient points spread across a small area and spatially organized into few but cohesive clusters. We show that MST-C reliably distinguishes between explanation methods, exposes fundamental structural differences between models, and provides a robust, self-contained diagnostic for explanation compactness that complements existing notions of attribution complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于图结构的归因质量评估指标——最小生成树紧凑度(MST-C)，用于评估解释的可读性，通过捕获归因的高阶几何属性（散布和内聚性），将多个组件组合成单一分数来评估紧凑度。
AI.motivation: 归因质量的定量评估特别困难，因为归因的形状和内部组织的多样性无法被简单的统计数据捕获，现有方法缺乏对解释紧凑性的有效度量。
AI.method: 提出最小生成树紧凑度(MST-C)，一种基于图结构的度量方法，捕获归因的高阶几何属性（spread和cohesion），将这些组件组合成单一分数来评估紧凑度，偏好显著性点散布在小区域内且空间组织成少量内聚聚类的归因。
AI.result: MST-C能够可靠地区分不同的解释方法，揭示模型之间的基本结构差异，提供了一个稳健的、自成一体的解释紧凑性诊断方法，补充了现有的归因复杂度概念。
AI.conclusion: MST-C作为归因质量评估的新指标，能够有效评估解释的可读性，补充了现有归因复杂度概念，为归因方法的比较提供了新的工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating explanation/attribution quality in XAI (Explainable AI), specifically about neural network attribution methods. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, or any of the application domains listed in the research profile. The methods and application domain are completely different - this is about interpretability of deep learning models, not computer graphics or video generation.

title: 3D Architect: An Automated Approach to Three-Dimensional Modeling
summary: The aim of our paper is to render an object in 3-dimension using a set of its orthographic views. Corner detector (Harris Detector) is applied on the input views to obtain control points. These control points are projected perpendicular to respective views, in order to construct an envelope. A set of points describing the object in 3-dimension, are obtained from the intersection of these mutually perpendicular envelopes. These set of points are used to regenerate the surfaces of the object using computational geometry. At the end, the object in 3-dimension is rendered using OpenGL

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于正交视图的三维重建方法，使用Harris角点检测获取控制点，通过包络线交点计算三维点云，最后用计算几何重建表面并OpenGL渲染
AI.motivation: 使用正交视图重建三维对象
AI.method: 使用Harris角点检测器提取控制点，将控制点垂直投影到各自视图上构建包络线，通过这些相互垂直的包络线的交点获取三维点集，最后使用计算几何方法重建表面并用OpenGL渲染
AI.result: 从正交视图成功重建三维对象
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了基于多视图的三维重建，能够从二维正交视图恢复三维几何形状

relevance_reason: This paper is about traditional 3D reconstruction from orthographic views using Harris corner detection and computational geometry. While both are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are completely different: the research profile focuses on video generation models, VLMs, and bridging 2D video to 3D MOTION, while this paper deals with static 3D MODEL reconstruction from 2D images. The methods (Harris corner detection, envelope lines) are classical computer vision techniques unrelated to modern video generation or motion generation models. It doesn't address any of the pain points (video quality control, VLM supervision, video-to-motion bridging).

title: Developing Adaptive Context Compression Techniques for Large Language Models (LLMs) in Long-Running Interactions
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often experience performance degradation during long-running interactions due to increasing context length, memory saturation, and computational overhead. This paper presents an adaptive context compression framework that integrates importance-aware memory selection, coherence-sensitive filtering, and dynamic budget allocation to retain essential conversational information while controlling context growth. The approach is evaluated on LOCOMO, LOCCO, and LongBench benchmarks to assess answer quality, retrieval accuracy, coherence preservation, and efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves consistent improvements in conversational stability and retrieval performance while reducing token usage and inference latency compared with existing memory and compression-based approaches. These findings indicate that adaptive context compression provides an effective balance between long-term memory preservation and computational efficiency in persistent LLM interactions

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应上下文压缩框架，通过重要性感知内存选择、一致性敏感过滤和动态预算分配来解决LLM长对话中的性能下降问题，在多个基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）在长时间交互中常因上下文长度增加、内存饱和和计算开销而导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出了一种自适应上下文压缩框架，整合了重要性感知的内存选择、一致性敏感的过滤和动态预算分配，以保留必要的对话信息同时控制上下文增长。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO、LOCCO和LongBench基准上的实验结果表明，该方法在对话稳定性和检索性能方面实现了一致的改进，同时与现有的基于内存和压缩的方法相比减少了token使用和推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 自适应上下文压缩在持久LLM交互中在长期记忆保留和计算效率之间提供了有效的平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM context compression for long-running text-based conversations, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, Visual Language Models for video quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. This paper addresses LLM memory management for text conversations - a completely different application domain and field. The methods (context compression, memory selection) have no relevance to video generation, 3D motion, or visual quality control.

title: Learning to Generate Formally Verifiable Step-by-Step Logic Reasoning via Structured Formal Intermediaries
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated impressive performance on complex, multi-step reasoning tasks, especially when post-trained with outcome-rewarded reinforcement learning Guo et al. 2025. However, it has been observed that outcome rewards often overlook flawed intermediate steps, leading to unreliable reasoning steps even when final answers are correct. To address this unreliable reasoning, we propose PRoSFI (Process Reward over Structured Formal Intermediates), a novel reward method that enhances reasoning reliability without compromising accuracy. Instead of generating formal proofs directly, which is rarely accomplishable for a modest-sized (7B) model, the model outputs structured intermediate steps aligned with its natural language reasoning. Each step is then verified by a formal prover. Only fully validated reasoning chains receive high rewards. The integration of formal verification guides the model towards generating step-by-step machine-checkable proofs, thereby yielding more credible final answers. PRoSFI offers a simple and effective approach to training trustworthy reasoning models.

AI.tldr: PRoSFI通过形式化验证中间推理步骤来训练LLMs，提高推理可靠性，无需模型生成完整的形式化证明。
AI.motivation: 结果奖励忽视了有缺陷的中间推理步骤，导致即使最终答案正确，推理过程也不可靠。
AI.method: 模型输出与其自然语言推理一致的结构化中间步骤，每个步骤由形式化证明器验证，只有完全验证的推理链才能获得高奖励。
AI.result: 形式化验证引导模型生成可机器检查的逐步证明，产生更可信的最终答案。
AI.conclusion: PRoSFI提供了一种训练可信推理模型的简单有效方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using formal verification to train LLMs for logic reasoning - completely outside Computer Graphics. It has no relevance to video generation, 3D motion generation, VLM quality supervision, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. This is an NLP/AI paper focused on LLM reasoning verification, not computer graphics or video/3D generation.

title: Multi-Layered Memory Architectures for LLM Agents: An Experimental Evaluation of Long-Term Context Retention
summary: Long-horizon dialogue systems suffer from semanticdrift and unstable memory retention across extended sessions. This paper presents a Multi-Layer Memory Framework that decomposes dialogue history into working, episodic, and semantic layers with adaptive retrieval gating and retention regularization. The architecture controls cross-session drift while maintaining bounded context growth and computational efficiency. Experiments on LOCOMO, LOCCO, and LoCoMo show improved performance, achieving 46.85 Success Rate, 0.618 overall F1 with 0.594 multi-hop F1, and 56.90% six-period retention while reducing false memory rate to 5.1% and context usage to 58.40%. Results confirm enhanced long-term retention and reasoning stability under constrained context budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多层次记忆框架（Multi-Layer Memory Framework），将对话历史分解为工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆三层，并结合自适应检索门控和保留正则化机制，以解决长程对话系统中的语义漂移和记忆不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 长程对话系统面临语义漂移和跨会话记忆不稳定的问题，在扩展会话中难以保持长期记忆和推理稳定性。
AI.method: 提出多层次记忆框架，将对话历史分解为工作层、情景层和语义层三层结构，配合自适应检索门控和保留正则化机制，控制跨会话漂移，同时保持有界上下文增长和计算效率。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO、LOCCO和LoCoMo数据集上取得显著改进：46.85%成功率、0.618总体F1分数（多跳F1为0.594）、56.90%六周期保留率，同时将错误记忆率降至5.1%，上下文使用量降至58.40%。
AI.conclusion: 该架构有效控制了跨会话漂移，同时保持有界上下文增长和计算效率，在受限上下文预算下增强了长期记忆保持和推理稳定性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM memory architectures for long-range conversation systems, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The application domain is conversational AI/NLP, not Computer Graphics, video generation, or 3D motion generation. The methods (memory mechanisms for LLMs) have no connection to video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, or cross-modal learning between 2D video and 3D motion. The pain points in the profile (visual feature extraction, video quality control, domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion) are not addressed at all.

title: FlowPIE: Test-Time Scientific Idea Evolution with Flow-Guided Literature Exploration
summary: Scientific idea generation (SIG) is critical to AI-driven autonomous research, yet existing approaches are often constrained by a static retrieval-then-generation paradigm, leading to homogeneous and insufficiently divergent ideas. In this work, we propose FlowPIE, a tightly coupled retrieval-generation framework that treats literature exploration and idea generation as a co-evolving process. FlowPIE expands literature trajectories via a flow-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) inspired by GFlowNets, using the quality of current ideas assessed by an LLM-based generative reward model (GRM) as a supervised signal to guide adaptive retrieval and construct a diverse, high-quality initial population. Based on this population, FlowPIE models idea generation as a test-time idea evolution process, applying selection, crossover, and mutation with the isolation island paradigm and GRM-based fitness computation to incorporate cross-domain knowledge. It effectively mitigates the information cocoons arising from over-reliance on parametric knowledge and static literature. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that FlowPIE consistently produces ideas with higher novelty, feasibility and diversity compared to strong LLM-based and agent-based frameworks, while enabling reward scaling during test time.

AI.tldr: FlowPIE是一个紧密耦合的检索-生成框架，将文献探索和idea生建模为协同进化过程，利用flow-guided MCTS引导自适应检索并通过进化算法产生多样化高质量的科学idea
AI.motivation: 现有科学idea生成(SIG)方法受限于静态检索-生成范式，导致生成的idea同质化严重且不够发散；同时过度依赖参数知识和静态文献容易形成信息茧房
AI.method: 1) 基于GFlowNets的flow-guided MCTS，利用LLM评估的GRM作为监督信号引导自适应检索；2) 将idea生建模为测试时进化过程，采用选择、交叉、变异和隔离岛屿范式；3) 使用GRM计算跨领域知识的适应度
AI.result: FlowPIE在idea的新颖性、可行性和多样性方面均优于强的LLM-based和agent-based框架，并能实现测试时奖励Scaling
AI.conclusion: FlowPIE通过将检索与生成紧密耦合，结合MCTS引导的文献探索与基于GRM的进化算法，实现了高质量、多样化的科学idea生成，有效缓解了信息茧房问题，显著优于现有LLM-based和agent-based框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about scientific idea generation using LLM-based methods (GFlowNets, MCTS, evolutionary algorithms), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control for video generation - while FlowPIE focuses on generating scientific research ideas through literature exploration. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or objectives. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to video generation quality control, VLM accuracy for quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion.

title: LightHarmony3D: Harmonizing Illumination and Shadows for Object Insertion in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity reconstruction of scene geometry and appearance. Building on this capability, inserting external mesh objects into reconstructed 3DGS scenes enables interactive editing and content augmentation for immersive applications such as AR/VR, virtual staging, and digital content creation. However, achieving physically consistent lighting and shadows for mesh insertion remains challenging, as it requires accurate scene illumination estimation and multi-view consistent rendering. To address this challenge, we present LightHarmony3D, a novel framework for illumination-consistent mesh insertion in 3DGS scenes. Central to our approach is our proposed generative module that predicts a full 360° HDR environment map at the insertion location via a single forward pass. By leveraging generative priors instead of iterative optimization, our method efficiently captures dominant scene illumination and enables physically grounded shading and shadows for inserted meshes while maintaining multi-view coherence. Furthermore, we introduce the first dedicated benchmark for mesh insertion in 3DGS, providing a standardized evaluation framework for assessing lighting consistency and photorealism. Extensive experiments across multiple real-world reconstruction datasets demonstrate that LightHarmony3D achieves state-of-the-art realism and multi-view consistency.

AI.tldr: LightHarmony3D是一个用于在3DGS场景中实现照明一致性网格插入的框架，通过单次前向传递生成360° HDR环境图来预测场景照明，从而为插入的网格物体提供物理一致的着色和阴影，并保持多视图一致性。
AI.motivation: 在3DGS场景中插入外部网格物体实现交互式编辑和内容增强时，如何实现物理一致的照明和阴影是一个挑战，因为这需要准确的场景照明估计和多视图一致的渲染。
AI.method: 提出了一种生成模块，通过单次前向传递预测插入位置的完整360° HDR环境图，利用生成先验而非迭代优化来高效捕获主导场景照明；同时构建了第一个用于3DGS网格插入的专用基准测试。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界重建数据集上的广泛实验表明，LightHarmony3D实现了最先进的逼真度和多视图一致性。
AI.conclusion: LightHarmony3D能够为插入的网格物体提供物理一致的着色和阴影，同时保持多视图连贯性，为AR/VR、虚拟场景布置和数字内容创作等沉浸式应用提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D Gaussian Splatting for object insertion with illumination harmonization - it's about 3D scene editing, not video generation or 3D motion generation. While both are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are different: the paper addresses 3D scene lighting estimation and mesh insertion, whereas the research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The paper uses generative priors but doesn't involve video generation, VLMs, or motion generation methods. Only tangentially related through general computer graphics topics.

title: CCDNet: Learning to Detect Camouflage against Distractors in Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared target detection (IRSTD) tasks have critical applications in areas like wilderness rescue and maritime search. However, detecting infrared targets is challenging due to their low contrast and tendency to blend into complex backgrounds, effectively camouflaging themselves. Additionally, other objects with similar features (distractors) can cause false alarms, further degrading detection performance. To address these issues, we propose a novel \textbf{C}amouflage-aware \textbf{C}ounter-\textbf{D}istraction \textbf{Net}work (CCDNet) in this paper. We design a backbone with Weighted Multi-branch Perceptrons (WMPs), which aggregates self-conditioned multi-level features to accurately represent the target and background. Based on these rich features, we then propose a novel Aggregation-and-Refinement Fusion Neck (ARFN) to refine structures/semantics from shallow/deep features maps, and bidirectionally reconstruct the relations between the targets and the backgrounds, highlighting the targets while suppressing the complex backgrounds to improve detection accuracy. Furthermore, we present a new Contrastive-aided Distractor Discriminator (CaDD), enforcing adaptive similarity computation both locally and globally between the real targets and the backgrounds to more precisely discriminate distractors, so as to reduce the false alarm rate. Extensive experiments on infrared image datasets confirm that CCDNet outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于红外目标检测的Camouflage-aware Counter-Distraction Network (CCDNet)，通过设计加权多分支感知器(WMPs)backbone、聚合-细化融合颈部(ARFN)和对比辅助干扰物判别器(CaDD)来解决红外目标低对比度、背景复杂以及干扰物导致的误报问题。
AI.motivation: 红外目标检测任务在荒野救援和海上搜救等应用中至关重要，但面临目标对比度低、易与复杂背景融合、以及相似特征干扰物导致误报等挑战。
AI.method: 1. 设计了带加权多分支感知器(WMPs)的backbone，通过自条件多层级特征聚合来准确表示目标和背景；2. 提出聚合-细化融合颈部(ARFN)，从浅层/深层特征图中精炼结构/语义信息，双向重建目标和背景的关系，突出目标并抑制复杂背景；3. 提出对比辅助干扰物判别器(CaDD)，在局部和全局层面计算真实目标与背景的适应性相似性来更精确地区分干扰物。
AI.result: 在红外图像数据集上的广泛实验表明，CCDNet优于其他最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: CCDNet通过camouflage-aware和counter-distraction机制有效提升了红外目标检测的准确率并降低了误报率，为复杂背景下的小目标检测提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about infrared small target detection - a computer vision task focused on detecting camouflaged objects in infrared images. This is completely different from the research profile which is about Computer Graphics, specifically video generation (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, VLM-based quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domain (infrared detection vs video/3D graphics) and methods (detection networks vs generation models) are entirely different. This paper would be relevant to remote sensing or surveillance research, not computer graphics or video generation research.

title: M2H-MX: Multi-Task Dense Visual Perception for Real-Time Monocular Spatial Understanding
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Preprint under review
summary:
Monocular cameras are attractive for robotic perception due to their low cost and ease of deployment, yet achieving reliable real-time spatial understanding from a single image stream remains challenging. While recent multi-task dense prediction models have improved per-pixel depth and semantic estimation, translating these advances into stable monocular mapping systems is still non-trivial.
  This paper presents M2H-MX, a real-time multi-task perception model for monocular spatial understanding. The model preserves multi-scale feature representations while introducing register-gated global context and controlled cross-task interaction in a lightweight decoder, enabling depth and semantic predictions to reinforce each other under strict latency constraints. Its outputs integrate directly into an unmodified monocular SLAM pipeline through a compact perception-to-mapping interface.
  We evaluate both dense prediction accuracy and in-the-loop system performance. On NYUDv2, M2H-MX-L achieves state-of-the-art results, improving semantic mIoU by 6.6% and reducing depth RMSE by 9.4% over representative multi-task baselines. When deployed in a real-time monocular mapping system on ScanNet, M2H-MX reduces average trajectory error by 60.7% compared to a strong monocular SLAM baseline while producing cleaner metric-semantic maps. These results demonstrate that modern multi-task dense prediction can be reliably deployed for real-time monocular spatial perception in robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2H-MX，一个用于单目空间理解的实时多任务感知模型，可同时预测深度和语义，并可直接集成到单目SLAM系统中。
AI.motivation: 单目相机因其低成本和易部署而备受关注，但从单张图像实现可靠的实时空间理解仍然具有挑战性。虽然多任务密集预测模型改进了逐像素深度和语义估计，但如何将这些进展转化为稳定的单目映射系统仍非易事。
AI.method: 提出M2H-MX模型，包含：1) 保留多尺度特征表示；2) 引入register-gated全局上下文；3) 在轻量级解码器中实现受控的跨任务交互，使深度和语义预测在严格延迟约束下相互增强。模型输出通过紧凑的感知-映射接口直接集成到未修改的单目SLAM流程中。
AI.result: 在NYUDv2上，M2H-MX-L实现了最先进的性能，语义mIoU提升6.4%，深度RMSE降低9.4%。在ScanNet上部署于实时单目映射系统时，平均轨迹误差比强单目SLAM基线降低60.7%，同时生成更清洁的度量语义地图。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，现代多任务密集预测可以可靠地部署用于机器人系统中的实时单目空间感知。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses monocular SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) for robotics - a robotics/computer vision application focused on robot navigation and spatial mapping. The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, and using VLMs for quality control. These are fundamentally different application domains: SLAM/robotics vs. video/motion generation. Even though both involve visual understanding, the purposes are completely different - this paper is for robot navigation while the profile is for generative content creation.

title: Diffusion Mental Averages
summary: Can a diffusion model produce its own "mental average" of a concept-one that is as sharp and realistic as a typical sample? We introduce Diffusion Mental Averages (DMA), a model-centric answer to this question. While prior methods aim to average image collections, they produce blurry results when applied to diffusion samples from the same prompt. These data-centric techniques operate outside the model, ignoring the generative process. In contrast, DMA averages within the diffusion model's semantic space, as discovered by recent studies. Since this space evolves across timesteps and lacks a direct decoder, we cast averaging as trajectory alignment: optimize multiple noise latents so their denoising trajectories progressively converge toward shared coarse-to-fine semantics, yielding a single sharp prototype. We extend our approach to multimodal concepts (e.g., dogs with many breeds) by clustering samples in semantically-rich spaces such as CLIP and applying Textual Inversion or LoRA to bridge CLIP clusters into diffusion space. This is, to our knowledge, the first approach that delivers consistent, realistic averages, even for abstract concepts, serving as a concrete visual summary and a lens into model biases and concept representation.

AI.tldr: 提出扩散心理平均值(DMA)，通过在扩散模型语义空间中进行轨迹对齐来生成概念的平均表示，可处理多模态概念，是首个能产生一致、逼真抽象概念平均的方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法在应用扩散样本时产生模糊结果，因为这些数据为中心的技术在模型外部操作，忽略了生成过程
AI.method: 提出扩散心理平均值(DMA)方法：将平均操作在扩散模型的语义空间中进行，通过轨迹对齐来实现——优化多个噪声潜在变量，使其去噪轨迹逐渐收敛到共享的粗到细的语义，生成一个锐利的原型。对于多模态概念(如多种品种的狗)，通过在CLIP等语义丰富空间中进行聚类，并使用Textual Inversion或LoRA将CLIP聚类连接到扩散空间
AI.result: 能够在扩散模型的语义空间内生成锐利、逼真的原型平均，即使对抽象概念也能产生一致、现实的结果
AI.conclusion: 这是首个能够为抽象概念提供一致、现实平均结果的方法，可作为概念的具体视觉总结，也可作为理解模型偏见和概念表示的工具

relevance_reason: This paper is about diffusion models for IMAGE generation (creating average concept representations like different dog breeds), while the research profile is about VIDEO generation (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control using VLMs. The application domain is fundamentally different - image generation vs video/3D motion generation. Although both use diffusion models, the target output and task are entirely different. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points: extracting visual guidance features from video, quality control for video generation models, VLM accuracy for quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion.

title: Beyond the Steeper Curve: AI-Mediated Metacognitive Decoupling and the Limits of the Dunning-Kruger Metaphor
summary: The common claim that generative AI simply amplifies the Dunning-Kruger effect is too coarse to capture the available evidence. The clearest findings instead suggest that large language model (LLM) use can improve observable output and short-term task performance while degrading metacognitive accuracy and flattening the classic competence-confidence gradient across skill groups. This paper synthesizes evidence from human-AI interaction, learning research, and model evaluation, and proposes the working model of AI-mediated metacognitive decoupling: a widening gap among produced output, underlying understanding, calibration accuracy, and self-assessed ability. This four-variable account better explains overconfidence, over- and under-reliance, crutch effects, and weak transfer than the simpler metaphor of a uniformly steeper Dunning-Kruger curve. The paper concludes with implications for tool design, assessment, and knowledge work.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了生成式AI简单放大邓宁-克鲁格效应的观点，提出AI介导的元认知解耦模型：产出、底层理解、校准准确性和自我评估能力之间出现widening gap，这一四变量模型比简化的邓宁-克鲁格曲线更能解释过度自信、过度/不足依赖、拐杖效应和弱迁移现象。
AI.motivation: 挑战关于生成式AI简单放大邓宁-克鲁格效应的粗略 claim，认为这种说法 too coarse to capture the available evidence
AI.method: 综合了人机交互、学习研究和模型评估的证据
AI.result: LLM使用可改善可观察的输出和短期任务表现，但会降低元认知准确性并flatten the classic competence-confidence gradient across skill groups
AI.conclusion: 论文提出AI介导的元认知解耦模型 better explains overconfidence, over- and under-reliance, crutch effects, and weak transfer than the simpler Dunning-Kruger metaphor. Implications for tool design, assessment, and knowledge work.

relevance_reason: This paper is about cognitive psychology, AI metacognition, and the Dunning-Kruger effect - it belongs to the field of educational research and human-computer interaction. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics with focus on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, VLM-based quality control, and cross-modal feature extraction. The application domains are completely unrelated - one deals with AI's impact on human metacognition, the other deals with technical video/motion generation systems. This paper would be relevant to someone studying AI education or cognitive science, but provides no value for computer graphics research involving video generation and motion synthesis.

title: A First Step Towards Even More Sparse Encodings of Probability Distributions
comment: Published in ILP2021. The final authenticated publication is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-97454-1_13
summary: Real world scenarios can be captured with lifted probability distributions. However, distributions are usually encoded in a table or list, requiring an exponential number of values. Hence, we propose a method for extracting first-order formulas from probability distributions that require significantly less values by reducing the number of values in a distribution and then extracting, for each value, a logical formula to be further minimized. This reduction and minimization allows for increasing the sparsity in the encoding while also generalizing a given distribution. Our evaluation shows that sparsity can increase immensely by extracting a small set of short formulas while preserving core information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从概率分布中提取一阶公式的方法，通过减少分布中的值数量来显著降低编码所需的数值，然后为每个值提取逻辑公式以进一步最小化。这种减少和最小化方法可以在增加编码稀疏性的同时泛化给定分布。评估表明，通过提取少量短公式可以极大地提高稀疏性，同时保留核心信息。
AI.motivation: 现实世界场景可以用提升的概率分布来捕获。然而，分布通常以表格或列表形式编码，需要指数级的数值数量来表示。
AI.method: 提出了一种从概率分布中提取一阶公式的方法，通过减少分布中的值数量来降低编码所需的数值，然后为每个值提取逻辑公式并进一步最小化。
AI.result: 评估表明，通过提取少量短公式可以极大地提高稀疏性，同时保留核心信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在增加编码稀疏性的同时能够泛化给定分布，为处理大规模概率分布提供了一种有效的压缩表示方式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about extracting first-order logical formulas from probability distributions for sparse encoding - a theoretical machine learning/knowledge representation topic. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, Visual Language Models, or any of the cross-modal learning methods mentioned in the research profile. The "feature extraction" mentioned is about extracting logical formulas from probability distributions, not visual features from video. This is an entirely different field.

title: Scaling the Long Video Understanding of Multimodal Large Language Models via Visual Memory Mechanism
summary: Long video understanding is a key challenge that plagues the advancement of \emph{Multimodal Large language Models} (MLLMs). In this paper, we study this problem from the perspective of visual memory mechanism, and proposed a novel and training-free approach, termed \emph{Flexible Memory} (\textbf{FlexMem}). In principle, FlexMem aims to mimic human behavior of video watching, \emph{i.e.}, continually watching video content and recalling the most relevant memory fragments to answer the question. In this way, FlexMem can help MLLMs achieve video understanding of infinite lengths, unlike previous methods that process all video information at once and have input upper-limit. Concretely, FlexMem first consider the visual KV caches as the memory sources, and realize the effective memory transfer and writing via a dual-pathway compression design. Afterwards, FlexMem also explores different memory reading strategies for the diverse video understanding tasks, including the popular streaming one. To validate FlexMem, we apply it to two popular video-MLLMs, and conduct extensive experiments on five long video and one streaming video task. The experimental results show that on \textbf{a single 3090 GPU}, our FlexMem can achieve obvious improvements than existing efficient video understanding methods and process more than \textbf{1k frames}, which also helps the base MLLMs achieve comparable or even better performance than SOTA MLLMs on some benchmarks, \emph{e.g.} , GPT-4o and Gemini-1.5 Pro.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的方法FlexMem，通过模拟人类视频观看行为（持续观看视频并回忆最相关的记忆片段）来帮助多模态大语言模型理解无限长度的视频。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解是多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）发展的关键挑战。现有方法需要一次性处理所有视频信息，存在输入长度上限限制，难以处理无限长度的视频。
AI.method: FlexMem将视觉KV缓存作为记忆源，通过双路径压缩设计实现有效的记忆传递和写入，并探索了不同的记忆读取策略以适应多样的视频理解任务，包括流行的流式任务。
AI.result: 在单个3090 GPU上，FlexMem相比现有高效视频理解方法取得明显改进，可处理超过1000帧视频，并帮助基础MLLMs在某些基准测试上达到与SOTA MLLMs（如GPT-4o和Gemini-1.5 Pro）相当或更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: FlexMem是一种有效的无需训练的长视频理解方法，能够帮助MLLMs实现无限长度视频的理解。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on long video understanding for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) - a general Vision-Language AI task, not Computer Graphics. It addresses video understanding (like analyzing YouTube videos), not video generation or 3D motion generation. The research profile specifically needs methods for: (1) quality control of video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), (2) VLM accuracy for quality supervision, (3) bridging 2D video to 3D motion. This paper deals with none of these - it's about scaling video understanding capacity of MLLMs via visual memory mechanism, which is a completely different application domain (general video understanding vs. computer graphics video/motion generation).

title: Measuring the metacognition of AI
summary: A robust decision-making process must take into account uncertainty, especially when the choice involves inherent risks. Because artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly integrated into decision-making workflows, managing uncertainty relies more and more on the metacognitive capabilities of these systems; i.e, their ability to assess the reliability of and regulate their own decisions. Hence, it is crucial to employ robust methods to measure the metacognitive abilities of AI. This paper is primarily a methodological contribution arguing for the adoption of the meta-d' framework, or its model-free alternatives, as the gold standard for assessing the metacognitive sensitivity of AIs--the ability to generate confidence ratings that distinguish correct from incorrect responses. Moreover, we propose to leverage signal detection theory (SDT) to measure the ability of AIs to spontaneously regulate their decisions based on uncertainty and risk. To demonstrate the practical utility of these psychophysical frameworks, we conduct two series of experiments on three large language models (LLMs)--GPT-5, DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp, and Mistral-Medium-2508. In the first experiments, LLMs performed a primary judgment followed by a confidence rating. In the second, LLMs only performed the primary judgment, while we manipulated the risk associated with either response. On the one hand, applying the meta-d' framework allows us to conduct comparisons along three axes: comparing an LLM to optimality, comparing different LLMs on a given task, and comparing the same LLM across different tasks. On the other hand, SDT allows us to assess whether LLMs become more conservative when risks are high.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用meta-d'框架和信号检测理论(SDT)来评估AI系统的元认知能力，即其生成区分正确与错误响应的置信评级的能力，并在三个大型语言模型(GPT-5、DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp、Mistral-Medium-2508)上进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: AI系统日益集成到决策流程中，管理不确定性越来越依赖于这些系统的元认知能力，即评估自身决策可靠性并调节决策的能力。因此，迫切需要采用稳健的方法来测量AI的元认知能力。
AI.method: 采用meta-d'框架（或其无模型替代方案）作为评估AI元认知敏感性的金标准，并利用信号检测理论(SDT)测量AI基于不确定性和风险自发调节决策的能力。实验包括两个系列：第一组实验中LLMs执行主要判断后进行置信评级；第二组实验中LLMs仅执行主要判断，同时操纵与每个响应相关的风险。
AI.result: meta-d'框架允许沿三个轴进行比较：比较LLM与最优性、比较不同LLM在同一任务上的表现、以及比较同一LLM在不同任务上的表现。SDT允许评估LLMs在高风险情况下是否变得更加保守。
AI.conclusion: meta-d'框架和SDT是评估AI元认知能力的有效工具，可用于比较AI系统与人类认知功能的异同，为AI决策的可信性评估提供方法论贡献。

relevance_reason: The paper is about measuring AI metacognition using meta-d' framework and signal detection theory - this is in the domain of AI evaluation/metalearning, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has NO connection to video generation models, 3D motion generation, visual feature extraction, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The target application (testing LLMs' self-confidence assessment) is entirely different from the computer graphics domain focused on video generation, VLM quality supervision, and 3D motion synthesis.

title: Omni-NegCLIP: Enhancing CLIP with Front-Layer Contrastive Fine-Tuning for Comprehensive Negation Understanding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across a wide range of multimodal tasks. However, recent studies have shown that VLMs, such as CLIP, perform poorly in understanding negation expressions, which are common in natural language. In this work, we propose Omni-NegCLIP, a fine-tuned CLIP model that improves CLIP's understanding of two types of negation, namely presence-based negation and absence-based negation, which correspond to negated expressions of objects that are actually present in an image and those that may plausibly exist in an image but are in fact absent, respectively, by modifying CLIP's original InfoNCE contrastive loss. Specifically, we design a presence-based contrastive objective that pulls image embeddings closer to their original caption embeddings while pushing them away from the corresponding presence-based negated caption embeddings, and an absence-based contrastive objective that aligns image embeddings with both original and absence-based negated caption embeddings while maintaining a semantic distinction between the two text embeddings. Based on our observation that the front transformer layers of CLIP text encoder have stronger learning ability for negated text than the later layers, we fine-tune the front transformer layers of the CLIP text encoder at each training step using the combined contrastive objective. Experimental results show that, compared with pretrained CLIP, Omni-NegCLIP improves performance on presence-based negation and absence-based negation tasks by up to 52.65% and 12.50%, respectively, without sacrificing general capability in image-text retrieval and even improving it by up to 19.62%. Compared with prior works, Omni-NegCLIP demonstrates a more comprehensive ability to understand multiple types of negation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出Omni-NegCLIP，通过设计基于存在和基于缺席的两种否定对比目标，并微调CLIP文本编码器的前层transformer，显著提升了CLIP对否定表达的理解能力，同时保持了甚至提升了图像-文本检索性能。
AI.motivation: VLMs（如CLIP）在理解自然语言中的否定表达方面表现不佳，这是一个实际存在且需要解决的问题。
AI.method: 通过修改CLIP的InfoNCE对比损失，设计了两种对比目标：1）基于存在的否定对比目标，将图像嵌入拉近原始 caption 嵌入，同时推离基于存在的否定 caption 嵌入；2）基于缺席的否定对比目标，将图像嵌入与原始和基于缺席的否定 caption 嵌入对齐，同时保持两种文本嵌入之间的语义区分。此外，基于观察到CLIP文本编码器的前层transformer对否定文本具有更强的学习能力，在每个训练步骤中微调前层transformer层。
AI.result: 与预训练CLIP相比，Omni-NegCLIP在基于存在的否定任务上提升了高达52.65%，在基于缺席的否定任务上提升了12.50%，且在图像-文本检索任务上不仅没有牺牲一般能力，反而提升了高达19.62%。
AI.conclusion: Omni-NegCLIP在理解多种类型的否定任务上展现出更全面的能力，为提升VLM对否定表达的理解提供了一种有效的微调方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on improving CLIP's understanding of negation in text (NLP task), which is fundamentally different from Computer Graphics. While the profile mentions VLM for quality supervision, this paper specifically addresses negation understanding in image-text pairs - not video generation quality control, not 3D motion generation, and not bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domain is multimodal NLP/VLM research, not computer graphics or video/motion generation. The methods (contrastive fine-tuning for negation) are not applicable to the profile's video generation and 3D motion generation needs.

title: Symphony for Medical Coding: A Next-Generation Agentic System for Scalable and Explainable Medical Coding
summary: Medical coding translates free-text clinical documentation into standardized codes drawn from classification systems that contain tens of thousands of entries and are updated annually. It is central to billing, clinical research, and quality reporting, yet remains largely manual, slow, and error-prone. Existing automated approaches learn to predict a fixed set of codes from labeled data, thereby preventing adaptation to new codes or different coding systems without retraining on different data. They also provide no explanation for their predictions, limiting trust in safety-critical settings. We introduce Symphony for Medical Coding, a system that approaches the task the way expert human coders do: by reasoning over the clinical narrative with direct access to the coding guidelines. This design allows Symphony to operate across any coding system and to provide span-level evidence linking each predicted code to the text that supports it. We evaluate on two public benchmarks and three real-world datasets spanning inpatient, outpatient, emergency, and subspecialty settings across the United States and the United Kingdom. Symphony achieves state-of-the-art results across all settings, establishing itself as a flexible, deployment-ready foundation for automated clinical coding.

AI.tldr: 一种名为Symphony的医学编码系统，模仿人类专家编码员工作方式，通过访问编码指南进行推理，可跨任何编码系统工作并提供预测依据，在多个数据集上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 医学编码是将临床文档转换为标准化代码，对账单、临床研究和质量报告至关重要。然而现有方法只能预测固定代码集，无法适应新代码或不同编码系统，且缺乏可解释性，难以在安全关键场景中建立信任。
AI.method: 提出Symphony系统，模仿人类专家编码员的方式工作：通过推理临床叙述并直接访问编码指南来进行编码。该设计允许系统跨任何编码系统运行，并提供span级别的证据链接，将每个预测代码与支持它的文本关联起来。
AI.result: 在两个公共基准和三个真实世界数据集上评估，覆盖美国和英国的门诊、住院、急诊和专科设置。Symphony在所有设置中均达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Symphony成为一个灵活的、可直接部署的自动化临床编码基础方案，能够解决传统方法无法适应新编码系统和缺乏可解释性的问题。

title: Unbiased Model Prediction Without Using Protected Attribute Information
summary: The problem of bias persists in the deep learning community as models continue to provide disparate performance across different demographic subgroups. Therefore, several algorithms have been proposed to improve the fairness of deep models. However, a majority of these algorithms utilize the protected attribute information for bias mitigation, which severely limits their application in real-world scenarios. To address this concern, we have proposed a novel algorithm, termed as \textbf{Non-Protected Attribute-based Debiasing (NPAD)} algorithm for bias mitigation, that does not require the protected attribute information. The proposed NPAD algorithm utilizes the auxiliary information provided by the non-protected attributes to optimize the model for bias mitigation. Further, two different loss functions, \textbf{Debiasing via Attribute Cluster Loss (DACL)} and \textbf{Filter Redundancy Loss (FRL)} have been proposed to optimize the model for fairness goals. Multiple experiments are performed on the LFWA and CelebA datasets for facial attribute prediction, and a significant reduction in bias across different gender and age subgroups is observed.

AI.tldr: 针对深度学习模型中的偏见问题，提出了一种无需受保护属性信息的去偏算法NPAD，通过DACL和FRL两种损失函数利用非受保护属性的辅助信息实现偏见缓解，在面部属性预测任务上取得了显著的去偏效果.
AI.motivation: 现有大多数去偏算法都需要使用受保护属性（如性别、年龄等）信息来减轻模型偏见，但这严重限制了这些算法在实际场景中的应用，因为现实中往往无法获取或使用敏感属性信息.
AI.method: 提出两种损失函数：1) Debiasing via Attribute Cluster Loss (DACL) - 利用非受保护属性的聚类信息来优化模型；2) Filter Redundancy Loss (FRL) - 减少特征表示中的冗余信息，从而实现公平性目标.
AI.result: 在LFWA和CelebA数据集上进行面部属性预测实验，观察到在不同性别和年龄子群体上的偏见显著降低.
AI.conclusion: 所提出的NPAD算法能够在不依赖受保护属性信息的情况下，有效减轻深度学习模型中的偏见，在LFWA和CelebA数据集上的实验证明了该方法在性别和年龄子群体上的显著偏见 reduction，has broad practical application prospects in real-world scenarios.

relevance_reason: This paper is about fairness/bias mitigation in deep learning for facial attribute prediction - completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics (video generation, 3D motion generation, VLM quality control). The application domains are entirely different: this is AI fairness research while the profile is about computer graphics and cross-modal learning. The methods (DACL, FRL for debiasing) have no relevance to video generation models, visual guidance feature extraction, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion.

title: Reinforced Reasoning for End-to-End Retrosynthetic Planning
summary: Retrosynthetic planning is a fundamental task in organic chemistry, yet remains challenging due to its combinatorial complexity. To address this, conventional approaches typically rely on hybrid frameworks that combine single-step predictions with external search heuristics, inevitably fracturing the logical coherence between local molecular transformations and global planning objectives. To bridge this gap and embed sophisticated strategic foresight directly into the model's chemical reasoning, we introduce ReTriP, an end-to-end generative framework that reformulates retrosynthesis as a direct Chain-of-Thought reasoning task. We establish a path-coherent molecular representation and employ a progressive training curriculum that transitions from reasoning distillation to reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, effectively aligning stepwise generation with practical route utility. Empirical evaluation on RetroBench demonstrates that ReTriP achieves state-of-the-art performance, exhibiting superior robustness in long-horizon planning compared to hybrid baselines.

AI.tldr: ReTriP是一个端到端的生成式框架，将逆合成规划重新表述为直接的思维链推理任务，通过路径一致的分子表示和渐进式训练课程（从推理蒸馏到带可验证奖励的强化学习）来实现。
AI.motivation: 逆合成规划是有机化学中的基础任务，但由于其组合复杂性而具有挑战性。传统方法通常依赖混合框架，结合单步预测和外部搜索启发式，这不可避免地破坏了局部分子转化与全局规划目标之间的逻辑连贯性。
AI.method: 建立路径一致的分子表示，采用渐进式训练课程，从推理蒸馏过渡到带可验证奖励的强化学习，有效地将逐步生成与实际路线效用对齐。
AI.result: 在RetroBench上的实证评估表明，ReTriP实现了最先进的性能，在长视野规划方面表现出比混合基线更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ReTriP通过将逆合成重新定义为思维链推理任务，成功地将复杂的战略预见嵌入到模型的化学推理中，解决了传统方法中逻辑连贯性断裂的问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about retrosynthetic planning in organic chemistry - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLMs, 3D motion generation, and feature extraction from video, while this paper addresses molecular synthesis planning with reinforcement learning. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or research area.

title: ConInfer: Context-Aware Inference for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: Training-free open-vocabulary remote sensing segmentation (OVRSS), empowered by vision-language models, has emerged as a promising paradigm for achieving category-agnostic semantic understanding in remote sensing imagery. Existing approaches mainly focus on enhancing feature representations or mitigating modality discrepancies to improve patch-level prediction accuracy. However, such independent prediction schemes are fundamentally misaligned with the intrinsic characteristics of remote sensing data. In real-world applications, remote sensing scenes are typically large-scale and exhibit strong spatial as well as semantic correlations, making isolated patch-wise predictions insufficient for accurate segmentation. To address this limitation, we propose ConInfer, a context-aware inference framework for OVRSS that performs joint prediction across multiple spatial units while explicitly modeling their inter-unit semantic dependencies. By incorporating global contextual cues, our method significantly enhances segmentation consistency, robustness, and generalization in complex remote sensing environments. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently surpasses state-of-the-art per-pixel VLM-based baselines such as SegEarth-OV, achieving average improvements of 2.80% and 6.13% on open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and object extraction tasks, respectively. The implementation code is available at: https://github.com/Dog-Yang/ConInfer

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ConInfer，一个用于开放词汇遥感分割的上下文感知推理框架，通过联合预测多个空间单元并建模单元间的语义依赖关系，解决了传统方法中孤立patch预测与遥感数据空间相关性不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇遥感分割方法主要关注增强特征表示或减少模态差异以提高patch级预测精度，但这种独立预测方案与遥感数据的内在特性严重不对齐。实际应用中遥感场景规模大且存在强烈的空间和语义相关性，孤立的patch-wise预测不足以实现准确分割。
AI.method: 提出ConInfer框架，执行跨多个空间单元的联合预测，同时显式建模单元间的语义依赖关系。通过整合全局上下文线索，增强分割一致性、鲁棒性和复杂遥感环境的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，所提方法一致超越最先进的基于VLM的逐像素基线方法SegEarth-OV，在开放词汇语义分割和目标提取任务上分别实现平均2.80%和6.13%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ConInfer通过上下文感知推理成功解决遥感分割中的空间相关性问题，为开放词汇遥感分割提供了一种新的联合推理范式，代码已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing/satellite image segmentation (Computer Vision), which is completely different from the Computer Graphics field focused on video generation (Wanxiang/Seedance) and 3D motion generation. While both mention VLM, the paper uses VLM for semantic segmentation of aerial imagery, not for quality supervision in video generation or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domain mismatch is fundamental - remote sensing segmentation vs. video/motion generation.

title: Spontaneous Functional Differentiation in Large Language Models: A Brain-Like Intelligence Economy
summary: The evolution of intelligence in artificial systems provides a unique opportunity to identify universal computational principles. Here we show that large language models spontaneously develop synergistic cores where information integration exceeds individual parts remarkably similar to the human brain. Using Integrated Information Decomposition across multiple architectures we find that middle layers exhibit synergistic processing while early and late layers rely on redundancy. This organization is dynamic and emerges as a physical phase transition as task difficulty increases. Crucially ablating synergistic components causes catastrophic performance loss confirming their role as the physical entity of abstract reasoning and bridging artificial and biological intelligence.

AI.tldr: 大型语言模型自发形成类似人脑的协同信息整合核心，中间层负责协同处理而两端层依赖冗余，这随任务难度呈现动态相变，协同组件的消除会严重损害模型性能。
AI.motivation: 人工系统中智力的进化提供了一个独特机会来识别通用计算原则，研究者试图通过大型语言模型揭示类似人脑的计算机制。
AI.method: 使用Integrated Information Decomposition（信息整合分解）跨多个架构进行分析，探究信息整合与不同层次的关系。
AI.result: 中间层表现出协同处理（synergistic processing），而早期和晚期层依赖冗余（redundancy）；这种组织是动态的，随任务难度增加呈现物理相变；关键的是，消除协同组件会导致灾难性性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 协同处理是抽象推理的物理实体，弥合了人工和生物智能之间的差距。这一发现为理解AI系统的内部工作机制提供了新的理论框架。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics with focus on video generation, 3D motion generation, VLMs, and feature extraction - all practical AI/ML applications in graphics. The paper is about Large Language Model interpretability using information theory (Integrated Information Decomposition) to study brain-like computation in LLMs. This is theoretical AI research with no connection to computer graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. The application domains are entirely different.

title: MaskAdapt: Learning Flexible Motion Adaptation via Mask-Invariant Prior for Physics-Based Characters
summary: We present MaskAdapt, a framework for flexible motion adaptation in physics-based humanoid control. The framework follows a two-stage residual learning paradigm. In the first stage, we train a mask-invariant base policy using stochastic body-part masking and a regularization term that enforces consistent action distributions across masking conditions. This yields a robust motion prior that remains stable under missing observations, anticipating later adaptation in those regions. In the second stage, a residual policy is trained atop the frozen base controller to modify only the targeted body parts while preserving the original behaviors elsewhere. We demonstrate the versatility of this design through two applications: (i) motion composition, where varying masks enable multi-part adaptation within a single sequence, and (ii) text-driven partial goal tracking, where designated body parts follow kinematic targets provided by a pre-trained text-conditioned autoregressive motion generator. Through experiments, MaskAdapt demonstrates strong robustness and adaptability, producing diverse behaviors under masked observations and delivering superior targeted motion adaptation compared to prior work.

AI.tldr: MaskAdapt是一个用于物理人形控制的灵活运动适应框架，通过两阶段残差学习实现部分身体部位的目标导向适应，支持运动合成和文本驱动跟踪应用。
AI.motivation: 解决物理人形控制在面对部分观测时的运动适应问题，特别是需要灵活地对特定身体部位进行目标导向的修改，同时保持其他部位的原始行为。
AI.method: 采用两阶段残差学习框架：第一阶段使用随机身体部位掩码和正则化项训练掩码不变的基线策略，使动作分布在不同掩码条件下保持一致；第二阶段在冻结的基线控制器上训练残差策略，仅修改目标身体部位的行为。
AI.result: 实验表明MaskAdapt在掩码观测下具有强鲁棒性和适应性，能够在单个序列中通过不同掩码实现多部位适应，并在文本驱动的部分目标跟踪任务中优于先前的工作。
AI.conclusion: MaskAdapt框架通过两阶段残差学习范式实现了灵活的运动适应，在运动合成和文本驱动的部分目标跟踪两个应用中都表现出色的鲁棒性和适应性，优于先前的工作。该框架能够仅修改目标身体部位同时保留其他部位的行为，为物理人形控制中的运动适应提供了一种有效且通用的方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses physics-based character control for humanoid robots using reinforcement learning, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. While both fields deal with "motion," this paper is about physical simulation control (robotics/game physics), not video generation or video-to-3D motion extraction. The methods (RL, residual learning) and application domain (physics simulation) have no overlap with the research profile's pain points.

title: CausalPulse: An Industrial-Grade Neurosymbolic Multi-Agent Copilot for Causal Diagnostics in Smart Manufacturing
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables, Accepted at AAAI-MAKE 2026 (AAAI Spring Symposium on Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering for Knowledge-Grounded Semantic Agents)
summary: Modern manufacturing environments demand real-time, trustworthy, and interpretable root-cause insights to sustain productivity and quality. Traditional analytics pipelines often treat anomaly detection, causal inference, and root-cause analysis as isolated stages, limiting scalability and explainability. In this work, we present CausalPulse, an industry-grade multi-agent copilot that automates causal diagnostics in smart manufacturing. It unifies anomaly detection, causal discovery, and reasoning through a neurosymbolic architecture built on standardized agentic protocols. CausalPulse is being deployed in a Robert Bosch manufacturing plant, integrating seamlessly with existing monitoring workflows and supporting real-time operation at production scale. Evaluations on both public (Future Factories) and proprietary (Planar Sensor Element) datasets show high reliability, achieving overall success rates of 98.0% and 98.73%. Per-criterion success rates reached 98.75% for planning and tool use, 97.3% for self-reflection, and 99.2% for collaboration. Runtime experiments report end-to-end latency of 50-60s per diagnostic workflow with near-linear scalability (R^2=0.97), confirming real-time readiness. Comparison with existing industrial copilots highlights distinct advantages in modularity, extensibility, and deployment maturity. These results demonstrate how CausalPulse's modular, human-in-the-loop design enables reliable, interpretable, and production-ready automation for next-generation manufacturing.

AI.tldr: CausalPulse是一个工业级多智能体副驾驶系统，用于智能制造中的因果诊断，通过神经符号架构统一异常检测、因果发现和推理，在博世制造厂部署后在两个数据集上达到98%+的成功率，具备50-60秒延迟和近线性可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统分析流程将异常检测、因果推理和根因分析视为孤立阶段，限制了可扩展性和可解释性。现代制造环境需要实时、可信和可解释的根因洞察来维持生产率和质量。
AI.method: 提出了一种神经符号架构，建立在标准化智能体协议之上，统一了异常检测、因果发现和推理三个阶段。该系统采用多智能体协作模式，包含规划与工具使用、自我反思和协作等关键能力模块。
AI.result: 在Future Factories和Planar Sensor Element两个数据集上分别达到98.0%和98.73%的总体成功率；规划与工具使用达98.75%，自我反思达97.3%，协作达99.2%；端到端延迟50-60秒，具有近线性可扩展性(R²=0.97)；相比现有工业副驾驶具有模块化、可扩展性和部署成熟度的优势。
AI.conclusion: CausalPulse通过其模块化、可扩展的神经符号架构，成功实现了工业级制造环境中的因果诊断自动化。该系统在罗伯特·博世制造厂的部署表明其能够与现有监控系统无缝集成，支持生产规模的实时运行。其高成功率（98%+）、低延迟（50-60秒）和近线性可扩展性验证了下一代制造中可靠、可解释的自动化潜力。

While both involve "quality control" concepts, this paper addresses manufacturing defect detection and root cause analysis in factory settings, NOT video generation quality control or 3D motion generation. title: Tracking vs. Deciding: The Dual-Capability Bottleneck in Searchless Chess Transformers
summary:
A human-like chess engine should mimic the style, errors, and consistency of a strong human player rather than maximize playing strength. We show that training from move sequences alone forces a model to learn two capabilities: state tracking, which reconstructs the board from move history, and decision quality, which selects good moves from that reconstructed state. These impose contradictory data requirements: low-rated games provide the diversity needed for tracking, while high-rated games provide the quality signal for decision learning. Removing low-rated data degrades performance.
  We formalize this tension as a dual-capability bottleneck, P <= min(T,Q), where overall performance is limited by the weaker capability. Guided by this view, we scale the model from 28M to 120M parameters to improve tracking, then introduce Elo-weighted training to improve decisions while preserving diversity. A 2 x 2 factorial ablation shows that scaling improves tracking, weighting improves decisions, and their combination is superadditive. Linear weighting works best, while overly aggressive weighting harms tracking despite lower validation loss. We also introduce a coverage-decay formula, t* = log(N/kcrit)/log b, as a reliability horizon for intra-game degeneration risk.
  Our final 120M-parameter model, without search, reached Lichess bullet 2570 over 253 rated games. On human move prediction it achieves 55.2% Top-1 accuracy, exceeding Maia-2 rapid and Maia-2 blitz. Unlike position-based methods, sequence input naturally encodes full game history, enabling history-dependent decisions that single-position models cannot exhibit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种人类风格的象棋引擎训练方法，通过从棋步序列学习状态跟踪和决策质量两种能力，最终120M参数模型在Lichess bullet达到2570评分，人类棋步预测Top-1准确率达55.2%，超过Maia-2。
AI.motivation: 当前象棋引擎追求最大化棋力，但人类风格引擎应该模仿强人类的风格、错误和一致性。现有方法忽略了一个关键问题：从棋步序列训练要求模型同时学习两种能力——状态跟踪（从棋步历史重构棋盘）和决策质量（从重构的棋盘选择好棋），这两种能力对数据有矛盾的需求——低评级比赛提供跟踪所需的多样性，高评级比赛提供决策学习的质量信号。
AI.method: 1. 将模型从28M扩展到120M参数以改善状态跟踪；2. 引入Elo加权训练以改善决策同时保持多样性；3. 2x2因子消融实验验证各因素效果；4. 使用线性加权（过激加权会损害跟踪）；5. 提出覆盖率衰减公式t* = log(N/kcrit)/log b作为可靠性边界。
AI.result: 最终120M参数模型（无搜索）在Lichess bullet达到2570评分（253场比赛）。人类棋步预测Top-1准确率达55.2%，超过Maia-2 rapid和Maia-2 blitz。扩展改善跟踪，加权改善决策，组合效果超叠加。
AI.conclusion: 序列输入方法自然编码完整棋局历史，支持位置模型无法实现的历史依赖决策。模型扩展提升状态跟踪能力，Elo加权训练提升决策质量，二者结合产生超叠加效应。线性加权效果最佳，过度激进的加权虽降低验证损失但损害跟踪能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about chess engine training (game AI), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and 3D motion generation - all in computer graphics. This paper addresses none of those areas. Even though it uses transformer architecture, the application domain (chess/game AI) is entirely different from the target domain (video/motion generation in computer graphics).

title: GazeCLIP: Gaze-Guided CLIP with Adaptive-Enhanced Fine-Grained Language Prompt for Deepfake Attribution and Detection
summary: Current deepfake attribution or deepfake detection works tend to exhibit poor generalization to novel generative methods due to the limited exploration in visual modalities alone. They tend to assess the attribution or detection performance of models on unseen advanced generators, coarsely, and fail to consider the synergy of the two tasks. To this end, we propose a novel gaze-guided CLIP with adaptive-enhanced fine-grained language prompts for fine-grained deepfake attribution and detection (DFAD). Specifically, we conduct a novel and fine-grained benchmark to evaluate the DFAD performance of networks on novel generators like diffusion and flow models. Additionally, we introduce a gaze-aware model based on CLIP, which is devised to enhance the generalization to unseen face forgery attacks. Built upon the novel observation that there are significant distribution differences between pristine and forged gaze vectors, and the preservation of the target gaze in facial images generated by GAN and diffusion varies significantly, we design a visual perception encoder to employ the inherent gaze differences to mine global forgery embeddings across appearance and gaze domains. We propose a gaze-aware image encoder (GIE) that fuses forgery gaze prompts extracted via a gaze encoder with common forged image embeddings to capture general attribution patterns, allowing features to be transformed into a more stable and common DFAD feature space. We build a language refinement encoder (LRE) to generate dynamically enhanced language embeddings via an adaptive-enhanced word selector for precise vision-language matching. Extensive experiments on our benchmark show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art by 6.56% ACC and 5.32% AUC in average performance under the attribution and detection settings, respectively. Codes will be available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注视引导的CLIP模型，用于细粒度深度伪造归因与检测，通过挖掘注视差异和动态语言提示提升对未知生成器的泛化能力，在基准测试中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前深度伪造归因/检测方法对新型生成方法（如扩散模型和流模型）的泛化能力较差，仅依赖视觉模态，忽略了两个任务的协同作用，且对新型生成器的评估不够细致。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于CLIP的注视引导模型，包含注视感知图像编码器（GIE）和语言细化编码器（LRE）。GIE利用真实与伪造图像之间的注视差异挖掘全局伪造特征；LRE通过自适应增强的词汇选择器生成动态语言嵌入。
AI.result: 在归因任务上平均提升6.56% ACC，检测任务上平均提升5.32% AUC。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入注视信息作为辅助特征，显著提升了模型对未知人脸伪造攻击的泛化能力，为深度伪造归因与检测提供了一种新的思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about deepfake detection/attribution using CLIP and gaze-guided features - this is a computer vision security task, NOT computer graphics/video generation. While the paper uses VLM-related methods (CLIP), the application domain is completely different: deepfake detection vs video generation, quality control, and 3D motion generation. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (video generation quality control, bridging 2D-3D motion domain gap, VLM for video quality supervision). This is a security/forensics paper that happens to use similar VLM methods but in a completely different application domain.

title: Owl-AuraID 1.0: An Intelligent System for Autonomous Scientific Instrumentation and Scientific Data Analysis
summary: Scientific discovery increasingly depends on high-throughput characterization, yet automation is hindered by proprietary GUIs and the limited generalizability of existing API-based systems. We present Owl-AuraID, a software-hardware collaborative embodied agent system that adopts a GUI-native paradigm to operate instruments through the same interfaces as human experts.
