Its skill-centric framework integrates Type-1 (GUI operation) and Type-2 (data analysis) skills into end-to-end workflows, connecting physical sample handling with scientific interpretation. Owl-AuraID demonstrates broad coverage across ten categories of precision instruments and diverse workflows, including multimodal spectral analysis, microscopic imaging, and crystallographic analysis, supporting modalities such as FTIR, NMR, AFM, and TGA. Overall, Owl-AuraID provides a practical, extensible foundation for autonomous laboratories and illustrates a path toward evolving laboratory intelligence through reusable operational and analytical skills. The code are available at https://github.com/OpenOwlab/AuraID.

AI.tldr: Owl-AuraID是一种具身智能体系统，通过GUI原生范式操作精密科学仪器，整合GUI操作与数据分析技能，实现端到端的自动化实验室工作流，支持FTIR、NMR、AFM、TGA等十类仪器，为自主实验室提供可扩展解决方案。
AI.motivation: 科学发现越来越依赖高通量表征，但自动化受到专有GUI和现有基于API系统的有限通用性的阻碍。
AI.method: 提出Owl-AuraID软件硬件协作的具身智能体系统，采用GUI原生范式通过与人类专家相同的界面操作仪器。其技能中心化框架将Type-1（GUI操作）和Type-2（数据分析）技能整合到端到端工作流中，将物理样品处理与科学解释相连接。
AI.result: 在十类精密仪器和多样化工作流上展示了广泛覆盖，包括多模态光谱分析、显微镜成像和晶体学分析，支持FTIR、NMR、AFM和TGA等表征手段。
AI.conclusion: Owl-AuraID为自主实验室提供了实用且可扩展的基础设施，通过可重用的操作和分析技能为实验室智能的演进开辟了道路。该系统展示了在多种精密仪器上的广泛适用性，包括FTIR、NMR、AFM和TGA等表征手段，为自动化科学研究奠定了技术基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about an embodied AI system for autonomous scientific instrumentation (FTIR, NMR, AFM, TGA) - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, and 3D motion generation. This paper addresses laboratory automation and scientific data analysis, not computer graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - scientific instrumentation vs. graphics/motion generation.

title: MotionScale: Reconstructing Appearance, Geometry, and Motion of Dynamic Scenes with Scalable 4D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Realistic reconstruction of dynamic 4D scenes from monocular videos is essential for understanding the physical world. Despite recent progress in neural rendering, existing methods often struggle to recover accurate 3D geometry and temporally consistent motion in complex environments. To address these challenges, we propose MotionScale, a 4D Gaussian Splatting framework that scales efficiently to large scenes and extended sequences while maintaining high-fidelity structural and motion coherence. At the core of our approach is a scalable motion field parameterized by cluster-centric basis transformations that adaptively expand to capture diverse and evolving motion patterns. To ensure robust reconstruction over long durations, we introduce a progressive optimization strategy comprising two decoupled propagation stages: 1) A background extension stage that adapts to newly visible regions, refines camera poses, and explicitly models transient shadows; 2) A foreground propagation stage that enforces motion consistency through a specialized three-stage refinement process. Extensive experiments on challenging real-world benchmarks demonstrate that MotionScale significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both reconstruction quality and temporal stability. Project page: https://hrzhou2.github.io/motion-scale-web/.

AI.tldr: 提出MotionScale，一个用于从单目视频重建动态4D场景的高效高保真 Gaussian Splatting框架，通过可扩展运动场和渐进式优化策略解决大场景和长序列的4D重建问题
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法在复杂环境中难以恢复准确的3D几何和时间一致的运动
AI.method: 提出MotionScale框架，采用基于聚类中心基变换的可扩展运动场参数化，包含两个解耦的传播阶段：背景扩展阶段和前景传播阶段（三阶段细化）
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的真实世界基准测试上展示了对最先进方法的显著超越
AI.conclusion: MotionScale显著优于现有最先进的重建方法，在重建质量和时间稳定性方面都有明显提升。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 4D scene reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting, which is a different application domain than video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and cross-modal knowledge distillation. While both are in Computer Graphics, this paper focuses on reconstructing dynamic scenes from video (inverse graphics problem), not on generating videos or using VLMs for quality control. The methods and goals are fundamentally different - this is about 3D reconstruction rather than video generation or quality assessment.

title: Self-Consistency for LLM-Based Motion Trajectory Generation and Verification
summary: Self-consistency has proven to be an effective technique for improving LLM performance on natural language reasoning tasks in a lightweight, unsupervised manner. In this work, we study how to adapt self-consistency to visual domains. Specifically, we consider the generation and verification of LLM-produced motion graphics trajectories. Given a prompt (e.g., "Move the circle in a spiral path"), we first sample diverse motion trajectories from an LLM, and then identify groups of consistent trajectories via clustering. Our key insight is to model the family of shapes associated with a prompt as a prototype trajectory paired with a group of geometric transformations (e.g., rigid, similarity, and affine). Two trajectories can then be considered consistent if one can be transformed into the other under the warps allowable by the transformation group. We propose an algorithm that automatically recovers a shape family, using hierarchical relationships between a set of candidate transformation groups. Our approach improves the accuracy of LLM-based trajectory generation by 4-6%. We further extend our method to support verification, observing 11% precision gains over VLM baselines. Our code and dataset are available at https://majiaju.io/trajectory-self-consistency .

AI.tldr: 将自洽性（self-consistency）技术从自然语言领域扩展到视觉领域，用于改进LLM生成的运动图形轨迹质量。通过对LLM采样的轨迹进行聚类，并利用几何变换（刚性、相似性、仿射）建模形状家族来判断轨迹一致性。
AI.motivation: 自洽性技术在自然语言推理任务中已证明有效，但如何将其适应到视觉领域仍未被探索。具体需要解决LLM生成的运动图形轨迹的验证问题。
AI.method: 1) 给定提示词，从LLM采样多样化的运动轨迹；2) 通过聚类识别一致轨迹组；3) 将形状家族建模为原型轨迹+几何变换组（刚性、相似性、仿射）；4) 如果轨迹可通过变换组相互转换，则视为一致；5) 使用候选变换组之间的层次关系自动恢复形状家族。
AI.result: 轨迹生成准确率提升4-6%；验证任务精确度比VLM基线提升11%。
AI.conclusion: 成功将自洽性技术适配到视觉领域，在运动图形轨迹生成和验证任务上取得显著性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on LLM-based motion trajectory generation and verification using geometric transformations, which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance) and VLMs for video quality control. While both relate to computer graphics and motion/trajectory generation, the methods differ significantly - the profile emphasizes video generation and VLM-based quality supervision, whereas this paper uses LLMs with geometric transformation clustering. The paper does address quality verification but for motion trajectories rather than video generation quality control, making it moderately but not highly relevant.

title: Spatiotemporal Robustness of Temporal Logic Tasks using Multi-Objective Reasoning
summary: The reliability of autonomous systems depends on their robustness, i.e., their ability to meet their objectives under uncertainty. In this paper, we study spatiotemporal robustness of temporal logic specifications evaluated over discrete-time signals. Existing work has proposed robust semantics that capture not only Boolean satisfiability, but also the geometric distance from unsatisfiability, corresponding to admissible spatial perturbations of a given signal. In contrast, we propose spatiotemporal robustness (STR), which captures admissible spatial and temporal perturbations jointly. This notion is particularly informative for interacting systems, such as multi-agent robotics, smart cities, and air traffic control. We define STR as a multi-objective reasoning problem, formalized via a partial order over spatial and temporal perturbations. This perspective has two key advantages: (1) STR can be interpreted as a Pareto-optimal set that characterizes all admissible spatiotemporal perturbations, and (2) STR can be computed using tools from multi-objective optimization. To navigate computational challenges, we propose robust semantics for STR that are sound in the sense of suitably under-approximating STR while being computationally tractable. Finally, we present monitoring algorithms for STR using these robust semantics. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to deal with robustness across multiple dimensions via multi-objective reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究时空鲁棒性(STR)，一种将空间和时间扰动联合建模的多维鲁棒性度量，用于时序逻辑规范的分析。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒语义仅考虑空间扰动，无法同时捕捉时序逻辑规范在空间和时间维度上的扰动需求，特别是在多智能体机器人、智慧城市和空中交通管制等交互系统中。
AI.method: 将STR形式化为多目标推理问题，通过空间和时间扰动上的偏序关系定义，并利用多目标优化工具计算帕累托最优解集。
AI.result: 提出了STR的形式化定义和计算方法，设计了计算上易于处理的鲁棒语义进行下界近似，并给出了相应的监控算法。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个通过多目标推理方法处理多维鲁棒性的工作，为自主系统在不确定性下的可靠性分析提供了新的理论框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about formal methods, temporal logic, and multi-objective optimization for robustness analysis in robotics/control systems (multi-agent robots, smart cities, air traffic control). It is NOT about Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D motion generation, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (Wanxiang, Seedance, VLM, feature extraction, cross-modal knowledge distillation). The application domain is completely different - this is control theory/robotics, not computer graphics.

title: FOSCU: Feasibility of Synthetic MRI Generation via Duo-Diffusion Models for Enhancement of 3D U-Nets in Hepatic Segmentation
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at IEEE APCCAS 2025
summary: Medical image segmentation faces fundamental challenges including restricted access, costly annotation, and data shortage to clinical datasets through Picture Archiving and Communication Systems (PACS). These systemic barriers significantly impede the development of robust segmentation algorithms. To address these challenges, we propose FOSCU, which integrates Duo-Diffusion, a 3D latent diffusion model with ControlNet that simultaneously generates high-resolution, anatomically realistic synthetic MRI volumes and corresponding segmentation labels, and an enhanced 3D U-Net training pipeline. Duo-Diffusion employs segmentation-conditioned diffusion to ensure spatial consistency and precise anatomical detail in the generated data. Experimental evaluation on 720 abdominal MRI scans shows that models trained with combined real and synthetic data yield a mean Dice score gain of 0.67% over those using only real data, and achieve a 36.4% reduction in Fréchet Inception Distance (FID), reflecting enhanced image fidelity.

AI.tldr: FOSCU提出了一种结合3D潜在扩散模型ControlNet的医学图像合成框架 Duo-Diffusion，可生成高分辨率解剖真实的合成MRI volumes及其分割标签，有效缓解临床数据短缺和标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临临床数据集获取受限、标注成本高和数据短缺等系统性障碍，严重阻碍了鲁棒分割算法的发展。
AI.method: 提出FOSCU框架，集成Duo-Diffusion（3D潜在扩散模型+ControlNet）和增强的3D U-Net训练 pipeline。Duo-Diffusion采用分割条件扩散确保生成数据的空间一致性和精确解剖细节。
AI.result: 在720例腹部MRI扫描上评估，使用真实+合成数据训练的模型比仅用真实数据训练的模型平均Dice分数提升0.67%，Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)降低36.4%，图像保真度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: FOSCU框架通过扩散模型合成逼真的医学图像和分割标签，能有效扩充训练数据，在 Dice分数和图像质量指标上均取得提升，为解决医学图像数据短缺问题提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about medical MRI image synthesis for hepatic segmentation - a completely different application domain than computer graphics video generation and 3D motion generation. While both use diffusion models, the domain, purpose, and target are entirely different. This paper doesn't address any of the four pain points (video feature extraction, video model quality control, VLM supervision accuracy, or 2D-to-3D domain bridging). Medical image synthesis is medical AI, not computer graphics.

title: A Rational Account of Categorization Based on Information Theory
summary: We present a new theory of categorization based on an information-theoretic rational analysis. To evaluate this theory, we investigate how well it can account for key findings from classic categorization experiments conducted by Hayes-Roth and Hayes-Roth (1977), Medin and Schaffer (1978), and Smith and Minda (1998). We find that it explains the human categorization behavior at least as well (or better) than the independent cue and context models (Medin & Schaffer, 1978), the rational model of categorization (Anderson, 1991), and a hierarchical Dirichlet process model (Griffiths et al., 2007).

AI.tldr: 提出基于信息论理性分析的新分类理论，通过与经典分类实验对比验证，表明该理论在解释人类分类行为方面优于或等同于现有主要分类模型。
AI.motivation: 需要提出新的分类理论来更好地解释人类分类认知机制，之前的理论在解释经典实验结果方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过将新理论与经典分类实验（Hayes-Roth & Hayes-Roth 1977; Medin & Schaffer 1978; Smith & Minda 1998）的结果进行对比，评估其对人类分类行为的解释能力，并与四种现有模型进行比较。
AI.result: 该新理论能够解释经典分类实验中的人类分类行为，且解释效果至少与独立线索和上下文模型、理性模型、层次Dirichlet过程模型相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 该信息论理性分析理论在解释人类分类行为方面表现出色，至少与现有主要模型（独立线索和上下文模型、理性模型、层次Dirichlet过程模型）相当或更优，为分类认知机制提供了新的理论框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cognitive science/psychology - specifically human categorization behavior analyzed through information theory. It has NO relationship to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, and 3D motion generation - all applied computer graphics. This paper addresses none of these areas. It's a theoretical psychology paper comparing categorization models against classic psychology experiments (Hayes-Roth, Medin & Schaffer, Smith & Minda). Complete application domain mismatch - it's not about computer graphics at all.

title: ATP-Bench: Towards Agentic Tool Planning for MLLM Interleaved Generation
summary: Interleaved text-and-image generation represents a significant frontier for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), offering a more intuitive way to convey complex information. Current paradigms rely on either image generation or retrieval augmentation, yet they typically treat the two as mutually exclusive paths, failing to unify factuality with creativity. We argue that the next milestone in this field is Agentic Tool Planning, where the model serves as a central controller that autonomously determines when, where, and which tools to invoke to produce interleaved responses for visual-critical queries. To systematically evaluate this paradigm, we introduce ATP-Bench, a novel benchmark comprising 7,702 QA pairs (including 1,592 VQA pairs) across eight categories and 25 visual-critical intents, featuring human-verified queries and ground truths. Furthermore, to evaluate agentic planning independent of end-to-end execution and changing tool backends, we propose a Multi-Agent MLLM-as-a-Judge (MAM) system. MAM evaluates tool-call precision, identifies missed opportunities for tool use, and assesses overall response quality without requiring ground-truth references. Our extensive experiments on 10 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal that models struggle with coherent interleaved planning and exhibit significant variations in tool-use behavior, highlighting substantial room for improvement and providing actionable guidance for advancing interleaved generation. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/ATP-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATP-Bench基准和MAM评估系统，用于评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的智能体工具规划能力，以实现交错的文本-图像生成。
AI.motivation: 当前的交错文本-图像生成范式将图像生成和检索增强视为互斥路径，无法统一事实性与创造力。现有模型在工具调用规划和协同方面存在显著不足。
AI.method: 1) 构建ATP-Bench基准：包含7,702个问答对(其中1,592个VQA对)，涵盖8个类别和25个视觉关键意图，采用人工验证的查询和真值；2) 提出Multi-Agent MLLM-as-a-Judge(MAM)系统：评估工具调用精度、识别工具使用遗漏机会、评估整体响应质量。
AI.result: 在10个最先进的MLLMs上进行广泛实验，结果显示模型在连贯的交错规划方面存在困难，工具使用行为表现出显著差异，存在很大的改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作为推进交错生成研究提供了可操作的指导方向，表明智能体工具规划是下一个重要里程碑。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on tool planning for MLLM interleaved text-image generation - a completely different application domain from computer graphics video generation and 3D motion generation. While both involve VLMs, the paper addresses tool call planning and coordination in text-image generation tasks (like DALL-E image generation), not video generation, 3D motion, or visual feature extraction for video-to-motion pipelines. The application domain is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on Wanxiang/Seedance video generation, quality control, and 2D video to 3D motion bridging.

title: Uncertainty-Aware Trajectory Prediction: A Unified Framework Harnessing Positional and Semantic Uncertainties
summary: Trajectory prediction seeks to forecast the future motion of dynamic entities, such as vehicles and pedestrians, given a temporal horizon of historical movement data and environmental context. A central challenge in this domain is the inherent uncertainty in real-time maps, arising from two primary sources: (1) positional inaccuracies due to sensor limitations or environmental occlusions, and (2) semantic errors stemming from misinterpretations of scene context. To address these challenges, we propose a novel unified framework that jointly models positional and semantic uncertainties and explicitly integrates them into the trajectory prediction pipeline. Our approach employs a dual-head architecture to independently estimate semantic and positional predictions in a dual-pass manner, deriving prediction variances as uncertainty indicators in an end-to-end fashion. These uncertainties are subsequently fused with the semantic and positional predictions to enhance the robustness of trajectory forecasts. We evaluate our uncertainty-aware framework on the nuScenes real-world driving dataset, conducting extensive experiments across four map estimation methods and two trajectory prediction baselines. Results verify that our method (1) effectively quantifies map uncertainties through both positional and semantic dimensions, and (2) consistently improves the performance of existing trajectory prediction models across multiple metrics, including minimum Average Displacement Error (minADE), minimum Final Displacement Error (minFDE), and Miss Rate (MR). Code will available at https://github.com/JT-Sun/UATP.

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一框架(UATP)联合建模位置和语义不确定性，通过双头架构端到端估计预测方差，并在nuScenes数据集上验证了方法的有有效性。
AI.motivation: 真实地图存在两类不确定性：(1)由于传感器限制或环境遮挡导致的位置误差；(2)场景上下文误判导致的语义错误。这些不确定性直接影响轨迹预测的准确性。
AI.method: 采用双头架构独立估计语义和位置预测，以双通道方式推导预测方差作为不确定性指标，端到端地获取不确定性，并将这些不确定性与语义和位置预测融合以增强轨迹预测的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法有效量化了地图在位置和语义维度上的不确定性，并在四种地图估计方法和两种轨迹预测基线模型上持续提升了性能指标，包括minADE、minFDE和Miss Rate。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架(UATP)通过双头架构联合建模位置和语义不确定性，并在nuScenes数据集上验证了方法的有效性，在minADE、minFDE和MR指标上均提升了现有轨迹预测模型的性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving trajectory prediction using uncertainty quantification, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), Visual Language Models, or 3D character motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - this deals with vehicle trajectories on roads, not visual content generation or 3D motion synthesis for graphics.

title: C-TRAIL: A Commonsense World Framework for Trajectory Planning in Autonomous Driving
summary: Trajectory planning for autonomous driving increasingly leverages large language models (LLMs) for commonsense reasoning, yet LLM outputs are inherently unreliable, posing risks in safety-critical applications. We propose C-TRAIL, a framework built on a Commonsense World that couples LLM-derived commonsense with a trust mechanism to guide trajectory planning. C-TRAIL operates through a closed-loop Recall, Plan, and Update cycle: the Recall module queries an LLM for semantic relations and quantifies their reliability via a dual-trust mechanism; the Plan module injects trust-weighted commonsense into Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) through a Dirichlet trust policy; and the Update module adaptively refines trust scores and policy parameters from environmental feedback. Experiments on four simulated scenarios in Highway-env and two real-world levelXData datasets (highD, rounD) show that C-TRAIL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing ADE by 40.2%, FDE by 51.7%, and improving SR by 16.9 percentage points on average. The source code is available at https://github.com/ZhihongCui/CTRAIL.

AI.tldr: C-TRAIL是一个结合常识世界和信任机制的自动驾驶轨迹规划框架，通过LLM-derived常识与蒙特卡洛树搜索的融合，在轨迹规划任务中实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶的轨迹规划越来越依赖大型语言模型(LLM)进行常识推理，但LLM输出本身不可靠，在安全关键应用中存在风险。
AI.method: C-TRAIL采用闭环的Recall、Plan和Update循环：Recall模块查询LLM获取语义关系并通过双重信任机制量化可靠性；Plan模块通过Dirichlet信任策略将信任加权的常识注入蒙特卡洛树搜索(MCTS)；Update模块从环境反馈中自适应地细化信任分数和策略参数。
AI.result: 在Highway-env的四个模拟场景和两个真实世界数据集(highD、rounD)上的实验表明，C-TRAIL始终优于最先进的基线方法，ADE降低40.2%，FDE降低51.7%，SR提高16.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: C-TRAIL通过将LLM的常识推理与信任机制相结合，为自动驾驶轨迹规划提供了一种新颖的解决方案。该框架在模拟和真实世界数据集上均取得了显著的性能提升，证明了其在提升轨迹规划安全性和可靠性方面的潜力。源代码已公开，为后续研究提供了重要资源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving trajectory planning using LLM and MCTS, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), visual language models for quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion - all in the content creation/synthesis domain. C-TRAIL addresses none of these pain points and operates in the robotics/autonomous vehicles domain instead.

title: Assessing Multimodal Chronic Wound Embeddings with Expert Triplet Agreement
summary: Recessive dystrophic epidermolysis bullosa (RDEB) is a rare genetic skin disorder for which clinicians greatly benefit from finding similar cases using images and clinical text. However, off-the-shelf foundation models do not reliably capture clinically meaningful features for this heterogeneous, long-tail disease, and structured measurement of agreement with experts is challenging. To address these gaps, we propose evaluating embedding spaces with expert ordinal comparisons (triplet judgments), which are fast to collect and encode implicit clinical similarity knowledge. We further introduce TriDerm, a multimodal framework that learns interpretable wound representations from small cohorts by integrating wound imagery, boundary masks, and expert reports. On the vision side, TriDerm adapts visual foundation models to RDEB using wound-level attention pooling and non-contrastive representation learning. For text, we prompt large language models with comparison queries and recover medically meaningful representations via soft ordinal embeddings (SOE). We show that visual and textual modalities capture complementary aspects of wound phenotype, and that fusing both modalities yields 73.5% agreement with experts, outperforming the best off-the-shelf single-modality foundation model by over 5.6 percentage points. We make the expert annotation tool, model code and representative dataset samples publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出了TriDerm多模态框架，用于学习罕见皮肤病RDEB的伤口表征，通过视觉基础模型适配（伤口级注意力池和非对比学习）和文本模态的软序数嵌入，实现视觉与文本模态融合，在专家一致性上达到73.5%，比最佳单模态基础模型提升超过5.6个百分点。
AI.motivation: RDEB是一种罕见的遗传性皮肤病，临床医生需要通过图像和临床文本寻找相似病例。现有基础模型无法可靠捕获该异质性、长尾疾病的临床有意义特征，且缺乏结构化测量专家一致性的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于专家序贯比较（三元组判断）来评估嵌入空间；视觉侧使用伤口级注意力池和非对比表征学习适配视觉基础模型；文本侧提示大语言模型进行比较查询，通过软序数嵌入（SOE）恢复医学有意义表征；融合视觉和文本模态。
AI.result: 视觉和文本模态捕获了伤口表型的互补方面，融合双模态达到73.5%的专家一致性，比最佳单模态基础模型提升超过5.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: TriDerm框架通过多模态融合有效提升了RDEB伤口表征的临床相关性，为罕见病图像检索提供了新思路，且公开了注释工具、模型代码和代表性数据集。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (chronic wound embeddings for RDEB skin disease), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While the research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control for video generation, this paper addresses medical wound characterization and clinical diagnosis. Even though both use Visual Language Models, they are applied in entirely different domains - medical/healthcare vs. computer graphics/video generation. The pain points, application domain, and research goals have no overlap.

title: ScoringBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Tabular Foundation Models with Proper Scoring Rules
summary: Tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL already produce full predictive distributions yet prevailing regression benchmarks evaluate them almost exclusively via point estimate metrics RMSE R2 These aggregate measures often obscure model performance in the tails of the distribution a critical deficit for high stakes decision making in domains like finance and clinical research where asymmetric risk profiles are the norm We introduce ScoringBench an open benchmark that computes a comprehensive suite of proper scoring rules like CRPS CRLS Interval Score Energy Score weighted CRPS and Brier Score alongside standard point metrics providing a richer picture of probabilistic forecast quality We evaluate realTabPFNv2.5 fine tuned with different scoring rule objectives and TabICL relative to untuned realTabPFNv2.5 across a suite of regression benchmarks Our results confirm that model rankings depend on the chosen scoring rule and that no single pretraining objective is universally optimal This demonstrates that for applications sensitive to extreme events the choice of evaluation metric is as much a domain specific requirement as the data itself ScoringBench is available at https://github.com/jonaslandsgesell/ScoringBench A live preview of the current leaderboard is available at https://scoringbench.bolt.host The leaderboard is maintained via git pull requests to ensure transparency traceability agility and reproducibility

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ScoringBench，一个用于评估表格基础模型的基准测试框架。与传统使用RMSE和R²等点估计指标不同，该基准测试采用完整的概率评分规则（如CRPS、CRLS、Interval Score、Energy Score等）来评估模型性能，尤其关注分布尾部对于高风险决策场景的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型已能生成完整的预测分布，但当前回归基准测试几乎 exclusively使用点估计指标（RMSE、R²），这些聚合指标往往掩盖了模型在分布尾部区域的表现差异。这在高风险决策领域（如金融和临床研究）中是一个关键缺陷，因为这些领域通常面临非对称风险配置文件。
AI.method: 作者构建了ScoringBench开源基准测试，计算了一套综合的 proper scoring rules，包括CRPS、CRLS、Interval Score、Energy Score、加权CRPS和Brier Score，同时保留标准点估计指标。他们评估了使用不同评分规则目标微调的realTabPFNv2.5以及TabICL，与未微调的realTabPFNv2.5进行比较。
AI.result: 实验结果证实：1）模型排名取决于所选择的评分规则；2）没有任何单一的预训练目标在所有情况下都是最优的；3）对于对极端事件敏感的应用场景，评估指标的选择与数据本身一样是特定领域的 requirement。
AI.conclusion: ScoringBench基准测试表明，在评估表格基础模型时，选择合适的评分规则至关重要。未来的模型评估应该根据具体应用场景的风险特征选择相应的评分指标，而非仅依赖传统的点估计指标。该基准测试为概率预测的质量评估提供了更全面的视角。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating tabular foundation models using probability scoring rules for regression tasks in finance/clinical domains. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics - the application domain is completely different (tabular data processing vs video generation/3D motion generation). The methods are unrelated (scoring rules for tabular data vs video generation models, VLMs, motion generation). This is a machine learning benchmark paper for tabular data, entirely outside the computer graphics and video generation domain.

title: Physiological and Semantic Patterns in Medical Teams Using an Intelligent Tutoring System
comment: Accepted as short paper to the 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2026)
summary: Effective collaboration requires teams to manage complex cognitive and emotional states through Socially Shared Regulation of Learning (SSRL). Physiological synchrony (i.e., longitudinal alignment in physiological signals) can indicate these states, but is hard to interpret on its own. We investigate the physiological and conversational dynamics of four medical dyads diagnosing a virtual patient case using an intelligent tutoring system. Semantic shifts in dialogue were correlated with transient physiological synchrony peaks. We also coded utterance segments for SSRL and derived cosine similarity using sentence embeddings. The results showed that activating prior knowledge featured significantly lower semantic similarity than simpler task execution. High physiological synchrony was associated with lower semantic similarity, suggesting that such moments involve exploratory and varied language use. Qualitative analysis triangulated these synchrony peaks as ``pivotal moments'': successful teams synchronized during shared discovery, while unsuccessful teams peaked during shared uncertainty. This research advances human-centered AI by demonstrating how biological signals can be fused with dialogues to understand critical moments in problem solving.

AI.tldr: 本研究探究了医学团队在诊断虚拟患者时的社会共享学习调节(SSRL)与生理同步现象，发现对话中的语义转换与生理同步峰值相关，且高生理同步时语言使用更加多样化。成功的团队在共同发现时同步，而失败的团队在共同不确定时同步。
AI.motivation: 生理同步可以指示团队协作中的认知和情绪状态，但单独难以解释。需要将生理信号与对话数据融合，以理解问题解决过程中的关键时刻。
AI.method: 研究四个医学二元组使用智能辅导系统诊断虚拟患者病例，对对话进行语义编码和句子嵌入余弦相似度计算，同时测量生理信号同步，并进行定性分析三角验证。
AI.result: 激活先前知识的语义相似度显著低于简单的任务执行；高生理同步与低语义相似度相关，表明此时语言使用更具探索性和多样性；定性分析将同步峰值确定为"关键时刻"：成功团队在共同发现时同步，失败团队在共同不确定时同步。
AI.conclusion: 生理信号与对话的融合可以有效识别团队协作中的关键决策时刻，为人本AI提供新思路：生物信号可用于理解和优化问题解决过程。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical education and team collaboration using intelligent tutoring systems, focusing on physiological synchronization and semantic patterns in medical teams. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile. The application domain is completely different (medical education vs. video/motion generation), and the methods (semantic encoding, physiological signals) are entirely unrelated to video generation models, VLMs, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal feature extraction. This is a psychology/education paper with no connection to computer graphics or video generation research.

title: Extend3D: Town-Scale 3D Generation
summary: In this paper, we propose Extend3D, a training-free pipeline for 3D scene generation from a single image, built upon an object-centric 3D generative model. To overcome the limitations of fixed-size latent spaces in object-centric models for representing wide scenes, we extend the latent space in the $x$ and $y$ directions. Then, by dividing the extended latent space into overlapping patches, we apply the object-centric 3D generative model to each patch and couple them at each time step. Since patch-wise 3D generation with image conditioning requires strict spatial alignment between image and latent patches, we initialize the scene using a point cloud prior from a monocular depth estimator and iteratively refine occluded regions through SDEdit. We discovered that treating the incompleteness of 3D structure as noise during 3D refinement enables 3D completion via a concept, which we term under-noising. Furthermore, to address the sub-optimality of object-centric models for sub-scene generation, we optimize the extended latent during denoising, ensuring that the denoising trajectories remain consistent with the sub-scene dynamics. To this end, we introduce 3D-aware optimization objectives for improved geometric structure and texture fidelity. We demonstrate that our method yields better results than prior methods, as evidenced by human preference and quantitative experiments.

AI.tldr: Extend3D是一种无需训练的从单张图像生成3D场景的pipeline，通过扩展对象中心3D生成模型的潜在空间来处理宽阔场景，采用重叠分块处理与空间耦合，结合点云先验初始化和"欠去噪"策略实现3D补全，并在去噪过程中进行潜在空间优化以确保几何和纹理质量。
AI.motivation: 1) 现有对象中心3D生成模型的潜在空间大小固定，难以表示宽阔场景；2) 分块3D生成需要严格的图像与潜在分块空间对齐；3) 对象中心模型对子场景生成存在次优问题。
AI.method: 1) 扩展对象中心3D生成模型的潜在空间到x和y方向；2) 将扩展潜在空间划分为重叠分块，对每个分块应用对象中心模型并在每步耦合；3) 使用单目深度估计器生成点云先验初始化场景；4) 通过SDEdit迭代细化遮挡区域；5) 提出"欠去噪"策略将3D结构不完整性视为噪声进行补全；6) 在去噪过程中优化扩展潜在空间，确保去噪轨迹与子场景动态一致；7) 引入3D感知优化目标改善几何和纹理质量。
AI.result: 在人类偏好和定量实验中都取得了优于先前方法的结果。
AI.conclusion: Extend3D是一个无需训练的3D场景生成 pipeline，通过扩展对象中心模型的潜在空间来克服固定大小潜在空间的局限性。该方法使用重叠分块处理和空间耦合，结合点云先验初始化和迭代遮挡区域细化，并通过"欠去噪"概念实现3D补全。3D感知优化目标确保了几何结构和纹理保真度的提升，在人类偏好和定量实验中都优于先前方法。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D SCENE generation from single images using object-centered 3D generation models. While it's in the Computer Graphics domain, it's about a completely different application: generating static 3D scenes/objects rather than video generation. The pain points in the research profile are about 2D video output quality control, VLM supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D MOTION - this paper addresses 2D image to 3D SCENE (not video/motion). The methods are also different: it uses object-centered 3D generation models, point cloud priors, and latent space optimization rather than video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM, or motion generation models. This is a moderate application domain match within Computer Graphics but doesn't address any of the specific pain points or use the required methods.

title: Structured Intent as a Protocol-Like Communication Layer: Cross-Model Robustness, Framework Comparison, and the Weak-Model Compensation Effect
comment: 25 pages, figures, tables, and appendix. Third paper in a cumulative research series on PPS and 5W3H structured intent representation, extending prior work to cross-model robustness, framework comparison, and user-study validation
summary: How reliably can structured intent representations preserve user goals across different AI models, languages, and prompting frameworks? Prior work showed that PPS (Prompt Protocol Specification), a 5W3H-based structured intent framework, improves goal alignment in Chinese and generalizes to English and Japanese. This paper extends that line of inquiry in three directions: cross-model robustness across Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini 2.5 Pro; controlled comparison with CO-STAR and RISEN; and a user study (N=50) of AI-assisted intent expansion in ecologically valid settings. Across 3,240 model outputs (3 languages x 6 conditions x 3 models x 3 domains x 20 tasks), evaluated by an independent judge (DeepSeek-V3), we find that structured prompting substantially reduces cross-language score variance relative to unstructured baselines. The strongest structured conditions reduce cross-language sigma from 0.470 to about 0.020. We also observe a weak-model compensation pattern: the lowest-baseline model (Gemini) shows a much larger D-A gain (+1.006) than the strongest model (Claude, +0.217). Under the current evaluation resolution, 5W3H, CO-STAR, and RISEN achieve similarly high goal-alignment scores, suggesting that dimensional decomposition itself is an important active ingredient. In the user study, AI-expanded 5W3H prompts reduce interaction rounds by 60 percent and increase user satisfaction from 3.16 to 4.04. These findings support the practical value of structured intent representation as a robust, protocol-like communication layer for human-AI interaction.

AI.tldr: 研究结构化意图框架（PPS）在跨模型、语言和提示框架下的目标对齐效果，发现其能显著降低跨语言方差并提升人机交互效率。
AI.motivation: 探究结构化意图表示在不同AI模型（Claude、GPT-4o、 Gemini）、语言和提示框架下保持用户目标的可靠性。
AI.method: 跨模型实验（3语言×6条件×3模型×3领域×20任务=3240个输出），独立评估器（DeepSeek-V3），与CO-STAR和RISEN对比，50人用户研究。
AI.result: 结构化提示将跨语言标准差从0.470降至约0.020；弱模型（Gemini）获益更大（D-A增益+1.006 vs Claude的+0.217）；5W3H、CO-STAR、RISEN达到相似高目标对齐分数；用户研究中交互轮次减少60%，满意度从3.16升至4.04。
AI.conclusion: 维度分解本身是关键因素；结构化意图表示作为人机交互的协议层具有实用价值和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about structured intent communication layers for AI models (human-computer interaction/prompt engineering), while the research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The application domains are completely different. This paper does not address any of the pain points: extracting visual guidance features from 2D video, quality control of video generation models, VLM accuracy for quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods are also unrelated - it focuses on prompt frameworks (CO-STAR, RISEN) for general LLMs, not the specific video generation, 3D motion, or cross-modal methods listed.

title: AA-Splat: Anti-Aliased Feed-forward Gaussian Splatting
comment: Please visit our project page at https://kaist-viclab.github.io/aasplat-site/
summary: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (FF-3DGS) emerges as a fast and robust solution for sparse-view 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis (NVS). However, existing FF-3DGS methods are built on incorrect screen-space dilation filters, causing severe rendering artifacts when rendering at out-of-distribution sampling rates. We firstly propose an FF-3DGS model, called AA-Splat, to enable robust anti-aliased rendering at any resolution. AA-Splat utilizes an opacity-balanced band-limiting (OBBL) design, which combines two components: a 3D band-limiting post-filter integrates multi-view maximal frequency bounds into the feed-forward reconstruction pipeline, effectively band-limiting the resulting 3D scene representations and eliminating degenerate Gaussians; an Opacity Balancing (OB) to seamlessly integrate all pixel-aligned Gaussian primitives into the rendering process, compensating for the increased overlap between expanded Gaussian primitives. AA-Splat demonstrates drastic improvements with average 5.4$\sim$7.5dB PSNR gains on NVS performance over a state-of-the-art (SOTA) baseline, DepthSplat, at all resolutions, between $4\times$ and $1/4\times$. Code will be made available.

AI.tldr: AA-Splat是一种用于稀疏视角3D重建和新视角合成的Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting模型，通过引入不透明度平衡的带限设计，解决了现有方法在非分布采样率下渲染时产生的严重伪影问题，实现了任意分辨率下的稳健抗锯齿渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有的Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (FF-3DGS)方法建立在不正确的屏幕空间膨胀滤波器上，导致在渲染非分布采样率（即与训练时不同的分辨率）时会出现严重的渲染伪影，限制了其在实际应用中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为AA-Splat的FF-3DGS模型，采用不透明度平衡的带限(OBBL)设计，包含两个核心组件：1) 3D带限后滤波器，将多视图最大频率边界整合到前馈重建管道中，有效对生成的3D场景表示进行带限并消除退化的高斯函数；2) 不透明度平衡(OB)模块，将所有像素对齐的高斯原语无缝整合到渲染过程中，补偿扩展高斯原语之间增加的Overlap。
AI.result: AA-Splat在所有分辨率（4×到1/4×）的新视角合成任务中，相比现有最先进方法DepthSplat，平均实现了5.4~7.5dB的PSNR增益。
AI.conclusion: AA-Splat能够实现任意分辨率下的稳健抗锯齿渲染，显著提升了稀疏视角3D重建和新视角合成的质量。代码将公开可用。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D Gaussian Splatting for sparse-view 3D scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis (anti-aliasing). While the profile mentions "3D Motion Generation Models," the context is about bridging 2D video to 3D human motion for video generation (Wanxiang/Seedance). The paper addresses scene-level 3D reconstruction, not human motion generation. Different application domain entirely - this is about rendering/graphics pipeline optimization, not video generation, VLM quality supervision, or 2D-to-human-motion bridging.

title: Extending MONA in Camera Dropbox: Reproduction, Learned Approval, and Design Implications for Reward-Hacking Mitigation
summary: Myopic Optimization with Non-myopic Approval (MONA) mitigates multi-step reward hacking by restricting the agent's planning horizon while supplying far-sighted approval as a training signal~\cite{farquhar2025mona}. The original paper identifies a critical open question: how the method of constructing approval -- particularly the degree to which approval depends on achieved outcomes -- affects whether MONA's safety guarantees hold. We present a reproduction-first extension of the public MONA Camera Dropbox environment that (i)~repackages the released codebase as a standard Python project with scripted PPO training, (ii)~confirms the published contrast between ordinary RL (91.5\% reward-hacking rate) and oracle MONA (0.0\% hacking rate) using the released reference arrays, and (iii)~introduces a modular learned-approval suite spanning oracle, noisy, misspecified, learned, and calibrated approval mechanisms. In reduced-budget pilot sweeps across approval methods, horizons, dataset sizes, and calibration strategies, the best calibrated learned-overseer run achieves zero observed reward hacking but substantially lower intended-behavior rates than oracle MONA (11.9\% vs.\ 99.9\%), consistent with under-optimization rather than re-emergent hacking. These results operationalize the MONA paper's approval-spectrum conjecture as a runnable experimental object and suggest that the central engineering challenge shifts from proving MONA's concept to building learned approval models that preserve sufficient foresight without reopening reward-hacking channels. Code, configurations, and reproduction commands are publicly available. https://github.com/codernate92/mona-camera-dropbox-repro

AI.tldr: 本文是对MONA方法的复现与扩展研究。MONA通过限制智能体的规划视野同时提供远见approval信号来缓解多步奖励黑客问题。研究在MONA相机投放环境复制了原始结果（普通RL奖励黑客率91.5%，oracle MONA为0%），并引入了模块化的学习approval套件。实验表明，校准后的学习监督者虽达到零奖励黑客，但意图行为率（11.9%）远低于oracle MONA（99.9%），表明问题从概念验证转向构建足够远见且不重新打开奖励黑客通道的学习approval模型。
AI.motivation: 原始MONA论文提出的开放问题：approval的构建方式（特别是approval对已达成结果的依赖程度）如何影响MONA的安全保证。研究旨在通过复现和扩展来操作化这一"approval谱系猜想"。
AI.method: 将MONA发布代码重组为标准Python项目，使用脚本化PPO训练；复现原始论文中普通RL与oracle MONA的对比；引入模块化学习approval套件，涵盖oracle、noisy、misspecified、learned和calibrated等多种approval机制；在降低预算下进行Pilot实验，测试不同approval方法、视野、数据集大小和校准策略。
AI.result: 复现确认：普通RL奖励黑客率91.5%，oracle MONA为0%。最佳校准学习监督者实现零观察奖励黑客，但意图行为率显著低于oracle MONA（11.9% vs 99.9%），这与欠优化而非重新出现的黑客一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究将MONA论文的approval谱系猜想转化为可运行的实验对象，表明核心工程挑战从证明MONA概念转向构建保留足够远见的学习approval模型，同时不重新打开奖励黑客通道。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Reinforcement Learning, reward hacking mitigation, and multi-agent systems (AI Safety domain), NOT Computer Graphics. The "Camera Dropbox" environment is a multi-agent RL simulation, not video generation. The methods (PPO, approval mechanisms) are completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM quality supervision, and 3D motion generation. This is a different application domain entirely - AI Safety/RL vs Computer Graphics.

title: Hallucination-aware intermediate representation edit in large vision-language models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models have demonstrated exceptional performance in multimodal reasoning and complex scene understanding. However, these models still face significant hallucination issues, where outputs contradict visual facts. Recent research on hallucination mitigation has focused on retraining methods and Contrastive Decoding (CD) methods. While both methods perform well, retraining methods require substantial training resources, and CD methods introduce dual inference overhead. These factors hinder their practical applicability. To address the above issue, we propose a framework for dynamically detecting hallucination representations and performing hallucination-eliminating edits on these representations. With minimal additional computational cost, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on existing benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, highlighting its efficient and robust hallucination elimination capability and its powerful controllability over hallucinations. Code is available at https://github.com/ASGO-MM/HIRE

AI.tldr: 针对大型视觉-语言模型的幻觉问题，提出一种动态检测幻觉表示并进行消除编辑的框架(HIRE)，在 minimal额外计算成本下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型存在严重的幻觉问题，现有方法包括重训练方法和对比解码(CD)方法存在资源消耗大或双推理开销的局限性，阻碍了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出动态幻觉检测与消除框架，通过识别幻觉表示并进行针对性的幻觉消除编辑，在推理过程中以 minimal额外计算成本纠正模型输出。
AI.result: 在现有基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，实验表明该方法具有高效、鲁棒的幻觉消除能力和强大的可控性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的HIRE框架通过动态检测和编辑幻觉表示，在 minimal额外计算开销下实现了先进的幻觉消除效果，具有高效、鲁棒和可控的特点，为大型视觉-语言模型的幻觉问题提供了实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on hallucination correction in large vision-language models (LVLMs) as a general NLP/Vision problem. While it uses VLMs, it does NOT address Computer Graphics applications. The research profile is specifically about using VLMs for quality supervision in video generation pipelines (Wanxiang, Seedance) and bridging 2D video to 3D motion - all in Computer Graphics. This paper addresses a generic VLM hallucination problem with no connection to video generation, motion generation, or computer graphics domains. The method (hallucination detection and editing) and application (reducing LVLM hallucinations) are fundamentally different from the user's research area.

title: AGFT: Alignment-Guided Fine-Tuning for Zero-Shot Adversarial Robustness of Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026; Code is available at \url{https://github.com/YuboCui/AGFT}
summary: Pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit strong zero-shot generalization but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Existing classification-guided adversarial fine-tuning methods often disrupt pre-trained cross-modal alignment, weakening visual-textual correspondence and degrading zero-shot performance. In this paper, we propose an Alignment-Guided Fine-Tuning (AGFT) framework that enhances zero-shot adversarial robustness while preserving the cross-modal semantic structure. Unlike label-based methods that rely on hard labels and fail to maintain the relative relationships between image and text, AGFT leverages the probabilistic predictions of the original model for text-guided adversarial training, which aligns adversarial visual features with textual embeddings via soft alignment distributions, improving zero-shot adversarial robustness. To address structural discrepancies introduced by fine-tuning, we introduce a distribution consistency calibration mechanism that adjusts the robust model output to match a temperature-scaled version of the pre-trained model predictions. Extensive experiments across multiple zero-shot benchmarks demonstrate that AGFT outperforms state-of-the-art methods while significantly improving zero-shot adversarial robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出AGFT框架，通过软对齐分布和分布一致性校准机制，在保持跨模态语义结构的同时提升预训练视觉语言模型的零样本对抗鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有分类引导的对抗性微调方法会破坏预训练的跨模态对齐，削弱视觉-文本对应关系，导致零样本性能下降
AI.method: AGFT框架利用原始模型的概率预测进行文本引导的对抗训练，通过软对齐分布将对抗性视觉特征与文本嵌入对齐，并引入分布一致性校准机制调整鲁棒模型输出以匹配预训练模型的预测
AI.result: 在多个零样本基准测试中，AGFT优于现有最先进方法，显著提升了零样本对抗鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: AGFT框架在保持跨模态语义结构的同时，有效提升了零样本对抗鲁棒性，显著优于现有方法

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on adversarial robustness of vision-language models, which is a computer vision/security research area, not Computer Graphics. While it mentions VLMs (which appears in the research profile), the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about improving zero-shot classification robustness, not about video generation quality control, extracting visual guidance features from 2D video, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods (adversarial training, alignment-guided fine-tuning) serve a different purpose than the cross-modal knowledge distillation and feature extraction needed for the specified pain points.

title: Native-Domain Cross-Attention for Camera-LiDAR Extrinsic Calibration Under Large Initial Perturbations
summary: Accurate camera-LiDAR fusion relies on precise extrinsic calibration, which fundamentally depends on establishing reliable cross-modal correspondences under potentially large misalignments. Existing learning-based methods typically project LiDAR points into depth maps for feature fusion, which distorts 3D geometry and degrades performance when the extrinsic initialization is far from the ground truth. To address this issue, we propose an extrinsic-aware cross-attention framework that directly aligns image patches and LiDAR point groups in their native domains. The proposed attention mechanism explicitly injects extrinsic parameter hypotheses into the correspondence modeling process, enabling geometry-consistent cross-modal interaction without relying on projected 2D depth maps. Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both accuracy and robustness. Under large extrinsic perturbations, our approach achieves accurate calibration in 88% of KITTI cases and 99% of nuScenes cases, substantially surpassing the second-best baseline. We have open sourced our code on https://github.com/gitouni/ProjFusion to benefit the community.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种外部参数感知的跨注意力框架,用于相机-LiDAR融合的外参标定。该方法直接在原始域中对齐图像 patches 和 LiDAR 点 groups,避免了将 LiDAR 点投影到 2D 深度图导致的 3D 几何失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的相机-LiDAR融合方法通常将 LiDAR 点投影到深度图进行特征融合,这种方法会扭曲 3D 几何结构。当外参初始化与真实值偏差较大时,性能会显著下降。因此需要一种能够在较大外参偏差情况下建立可靠跨模态对应关系的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一个外部参数感知的跨注意力框架,该框架直接在原始域中对齐图像 patches 和 LiDAR 点 groups。具体来说:1) 设计了一种跨注意力机制,将外参参数假设显式注入到对应关系建模中;2) 不依赖投影的 2D 深度图,实现几何一致的跨模态交互。
AI.result: 在 KITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集上的广泛实验表明,该方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于最先进的现有方法。在大外参扰动下,该方法在 KITTI 数据集中 88% 的案例和 nuScenes 数据集中 99% 的案例中实现了精确标定,显著超越了次优基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种外部参数感知的跨注意力机制,能够直接在原始域中进行跨模态对应关系建模,有效解决了大外参偏差下的相机-LiDAR 融合标定问题。该方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面均取得了显著提升,为自动驾驶中的多传感器融合提供了新的技术路径。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses camera-LiDAR extrinsic calibration for autonomous vehicles/robotics, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on video generation, quality control of video models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. While the paper mentions cross-attention and cross-modal alignment, these methods are applied to sensor fusion for calibration purposes, not video generation or 3D motion generation. The core domain (autonomous vehicle perception vs. computer graphics/video generation) is entirely different.

title: Adversarial Prompt Injection Attack on Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, their instruction-following behavior leaves them vulnerable to prompt injection attacks. Existing prompt injection methods predominantly rely on textual prompts or perceptible visual prompts that are observable by human users. In this work, we study imperceptible visual prompt injection against powerful closed-source MLLMs, where adversarial instructions are embedded in the visual modality. Our method adaptively embeds the malicious prompt into the input image via a bounded text overlay to provide semantic guidance. Meanwhile, the imperceptible visual perturbation is iteratively optimized to align the feature representation of the attacked image with those of the malicious visual and textual targets at both coarse- and fine-grained levels. Specifically, the visual target is instantiated as a text-rendered image and progressively refined during optimization to more faithfully represent the desired semantics and improve transferability. Extensive experiments on two multimodal understanding tasks across multiple closed-source MLLMs demonstrate the superior performance of our approach compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对封闭源多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的不可感知视觉提示注入攻击，通过有界文本叠加和迭代优化将恶意提示嵌入输入图像，在粗细粒度级别对齐特征表示，实验表明该方法优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在实际应用中易受提示注入攻击，现有方法主要依赖文本提示或可被人类用户感知的视觉提示，研究不可感知的视觉提示注入具有重要安全意义。
AI.method: 通过有界文本叠加提供语义引导，将恶意提示自适应嵌入输入图像；迭代优化不可感知视觉扰动，在粗粒度和细粒度级别上使被攻击图像的特征表示与恶意视觉和文本目标的特征表示对齐；视觉目标实例化为文本渲染图像并在优化过程中逐步细化。
AI.result: 在两个多模态理解任务上对多个封闭源MLLMs进行广泛实验，证明了该方法相比现有方法的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了对封闭源MLLMs的不可感知视觉提示注入攻击，为MLLMs的安全性研究提供了新的攻击范式。

relevance_reason: The paper is about adversarial security attacks on Multimodal Large Language Models (prompt injection attacks), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and using VLMs for quality supervision in computer graphics. While both papers mention VLMs, this paper uses VLMs as an attack target for security research, not for video generation quality control or motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - this is AI security research, not computer graphics.

title: Multimodal Models Meet Presentation Attack Detection on ID Documents
summary: The integration of multimodal models into Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) for ID Documents represents a significant advancement in biometric security. Traditional PAD systems rely solely on visual features, which often fail to detect sophisticated spoofing attacks. This study explores the combination of visual and textual modalities by utilizing pre-trained multimodal models, such as Paligemma, Llava, and Qwen, to enhance the detection of presentation attacks on ID Documents. This approach merges deep visual embeddings with contextual metadata (e.g., document type, issuer, and date). However, experimental results indicate that these models struggle to accurately detect PAD on ID Documents.

AI.tldr: 本文探索将多模态模型（Paligemma、Llava、Qwen）整合到ID文档的演示攻击检测（PAD）中，通过结合视觉特征和文本元数据来增强反 spoofing 攻击的能力，但实验结果表明这些模型难以准确检测ID文档上的PAD。
AI.motivation: 传统PAD系统仅依赖视觉特征，往往无法检测到复杂的 spoofing 攻击，需要引入多模态信息来提升检测性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练的多模态模型（如Paligemma、Llava、Qwen），将深度视觉嵌入与文档元数据（文档类型、发行机构、日期等）进行融合。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这些多模态模型在准确检测ID文档上的演示攻击方面存在困难。
AI.conclusion: 多模态模型在ID文档PAD任务中的直接应用效果不佳，需要进一步研究更有效的特征融合策略或专门针对PAD任务训练的模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) for ID documents - a security/fraud detection application, NOT Computer Graphics. While it uses multimodal VLMs (Paligemma, Llava, Qwen), the application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on video generation (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality supervision for generated visual content. Using VLMs in security applications (ID fraud detection) is entirely different from using VLMs for computer graphics quality control or video-to-motion bridging.

title: Seeing the Evidence, Missing the Answer: Tool-Guided Vision-Language Models on Visual Illusions
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit a systematic bias when confronted with classic optical illusions: they overwhelmingly predict the illusion as "real" regardless of whether the image has been counterfactually modified. We present a tool-guided inference framework for the DataCV 2026 Challenge (Tasks I and II) that addresses this failure mode without any model training. An off-the-shelf vision-language model is given access to a small set of generic image manipulation tools: line drawing, region cropping, side-by-side comparison, and channel isolation, together with an illusion-type-routing system prompt that prescribes which tools to invoke for each perceptual question category. Critically, every tool call produces a new, immutable image resource appended to a persistent registry, so the model can reference and compose any prior annotated view throughout its reasoning chain. Rather than hard-coding illusion-specific modules, this generic-tool-plus-routing design yields strong cross-structural generalization: performance remained consistent from the validation set to a test set containing structurally unfamiliar illusion variants (e.g., Mach Bands rotated from vertical to horizontal stacking). We further report three empirical observations that we believe warrant additional investigation: (i) a strong positive-detection bias likely rooted in imbalanced illusion training data, (ii) a striking dissociation between pixel-accurate spatial reasoning and logical inference over self-generated annotations, and (iii) pronounced sensitivity to image compression artifacts that compounds false positives.

AI.tldr: 无需训练的tool-guided推理框架解决VLM在光学幻觉上的系统性预测偏差，通过通用图像操作工具和幻觉类型路由实现跨结构泛化，并发现三个值得进一步研究的现象：正检测偏差、空间推理与逻辑推理的分离、对图像压缩伪影的敏感性。
AI.motivation: VLM在面对经典光学幻觉时存在系统性偏差：无论图像是否被反事实修改，模型都压倒性地预测幻觉为"真实"，这一失败模式需要解决。
AI.method: 提出了一种无训练的tool-guided inference框架，给VLM提供通用图像操作工具（线条绘制、区域裁剪、并排对比、通道隔离）+ 幻觉类型路由系统提示。每个工具调用生成新的不可变图像资源并添加到持久注册表，模型可在推理链中引用和组合任何先前注释的视图。
AI.result: 实现强跨结构泛化：从验证集到包含结构不熟悉幻觉变体的测试集（如Mach Bands从垂直堆叠旋转为水平堆叠），性能保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过工具引导推理无需训练即可解决VLM在光学幻觉上的失败，表现出强跨结构泛化能力，对不熟悉的幻觉变体也有效。三个关键发现值得深入研究：检测偏差、空间推理与逻辑推理的分离、以及对图像压缩伪影的敏感性。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on VLM bias in perceiving visual illusions (computer vision/AI robustness), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically using VLM for quality control of video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance) and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. Although both involve VLMs, the application domains are different: the paper addresses VLM perceptual errors in image understanding, not video generation quality supervision. This is a case of using similar methods (VLM) but in fundamentally different application domains.

title: SeGPruner: Semantic-Geometric Visual Token Pruner for 3D Question Answering
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have been widely adopted for 3D question answering (3D QA). In typical pipelines, visual tokens extracted from multiple viewpoints are concatenated with language tokens and jointly processed by a large language model (LLM) for inference. However, aggregating multi-view observations inevitably introduces severe token redundancy, leading to an overly large visual token set that significantly hinders inference efficiency under constrained token budgets. Visual token pruning has emerged as a prevalent strategy to address this issue. Nevertheless, most existing pruners are primarily tailored to 2D inputs or rely on indirect geometric cues, which limits their ability to explicitly retain semantically critical objects and maintain sufficient spatial coverage for robust 3D reasoning. In this paper, we propose SeGPruner, a semantic-aware and geometry-guided token reduction framework for efficient 3D QA with multi-view images. Specifically, SeGPruner first preserves semantically salient tokens through an attention-based importance module (Saliency-aware Token Selector), ensuring that object-critical evidence is retained. It then complements these tokens with spatially diverse ones via a geometry-guided selector (Geometry-aware Token Diversifier), which jointly considers semantic relevance and 3D geometric distance. This cooperation between saliency preservation and geometry-guided diversification balances object-level evidence and global scene coverage under aggressive token reduction. Extensive experiments on ScanQA and OpenEQA demonstrate that SeGPruner substantially improves inference efficiency, reducing the visual token budget by 91% and inference latency by 86%, while maintaining competitive performance in 3D reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: SeGPruner是一种用于3D问答的语义感知和几何引导的视觉token剪枝框架，通过保留语义显著tokens和补充空间多样化tokens，在大幅压缩token的同时保持推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前3D问答系统中，多视角视觉token的冗余导致 token 集过大，严重阻碍了受限token预算下的推理效率。现有剪枝方法主要针对2D输入或依赖间接几何线索，无法显式保留语义关键对象并保持足够的空间覆盖。
AI.method: 提出了SeGPruner框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 基于注意力的重要性模块(Saliency-aware Token Selector)用于保留语义显著的tokens；2) 几何引导的token多样化模块(Geometry-aware Token Diversifier)通过 jointly考虑语义相关性和3D几何距离来补充空间多样化的tokens。
AI.result: 在ScanQA和OpenEQA数据集上，SeGPruner实现了视觉token预算减少91%，推理延迟降低86%，同时保持具有竞争力的3D推理性能。
AI.conclusion: SeGPruner通过结合语义感知的重要性和几何引导的多样性，在保持竞争力的3D推理性能的同时，实现了高达91%的视觉token压缩和86%的推理延迟降低，为多视角3D QA任务提供了一种高效且有效的视觉token剪枝方案。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on 3D Question Answering (3D QA) - a visual language task for answering questions about 3D scenes. This is a fundamentally different application domain from the research profile which focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), quality control of video generation, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion generation. While both involve visual language models, the tasks are completely different: one does QA in 3D scenes, the other is about video generation quality and 2D-to-3D motion synthesis. The methods (token pruning for efficiency) and pain points (reducing redundancy in 3D QA vs. video generation quality control) do not align.

title: EarthEmbeddingExplorer: A Web Application for Cross-Modal Retrieval of Global Satellite Images
summary: While the Earth observation community has witnessed a surge in high-impact foundation models and global Earth embedding datasets, a significant barrier remains in translating these academic assets into freely accessible tools. This tutorial introduces EarthEmbeddingExplorer, an interactive web application designed to bridge this gap, transforming static research artifacts into dynamic, practical workflows for discovery. We will provide a comprehensive hands-on guide to the system, detailing its cloud-native software architecture, demonstrating cross-modal queries (natural language, visual, and geolocation), and showcasing how to derive scientific insights from retrieval results. By democratizing access to precomputed Earth embeddings, this tutorial empowers researchers to seamlessly transition from state-of-the-art models and data archives to real-world application and analysis. The web application is available at https://modelscope.ai/studios/Major-TOM/EarthEmbeddingExplorer.

AI.tldr: 本教程介绍EarthEmbeddingExplorer，一个将静态地球观测研究资产（基础模型和嵌入数据集）转化为动态交互式工作流程的工具。
AI.motivation: 地球观测领域虽有大量高影响力基础模型和全球地球嵌入数据集，但将学术资产转化为免费可用的实际工具仍存在显著障碍。
AI.method: 构建云原生软件架构的交互式web应用，支持跨模态查询（自然语言、视觉、地理定位），提供从检索结果中派生科学洞察的功能。
AI.result: 发布可直接访问的web应用程序(https://modelscope.ai/studios/Major-TOM/EarthEmbeddingExplorer)，实现从先进模型和数据档案到实际应用的过渡。
AI.conclusion: 通过民主化预计算地球嵌入的访问，使研究人员能够无缝地将最先进模型和数据档案转化为现实世界的应用和分析。

relevance_reason: The paper is about cross-modal retrieval for satellite imagery (Earth observation/remote sensing domain), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics - specifically video generation, quality control for video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. Even though both involve "cross-modal" concepts, the application domains are entirely different - this is remote sensing/satellite imagery, not computer graphics/video generation.

title: Few-shot Writer Adaptation via Multimodal In-Context Learning
summary: While state-of-the-art Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) models perform well on standard benchmarks, they frequently struggle with writers exhibiting highly specific styles that are underrepresented in the training data. To handle unseen and atypical writers, writer adaptation techniques personalize HTR models to individual handwriting styles. Leading writer adaptation methods require either offline fine-tuning or parameter updates at inference time, both involving gradient computation and backpropagation, which increase computational costs and demand careful hyperparameter tuning. In this work, we propose a novel context-driven HTR framework3 inspired by multimodal in-context learning, enabling inference-time writer adaptation using only a few examples from the target writer without any parameter updates. We further demonstrate the impact of context length, design a compact 8M-parameter CNN-Transformer that enables few-shot in-context adaptation, and show that combining context-driven and standard OCR training strategies leads to complementary improvements. Experiments on IAM and RIMES validate our approach with Character Error Rates of 3.92% and 2.34%, respectively, surpassing all writer-independent HTR models without requiring any parameter updates at inference time.

AI.tldr: 提出一种 context-driven HTR 框架，利用多模态 in-context learning 实现推理时 writer adaptation，仅需少量样本即可适应目标书写风格，无需参数更新，在 IAM 和 RIMES 上分别达到 3.92% 和 2.34% CER。
AI.motivation: 现有 SOTA 手写文本识别模型在标准基准测试上表现良好，但难以处理训练数据中代表性不足的特殊书写风格；现有 writer adaptation 方法需要离线微调或推理时参数更新，计算成本高且需谨慎调参。
AI.method: 提出受多模态 in-context learning 启发的 context-driven HTR 框架，推理时仅需目标 writer 的少量样本即可实现 adaptation，无需梯度计算和反向传播；设计了 8M 参数的紧凑 CNN-Transformer 模型；结合 context-driven 与标准 OCR 训练策略。
AI.result: 在 IAM 数据集上达到 3.92% 字符错误率，在 RIMES 数据集上达到 2.34% 字符错误率，超越了所有 writer-independent HTR 模型，且无需推理时参数更新。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种无需参数更新即可实现推理时 writer adaptation 的 HTR 框架，在 IAM 和 RIMES 数据集上分别达到 3.92% 和 2.34% 的字符错误率，超越了所有 writer-independent HTR 模型，为高效的手写识别个性化提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on handwriting text recognition (HTR) using in-context learning for writer adaptation - an OCR/document analysis task. The research profile is about Computer Graphics involving video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control. These are completely different application domains. While both involve visual understanding, the paper's task (handwriting recognition) has no overlap with video generation, motion generation, or the specific pain points mentioned (VLM quality supervision, bridging 2D video to 3D motion).

title: FedDBP: Enhancing Federated Prototype Learning with Dual-Branch Features and Personalized Global Fusion
summary: Federated prototype learning (FPL), as a solution to heterogeneous federated learning (HFL), effectively alleviates the challenges of data and model heterogeneity.However, existing FPL methods fail to balance the fidelity and discriminability of the feature, and are limited by a single global prototype. In this paper, we propose FedDBP, a novel FPL method to address the above issues. On the client-side, we design a Dual-Branch feature projector that employs L2 alignment and contrastive learning simultaneously, thereby ensuring both the fidelity and discriminability of local features. On the server-side, we introduce a Personalized global prototype fusion approach that leverages Fisher information to identify the important channels of local prototypes. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of FedDBP over ten existing advanced methods.

AI.tldr: 提出FedDBP方法，通过客户端双分支特征投影器和服务器端个性化全局原型融合来解决异构联邦学习中的特征保真度和可辨别性平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦原型学习方法无法同时保证特征的保真度和可辨别性，且受限于单一全局原型，难以应对数据异构和模型异构的挑战。
AI.method: 客户端设计双分支特征投影器，同时采用L2对齐和对比学习确保特征的保真度和可辨别性；服务器端引入基于Fisher信息的个性化全局原型融合方法，识别局部原型的重要通道。
AI.result: 实验表明FedDBP优于十种现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedDBP通过双分支特征投影和个性化原型融合有效解决了异构联邦学习中特征表示和全局原型适应的问题，性能表现优异。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Federated Learning with prototype learning for distributed ML systems. The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - it addresses data/model heterogeneity in distributed training, not video generation, 3D motion generation, or visual quality supervision. Even though both mention "feature extraction," the contexts are entirely different: this paper focuses on federated learning optimization while the research profile deals with computer graphics and video-to-motion tasks. The methods (federated learning, prototype fusion) have no overlap with the required methods (video generation models, VLMs, motion generation).

title: Square Superpixel Generation and Representation Learning via Granular Ball Computing
summary: Superpixels provide a compact region-based representation that preserves object boundaries and local structures, and have therefore been widely used in a variety of vision tasks to reduce computational cost. However, most existing superpixel algorithms produce irregularly shaped regions, which are not well aligned with regular operators such as convolutions. Consequently, superpixels are often treated as an offline preprocessing step, limiting parallel implementation and hindering end-to-end optimization within deep learning pipelines. Motivated by the adaptive representation and coverage property of granular-ball computing, we develop a square superpixel generation approach. Specifically, we approximate superpixels using multi-scale square blocks to avoid the computational and implementation difficulties induced by irregular shapes, enabling efficient parallel processing and learnable feature extraction. For each block, a purity score is computed based on pixel-intensity similarity, and high-quality blocks are selected accordingly. The resulting square superpixels can be readily integrated as graph nodes in graph neural networks (GNNs) or as tokens in Vision Transformers (ViTs), facilitating multi-scale information aggregation and structured visual representation. Experimental results on downstream tasks demonstrate consistent performance improvements, validating the effectiveness of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多尺度方形块的超级像素生成方法，利用粒球计算的适应表示和覆盖特性，用方形块近似超像素以避免不规则形状带来的计算和实现困难，实现高效并行处理和可学习特征提取。
AI.motivation: 现有超像素算法产生不规则形状区域，与卷积等规则操作不对齐，通常作为离线预处理步骤，限制了并行实现和端到端优化。
AI.method: 使用多尺度方形块近似超像素，为每个块计算基于像素强度相似性的纯度分数，选择高质量块，生成方形超像素可作为GNN节点或ViT标记集成。
AI.result: 在下游任务中显示出一致的性能改进。
AI.conclusion: 验证了所提出方法的有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about superpixel generation for image segmentation using granular ball computing - a fundamental computer vision technique. While related to computer vision broadly, it does NOT address the specific application domains in the research profile: video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, or 3D motion generation. The methods are also completely different - this uses granular ball computing for image segmentation rather than diffusion models for video generation or cross-modal knowledge distillation. The paper could at best serve as a generic feature extraction preprocessing step, but doesn't target video or motion generation domains.

title: VecAttention: Vector-wise Sparse Attention for Accelerating Long Context Inference
summary: Long-context video understanding and generation pose a significant computational challenge for Transformer-based video models due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention. While existing sparse attention methods employ coarse-grained patterns to improve efficiency, they typically incur redundant computation and suboptimal performance. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose \textbf{VecAttention}, a novel framework of vector-wise sparse attention that achieves superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs for video models. We observe that video attention maps exhibit a strong vertical-vector sparse pattern, and further demonstrate that this vertical-vector pattern offers consistently better accuracy-sparsity trade-offs compared with existing coarse-grained sparse patterns. Based on this observation, VecAttention dynamically selects and processes only informative vertical vectors through a lightweight important-vector selection that minimizes memory access overhead and an optimized kernel of vector sparse attention. Comprehensive evaluations on video understanding (VideoMME, LongVideoBench, and VCRBench) and generation (VBench) tasks show that VecAttention delivers a 2.65$\times$ speedup over full attention and a 1.83$\times$ speedup over state-of-the-art sparse attention methods, with comparable accuracy to full attention. Our code is available at https://github.com/anminliu/VecAttention.

AI.tldr: 针对Transformer视频模型处理长上下文视频时的二次复杂度问题，提出VecAttention向量级稀疏注意力框架，利用视频注意力图的垂直向量稀疏模式实现2.65倍加速，同时保持精度。
AI.motivation: 长上下文视频理解和生成对基于Transformer的视频模型带来巨大计算挑战，因为自注意力具有二次复杂度。现有的稀疏注意力方法使用粗粒度模式来提高效率，但通常会产生冗余计算和次优性能。
AI.method: 提出VecAttention，一种新颖的向量级稀疏注意力框架。观察到视频注意力图表现出强烈的垂直向量稀疏模式，并通过轻量级的重要向量选择模块动态选择信息丰富的垂直向量，以及优化的向量稀疏注意力内核来处理这些向量。
AI.result: 在视频理解（VideoMME、LongVideoBench、VCRBench）和生成（VBench）任务的综合评估表明，VecAttention相比全注意力实现2.65倍加速，相比最先进的稀疏注意力方法实现1.83倍加速，同时保持与全注意力相当的精度。
AI.conclusion: VecAttention通过利用视频注意力图的垂直向量稀疏模式，成功实现了优越的精度-效率权衡，为长上下文视频模型的高效处理提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on computational efficiency optimization for video Transformers (vector-level sparse attention). While it deals with video understanding and generation tasks (VBench), it does NOT address the specific pain points in the research profile: extracting visual guidance features from 2D video output, quality control for Wanxiang/Seedance models, VLM-based quality supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion domain gap. The paper is about accelerating long-context video inference, not about the specific application domains or methods (VLM, 3D motion generation, cross-modal distillation) mentioned in the research profile.

title: All-in-One Augmented Reality Guided Head and Neck Tumor Resection
summary: Positive margins are common in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma, yet intraoperative re-resection is often imprecise because margin locations are typically communicated verbally from pathology. We present an all-in-one augmented reality (AR) system that relocalizes positive margins from a resected specimen to the resection bed and visualizes them in situ using HoloLens 2 depth sensing and fully automated markerless surface registration. In a silicone phantom study with six medical trainees, markerless registration achieved target registration errors comparable to a marker-based baseline (median 1.8 mm vs. 1.7 mm; maximum < 4 mm). In a margin relocalization task, AR guidance reduced error from verbal guidance (median 14.2 mm) to a few millimeters (median 3.2 mm), with all AR localizations within 5 mm error. These results support the feasibility of markerless AR margin guidance for more precise intraoperative re-excision.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一种AR系统，利用HoloLens 2深度传感和无标记表面配准技术，帮助外科医生术中精确定位头颈癌阳性切缘，将定位误差从14.2mm降低到3.2mm，证明了该技术的临床可行性。
AI.motivation: 头颈鳞状细胞癌阳性切缘常见，但术中再切除时切缘定位通常由病理科口头传达，导致定位不精确。
AI.method: 开发了一种一体化AR系统，使用HoloLens 2深度传感和完全自动化的无标记表面配准技术，将切除标本上的阳性切缘重新定位到切除床并原位可视化。
AI.result: 无标记配准达到与传统标记基线相当的精度（中位数1.8mm vs 1.7mm，最大值<4mm）；AR引导将切缘定位误差从口头指导的14.2mm降低到3.2mm，所有AR定位误差均在5mm以内。
AI.conclusion: 无标记AR切缘引导系统可实现更精确的术中再切除，误差可控制在5mm以内，具有临床应用可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical augmented reality for tumor resection surgery, using HoloLens 2 depth sensing and surface registration. The application domain is completely different from the research profile - it's medical/surgical AR rather than computer graphics focused on video generation, VLMs, or 3D motion generation. The methods (HoloLens 2 depth sensors, surface registration) bear no relevance to Wanxiang/Seedance video generation models, Visual Language Models, or 3D Motion Generation Models mentioned in the profile. This is a healthcare/medical imaging paper, not a computer graphics/video generation paper.

title: Transmittance-Guided Structure-Texture Decomposition for Nighttime Image Dehazing
summary: Nighttime images captured under hazy conditions suffer from severe quality degradation, including low visibility, color distortion, and reduced contrast, caused by the combined effects of atmospheric scattering, absorption by suspended particles, and non-uniform illumination from artificial light sources. While existing nighttime dehazing methods have achieved partial success, they typically address only a subset of these issues, such as glow suppression or brightness enhancement, without jointly tackling the full spectrum of degradation factors. In this paper, we propose a two-stage nighttime image dehazing framework that integrates transmittance correction with structure-texture layered optimization. In the first stage, we introduce a novel transmittance correction method that establishes boundary-constrained initial transmittance maps and subsequently applies region-adaptive compensation and normalization based on whether image regions correspond to light source areas. A quadratic Gaussian filtering scheme operating in the YUV color space is employed to estimate the spatially varying atmospheric light map. The corrected transmittance map and atmospheric light map are then used in conjunction with an improved nighttime imaging model to produce the initial dehazed image. In the second stage, we propose a STAR-YUV decomposition model that separates the dehazed image into structure and texture layers within the YUV color space. Gamma correction and MSRCR-based color restoration are applied to the structure layer for illumination compensation and color bias correction, while Laplacian-of-Gaussian filtering is applied to the texture layer for detail enhancement. A novel two-phase fusion strategy, comprising nonlinear Retinex-based fusion of the enhanced layers followed by linear blending with the initial dehazing result, yields the final output.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段夜间图像去雾框架，整合透射率校正与结构-纹理分层优化。第一阶段通过边界约束初始透射率图和区域自适应补偿进行透射率校正，在YUV空间用二次高斯滤波估计大气光，改进夜间成像模型生成初始去雾图像；第二阶段提出STAR-YUV分解模型，在YUV空间分离结构和纹理层，分别进行照度补偿、色彩恢复和细节增强，最后通过非线性Retinex融合和线性混合的两阶段融合策略输出最终结果。
AI.motivation: 现有夜间去雾方法仅解决部分问题（如抑制光晕或增强亮度），未能联合处理夜间雾霾图像的低可见性、颜色失真和对比度降低等全部退化因素。
AI.method: 第一阶段：提出基于边界约束的初始透射率校正方法，结合区域自适应补偿和归一化；在YUV色彩空间使用二次高斯滤波估计大气光 map，改进夜间成像模型生成初始去雾图像。第二阶段：提出STAR-YUV分解模型，在YUV空间分离结构和纹理层；结构层进行伽马校正和MSRCR色彩恢复，纹理层应用Laplacian-of-Gaussian滤波增强细节；采用非线性Retinex融合和线性混合的两阶段融合策略生成最终输出。
AI.result: 所提方法能够有效提升夜间雾霾图像的可见性、校正颜色偏差并增强对比度。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，所提出的两阶段框架在处理夜间雾霾图像时能够有效提升可见性、校正颜色偏差并增强对比度，比现有方法更全面地解决了夜间图像退化的多种因素。

relevance_reason: This paper is about nighttime image dehazing - a traditional computer vision/image processing task focused on removing haze from nighttime images. The application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on: (1) Video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), (2) 3D motion generation, (3) VLM-based quality supervision, and (4) Bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods used are also different - this paper uses transmittance estimation, Retinex theory, and Gaussian filtering rather than diffusion models, VLMs, or cross-modal knowledge distillation. The paper addresses none of the mentioned pain points and is irrelevant to computer graphics video generation research.

title: Quantization with Unified Adaptive Distillation to enable multi-LoRA based one-for-all Generative Vision Models on edge
comment: Accepted at the Mobile AI Workshop, CVPR 2026
summary: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) features such as image editing, object removal, and prompt-guided image transformation are increasingly integrated into mobile applications. However, deploying Large Vision Models (LVMs) for such tasks on resource-constrained devices remains challenging due to their high memory and compute requirements. While Low-Rank Adapters (LoRAs) enable parameter-efficient task adaptation, existing Mobile deployment pipelines typically compile separate model binaries for each LoRA + a copy of the foundation model, resulting in redundant storage and increased runtime overhead. In this work, we present a unified framework for enabling multi-task GenAI inference on edge devices using a single shared model. Our key idea is to treat LoRA weights as runtime inputs rather than embedding them into the compiled model graph, allowing dynamic task switching at runtime without recompilation. Then, to support efficient on-device execution, we introduce QUAD (Quantization with Unified Adaptive Distillation), a quantizationaware training strategy that aligns multiple LoRA adapters under a shared quantization profile. We implement the proposed system with a lightweight runtime stack compatible with mobile NPUs and evaluate it across multiple chipsets. Experimental results demonstrate up to 6x and 4x reduction in memory footprint and latency improvements, respectively, while maintaining high visual quality across multiple GenAI tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在边缘设备上实现多任务生成式AI推理的统一框架，通过将LoRA权重作为运行时输入实现动态任务切换，并引入QUAD量化策略实现高效执行。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI功能日益集成到移动应用，但大型视觉模型在资源受限设备上部署面临高内存和计算挑战。现有移动部署为每个LoRA+基础模型编译单独二进制文件，导致冗余存储和运行时开销。
AI.method: 1) 将LoRA权重视为运行时输入而非嵌入编译模型图，实现动态任务切换；2) 提出QUAD（统一自适应蒸馏量化）量化感知训练策略，使多个LoRA适配器在共享量化配置文件下对齐；3) 实现与移动NPU兼容的轻量级运行时堆栈。
AI.result: 内存占用减少高达6倍，延迟改进高达4倍，同时保持多个GenAI任务的高视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现在边缘设备上使用单一共享模型进行多任务GenAI推理，通过动态LoRA加载和统一量化策略显著降低资源消耗。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on edge deployment optimization (quantization, memory reduction, latency improvement) for vision models on mobile devices. While it deals with visual models, the application domain is AI infrastructure and mobile optimization, NOT Computer Graphics content generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points: extracting visual guidance features from 2D video, quality control for Wanxiang/Seedance video models, VLM accuracy supervision, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion. The methods (LoRA quantization, edge runtime optimization) are unrelated to video generation, 3D motion generation, or cross-modal knowledge distillation needed in the research profile.

title: Generating Key Postures of Bharatanatyam Adavus with Pose Estimation
summary: Preserving intangible cultural dances rooted in centuries of tradition and governed by strict structural and symbolic rules presents unique challenges in the digital era. Among these, Bharatanatyam, a classical Indian dance form, stands out for its emphasis on codified adavus and precise key postures. Accurately generating these postures is crucial not only for maintaining anatomical and stylistic integrity, but also for enabling effective documentation, analysis, and transmission to broader global audiences through digital means. We propose a pose-aware generative framework integrated with a pose estimation module, guided by keypoint-based loss and pose consistency constraints. These supervisory signals ensure anatomical accuracy and stylistic integrity in the synthesized outputs. We evaluate four configurations: standard conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN), cGAN with pose supervision, conditional diffusion, and conditional diffusion with pose supervision. Each model is conditioned on key posture class labels and optimized to maintain geometric structure. In both cGAN and conditional diffusion settings, the integrated pose guidance aligns generated poses with ground-truth keypoint structures, promoting cultural fidelity.
